title: Opportunity Scout
description:
Opportunity Scout

Conquer Learning Company  ·  Remote  ·  Part-Time / Contract



Research Outreach Speaking Vendor Opportunities

About the role



Conquer Learning Company is on a mission to equip leaders and organizations to thrive. We are looking for a sharp, resourceful Opportunity Scout to help our CEO get in front of the right rooms, right stages, and right markets.



This is a research-and-outreach role. You will spend your time hunting for speaking engagements and vendor/vending opportunities that are a strong fit for our CEO, then surfacing them in an organized, actionable way.



What you will do



Search the web consistently for speaking engagements, conferences, summits, podcasts, panels, and events that align with our CEO's brand and message



Identify vending and vendor opportunities at markets, expos, festivals, and community events where our products and services can be showcased



Compile and organize your findings into a clean, easy-to-review format



Track deadlines, submission windows, and application requirements for each opportunity



Bring a strategic eye, knowing which opportunities are worth pursuing and which to pass on





Who you are



A natural researcher who loves digging and does not stop at the first page of results



Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage a running list of opportunities without dropping the ball



Familiar with the education, leadership, faith, and community development spaces (a plus, not required)



Self-directed: you take initiative, ask good questions, and do not need to be micromanaged



A strong communicator who can present findings clearly and concisely



This is a great fit if you love the hunt.



You are the type of person who finds it genuinely satisfying to track down the right opportunity, organize the intel, and hand it off knowing it is exactly what was needed. If that sounds like you, we want to hear from you.



How to Apply



We do not want a resume. We want to hear your voice.



Send us a ***VOICE*** message that covers three things:



Who is Na'Kole Watson? Tell us what you know about her.



What does she do and who does she serve?



What types of speaking opportunities would you look for on her behalf, and why?



Your voice message is your application. It shows us how you think, whether you did your homework, and whether you are the right fit for this role. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: SMS Marketer– Land Investing
description:
BT LAND GROUP

Job Description



Position: SMS Marketer – Land Investing

Reports To: Owner

Location: Remote (Virtual Assistant)

Schedule: Part-Time to Start (20–30 hrs/wk), Full-Time Potential

Probationary Period: 60 Days



About BT Land Group



BT Land Group is a real estate land investment company specializing in the acquisition and resale of vacant land across most U.S. mainland states. We purchase raw, off-market land at a discount—residential, agricultural, and recreational properties outside of city limits—take title, and list it on the MLS with a realtor for immediate resale. Our acquisitions pipeline is powered by high-volume SMS outreach, data-driven targeting, and real conversations with landowners. We're growing fast and building a team of sharp, motivated people who want to grow with us.



Role Overview



The SMS Marketer is the tip of the spear in our acquisitions pipeline. You'll execute high-volume text campaigns through Smarter Contacts to engage landowners, spark real conversations, qualify interest, and move warm leads into Stride CRM for the team to act on. This is not a "blast and forget" role—you'll be thinking on your feet, answering seller questions in real time, and identifying which leads are worth pursuing. We strongly prefer candidates with cold calling or outbound sales experience, because that conversational instinct and ability to handle objections translates directly into being an effective texter.



Key Responsibilities



- Execute and manage targeted SMS marketing campaigns through Smarter Contacts focused on vacant land acquisition across multiple U.S. markets.

- Respond to inbound seller text conversations promptly and professionally—engage naturally and conversationally, not robotically.

- Conduct intuitive exchanges with landowners to uncover motivation, pricing expectations, property details, timeline, and any concerns about selling.

- Qualify leads against BT Land Group's buy box criteria (market value, zoning, acreage, buildability, location, access) and flag strong acquisition opportunities for the team.

- Coordinate with the Lead Manager to route inbound calls that come to the texting number—we do not accept live calls on the texting line, so these must be handed off promptly.

- Perform basic comping and preliminary due diligence on land parcels using Land ID and supporting tools (training provided where needed).

- Log all conversations, notes, and lead details accurately in Stride CRM to maintain a clean, up-to-date pipeline.

- Collaborate with leadership to refine messaging templates, targeting criteria, and overall SMS strategy based on real performance data.

- Track and report on key performance metrics including response rates, lead quality, and conversion to help continuously improve campaign results.

- Maintain organized follow-up workflows to keep warm leads engaged and moving through the pipeline over time.



Requirements



- Prior experience in SMS marketing, cold calling, or outbound sales—ideally in real estate or a related industry (strongly preferred).

- Strong written communication skills with the ability to build rapport and trust through text-based conversation.

- Quick on your feet—comfortable answering unexpected seller questions and handling pushback in real time via text.

- Analytical mindset with the ability to recognize promising deals versus red flags based on property details and seller motivation.

- Highly organized with strong time-management skills; able to juggle multiple active conversations and campaigns simultaneously.

- Self-starter who thrives working independently in a remote environment while staying aligned with team goals and priorities.

- Comfortable learning and adapting to new tools and platforms quickly.

- Availability during U.S. business hours for real-time seller engagement.

-bonus if you can work weekends 



Preferred Qualifications



- Experience using Smarter Contacts, Launch Control, or similar SMS/outreach platforms.

- Familiarity with land investing, land values, zoning, road access, utilities, and rural property considerations.

- Experience with CRM systems (Stride, Podio, REsimpli, or similar) and lead management workflows.

- Prior experience working with motivated seller leads or on an acquisitions team in real estate investing.



Compensation & Benefits



- Competitive hourly compensation based on experience and skill level.

- Quarterly performance-based bonus potential tied to lead quality, responsiveness, and contribution to successful acquisitions.

- Starts part-time (20–30 hours/week) with a 60-day probationary period. Strong performers will have the opportunity to transition to full-time (40 hours/week).

- Hands-on training and development in land investing, acquisitions strategy, and SMS marketing systems.

- Clear path for pay growth and expanded responsibilities as the company scales.



How to Apply



Interested candidates should submit their resume along with a brief message covering the following:



- Your relevant experience in SMS marketing, cold calling, or outbound sales.

- Why you're interested in land investing and this role specifically.

- A recording of yourself on a call. If you don't have an existing recording, please send a short clip of yourself introducing yourself as if you were speaking to a potential seller for the first time.

- Your availability (hours per week and time zone).

- Your favorite food.

title: Inventory Buyer (Amazon FBA)
description:
Inventory Buyer (Amazon FBA) — Performance-Based Role



We are looking for a disciplined, data-driven Inventory Buyer responsible for deploying capital into profitable inventory opportunities across Amazon FBA.



Leads will be provided to you. 



This is not a sourcing role. This is a decision-making role.



Your job is not to find products—it is to filter, validate, and execute high-quality purchasing decisions that generate consistent profit and fast inventory turnover.



Application Process (Read Carefully)



To be considered for this role, you must complete our Inventory Buyer Qualification Quiz.



Only candidates who demonstrate strong decision-making ability will be contacted

If you do not pass, you will not receive a response

Qualified candidates will be contacted by our team to schedule an interview



Please read the rest of this posting before taking the exam: 



This is intentional. This role requires precision, and the quiz is designed to reflect real decision-making scenarios.



Who This Role Is (and Is NOT) For



This role is strictly for experienced operators.



This is not for beginners

This is not for those looking to “learn” or “try out” inventory buying

This is not a training position



This is for individuals who:



Have real experience purchasing inventory for resale

Understand how to evaluate deals using data (Keepa, SellerAmp, etc.)

Can handle the responsibility of deploying capital and making independent decisions



If you do not already have experience in this area, this role will not be a fit.



Core Responsibility



You will evaluate potential inventory opportunities and d
 what to buy using strict criteria around:



Profitability

Sales velocity

Price stability

Competition

Account health risk



Every decision directly impacts company capital. You are expected to operate with precision, discipline, and accountability.



What Success Looks Like

Inventory consistently sells within 30–60 days

Purchases meet or exceed 35% ROI

High percentage of buys convert into profitable outcomes (70–80%+ success rate)

Minimal capital tied up in slow or dead inventory

Clean, compliant supply chain with proper documentation

Key Responsibilities

Review and analyze sourcing leads daily

Apply strict BUY / NO BUY criteria to every opportunity

Execute test buys and scale winners responsibly

Manage restocking decisions based on real sales data

Monitor inventory performance and adjust strategy

Maintain organized records of invoices and suppliers

Ensure all purchases meet Amazon account health and compliance standards

Performance Metrics



You will be evaluated based on:



Net profit generated

Sell-through rate (target: 70%+ within 60 days)

ROI on purchases (minimum 35%)

Decision accuracy (% of profitable buys)

Capital efficiency (profit per dollar deployed)

Compensation Structure



Base: $150/month - $400/mo

Commission: % of net profit on SOLD inventory (tiered based on performance)

Speed Bonus:

Sold within 30 days ? additional bonus

Sold within 60 days ? smaller bonus



Penalty:

Inventory that does not sell within 90–120 days or is liquidated earns zero commission



You are paid based on results, not activity.



Workflow & Training



Phase 1 (First 2–3 Weeks):



Daily review of all purchase decisions

Real-time feedback and correction



Phase 2 (30–60 Days):



Controlled autonomy with budget limits per decision



Phase 3 (60+ Days):



Full autonomy within system rules



Performance reviewed through metrics, not supervision



Non-Negotiable Standards

You must be able to confidently say NO to 90% of opportunities

No emotional or speculative buying

No exceptions to criteria

No shortcuts on compliance or documentation

Required Skills & Experience



Extremely Important: 

Must have a STRONG understanding of Amazon FBA ecosystem, account health and invoice/supplier requirements

Experience with Keepa, SellerAmp, or similar tools

Ability to read and interpret sales data and pricing trends

Knowledge of Amazon account health, IP claims, and invoice requirements

High attention to detail and organization



Who This Is For



This role is for someone who:



Thinks in terms of ROI and capital allocation, not tasks

Is disciplined and process-driven

Prefers making fewer, high-quality decisions over high volume

Wants to be rewarded directly based on performance



Who This Is NOT For

Anyone without prior inventory purchasing experience

Anyone looking to learn on the job

Anyone who needs constant supervision

Anyone who prioritizes volume over quality

Anyone who makes decisions based on assumptions instead of data



Final Note



This role directly controls capital.



If you make strong decisions, you will scale your income alongside the business.

If you make poor decisions, it will show immediately in the numbers.



Start by completing the qualification quiz. Only top performers will move forward.



Inventory Purchasing Quiz:

title: ???? Client Success & Operations Coordinator — Level Next Consulting & Marketing
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines) | Type: Full-Time | Hours: M–F, overlap with US Pacific Time (PST) preferred



About Us

Level Next Consulting & Marketing is a fast-growing digital marketing agency based in San Diego, California. We build omnichannel authority marketing systems for service-based businesses — coaches, consultants, attorneys, lenders, real estate professionals, and more — helping them dominate search, social, and AI-powered recommendations without hiring an entire in-house team.

Our services include SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), social media management, content creation, video production, paid advertising, web development, and monthly client reporting.

We currently serve 8 active clients across multiple industries with a fully remote team, and we are growing quickly. Our team includes:



Max — CEO & Owner. Runs strategy, sales, oversees all client marketing, and leads the business.

Ephraim — Social media scheduling, blog publishing, reel posting

Faye — Graphic design, carousels, ad graphics, operations support

Shao — Graphic design, social media, admin

Jade — Website optimization & digital marketing

Philip — Web development

Arma — Video editing



We are a lean, execution-focused team that cares deeply about client results. Our culture is direct, fast-moving, and built on accountability and trust.



The Role

We are hiring a Client Success & Operations Coordinator — someone who becomes the operational backbone of Level Next and, in many ways, a second voice for Max with clients and the team.

This is not a purely administrative role. This person is client-facing, team-facing, and systems-focused. You will be the person who makes sure the right things get done by the right people at the right time — and that our clients always feel informed, taken care of, and confident in us.

As we scale, this role will grow into a fractional agency operations manager — improving our systems, refining our workflows, and ensuring Level Next operates like a well-oiled machine even as we add more clients and tea
mbers.



What You'll Be Responsible For

Client Onboarding & Information Gathering



Reach out to new clients via
 and coordinate the collection of all necessary brand and account details

Collect and securely store: brand guidelines, logo files, brand voice docs, social media credentials (Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube), website login access (WordPress, Wix, Squarespace, etc.), Google Business Profile access, Google Analytics, ad account access, and any relevant CRM credentials

Build and maintain a Client Intake Tracker so nothing falls through the cracks

Set the tone for the client relationship from day one — professional, warm, organized



Client Communication & Relationship Management



Serve as a consistent point of contact for clients when Max is unavailable

Respond to client questions, update requests, and status inquiries in a timely, professional manner

Keep clients informed about what's being worked on, what's coming up, and when to expect deliverables

Flag anything urgent or sensitive to Max immediately

Manage communication across
, Slack, and any client communication channels



Team Accountability & Deliverable Tracking



Own our Master Content Calendar — a Google Sheets document covering 8 active clients with 40+ recurring weekly deliverables across blog posts, reels, carousels,
s, podcasts, social posts, and graphic design assets

Know what every tea
mber (Ephraim, Faye, Shao, Jade, Philip, Arma) is responsible for each week and hold them accountable to deadlines

Follow up proactively when deliverables are late or at risk

Keep the Asana project management system updated — tasks marked complete, new tasks created, due dates accurate

Run a weekly team check-in or async status update to confirm progress across all clients



Current Weekly Deliverables You'll Be Tracking

Our active client deliverables include (but are not limited to):

Agent Elite — Daily reels (podcast clips + product/service), weekly blog, weekly carousel, weekly stories, weekly podcast shot/edited/published to YouTube and streaming platforms

LMFCE — Bi-weekly blogs (two series), bi-weekly
 blasts, bi-weekly carousel, on-demand graphic design

Saffron & Sage — Daily reels (Opus Clip + Studio Luniste), weekly blog, weekly marketing
s, monthly newsletter, 3 weekly carousels, reel covers for every reel

InVivo Leadership Strategies — Weekly podcast shot/edited/published, daily podcast reels, 3 weekly reels (Mon/Wed/Fri), monthly newsletter, weekly marketing
s, reel covers

Panoramic Lending — Bi-weekly podcast/long-form video, daily reels, reel covers, monthly newsletter, weekly marketing
s, 3 weekly carousels (Mon/Wed/Fri), weekly blog

Yost Quesada Team — On-demand blogs, HubSpot
 templates, LinkedIn + YouTube Shorts posting

CQ2K — Weekly blog, monthly newsletter

Timeshare Counsel — Growing account; deliverables being confirmed

Each deliverable has a defined owner, process, storage location in Google Drive, and posting workflow. You will own ensuring each of these moves through the pipeline correctly and on time.

Systems Improvement & Operations



As you get comfortable in the role, identify gaps, bottlenecks, and inefficiencies in our workflows

Propose and help implement improvements to how we track work, communicate, and deliver for clients

Help document SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) so the team always knows exactly how to execute recurring tasks

Support Max in building a business that can scale without everything running through him





Tools You'll Be Working In



Asana — Project and task management for all clients

Google Drive — Asset storage and organization (client-specific folder structures)

Google Sheets — Master Content Calendar and tracking documents

Slack — Internal team communication

Gmail /
 — Client communication

Vista Social — Social media scheduling (awareness/familiarity is a plus)

GoHighLevel / RAD CRM —
 marketing platforms (training provided)

Notion or Google Docs — SOPs and documentation





Who You Are



You are exceptionally organized — the kind of person who can track 10 moving parts across 8 clients and never drop a ball

You are an excellent written communicator — professional in English, warm with clients, clear with the team

You have sharp follow-through — you don't just know what's due, you make sure it gets done

You are proactive, not reactive — you see problems before they become fires and act on them

You are comfortable being client-facing — you can represent Level Next professionally with confidence

You are systems-minded — you naturally look for ways to make things run smoother

You have experience working with a US-based agency, marketing team, or service business (strongly preferred)

You have worked in a project coordination, account management, virtual assistant, or operations role — ideally in a marketing or creative agency context

You are available for meaningful overlap with US Pacific Time (PST) — ideally at least 4–6 hours per day





What This Is NOT



This is not a passive task-list role. You will need to think, communicate, and problem-solve.

This is not a graphic design or video editing role (we have tea
mbers for that).

This is not a role for someone who waits to be told what to do — we need someone who takes ownership.





Compensation & Growth



Competitive salary based on experience (please include your expected monthly rate in your application)

This role has clear growth potential — as Level Next scales, so does this position

You will have direct access to the CEO and be a trusted part of a tight-knit, high-performing team

You will learn a tremendous amount about modern digital marketing, AI marketing systems, and agency operations





How to Apply

Please send the following to 
 with the subject line: "CS Ops Coordinator – [Your Name]"



A short introduction about yourself and your relevant experience (3–5 sentences)

Your available working hours and PST overlap

One example of a time you managed multiple deadlines or kept a team accountable — what happened, what you did, and what the outcome was

Any relevant tools you've used (Asana, Slack, Google Workspace, CRMs, etc.)



Applications without the subject line format will not be reviewed.

We respond to every qualified applicant. Looking forward to meeting you.

— Max Bergstrom, CEO | Level Next Consulting & Marketing

title: Virtual Assistant — Youth Events & Leadership Brand (Social Media + Admin)
description:
Virtual Assistant — Youth Events & Leadership Brand

PART-TIME · ONGOING · REMOTE · PHILIPPINES-BASED

?? Please Read Before Applying



This is NOT an e-commerce, dropshipping, or product-based brand. We do not sell physical products, run a Shopify store, or manage inventory. If your VA experience is primarily in e-commerce or online retail, this role is not the right fit for you. Please do not apply.



We are looking for a VA with experience supporting service-based businesses, events companies, educational brands, coaching brands, or community-focused organizations.



Who We Are



The Elevated Youth Experience LLC is a premium youth brand based in the United States. We create high-end events, leadership development programs, creative workshops, and curated experiences for children ages 6–11 and middle school youth.



We are not a daycare. We are not a party planning company. We are a movement-driven brand that blends leadership development, emotional intelligence, and premium celebration into one experience. Think of us as the intersection of a high-end event brand and a youth empowerment organization.



Our brand is bold, colorful, premium, and deeply intentional. Everything we do is curated. Everything we communicate has to reflect that standard.



What You Will Do



Manage and schedule Instagram and
 content using 
 templates — 5 posts per week

Write captions in our brand voice — premium, bold, warm, and emotionally intelligent. No generic content. No product language. No shop links.

Respond to DMs and comments professionally and in brand voice within 24 hours

Research and engage with target audiences — parents, schools, community organizations, and family-focused brands

Maintain and update our Squarespace website with events, program info, and photos

Build and manage our parent
 list and send weekly newsletters via Mailchimp

Research venues, vendors, and local businesses for events and sponsorship opportunities

Organize all brand files, photos, and documents in Google Drive

Send a daily morning check-in and end-of-day summary — the founder works a full-time job and needs clean, efficient updates

What We Are Looking For



Experience supporting a service business, events brand, coaching brand, nonprofit, or educational organization — not a product store

Excellent written English with a natural ability to write warmly, boldly, and professionally

Strong Canva skills — you must be able to create premium-looking social media graphics with no training

Experience with Instagram and
 content management — not just posting, but engaging, growing, and representing a brand

Comfortable working independently for 8+ hours with minimal check-ins from the founder

Highly organized, self-directed, and proactive — you bring solutions, not just questions

Some experience with website updates (Squarespace preferred) and
 marketing (Mailchimp or similar)

Passionate about children, education, empowerment, or premium service brands

Available during some US Eastern Time hours for real-time communication

Hours & Compensation



This role starts at 10–15 hours per week at $5–6 USD per hour depending on experience and skill level. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with this brand long-term. As the brand grows, your hours and pay will grow with it. We reward loyalty, quality, and initiative.



How To Apply



Send a message that includes all of the following. Incomplete applications will not receive a response.



A brief introduction — who you are and what kind of brands you have supported in the past

Your Canva skill level on a scale of 1–10 and what you can create without training

One Instagram caption written right now, in your own words, for this brand. Our program is called The Elevated Youth Leadership Series — a 6-week leadership program for middle school students. Write the caption as if you already work here. Do not use AI.

Your available hours in US Eastern Time

Your hourly rate

Applications that include a portfolio, sample posts, or links to accounts you have managed will be prioritized.

title: Experience Email Marketer
description:
ABOUT DISPENZA

Dispenza has quickly become one of the largest marketing agencies in the rapidly-growing emerging market of cannabis as it quickly legalizes state by state in the Americas. As the market matures, we are on a mission to help change how the market operates, leaving the more questionable activities done by current market leaders and emerge as the first marketing agency and platform that values our customers while simultaneously delivering business-changing results to our clients.



JOB OVERVIEW

We’re looking for an experience
 Marketer to support ongoing campaign execution, lifecycle marketing, and retention strategy. This role focuses on building and optimizing
 campaigns, automations, SMS, and Wallet/ePass messaging to drive engagement, retention, and revenue.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Plan, build, and execute
 marketing campaigns, including one-off broadcasts and automated lifecycle flows

- Develop and manage automations such as welcome series, abandoned cart, re-engagement, and retention sequences

- Segment audiences and implement targeted messaging strategies based on customer behavior and lifecycle stage

- Design and run A/B tests on subject lines, content, timing, and campaign structure to improve performance

- Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance (open rates, CTR, conversions, and revenue attribution)

- Translate performance data into actionable insights and optimization strategies

- Create clear, concise performance reports with recommendations for continuous improvement

- Support Wallet/ePass and SMS campaign initiatives as part of a broader retention strategy

- Ensure all campaigns are aligned with brand voice, compliance standards, and business goals



TEAM COLLABORATION

- Work closely with project managers, designers, and stakeholders to execute campaigns efficiently

- Participate in team reviews to evaluate performance and identify opportunities for improvement

- Communicate updates proactively and flag blockers, risks, or optimization opportunities early



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

- 3–5 years of experience in
 marketing

- Hands-on experience with platforms such as Klaviyo, HubSpot, Mailchimp, or Salesforce

- Proven track record managing high-volume
 lists and driving measurable revenue impact

- Strong understanding of segmentation, lifecycle marketing, and customer journey mapping

- Experience building and optimizing high-performing campaigns and automations

- Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and translate it into actionable strategies

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable

- Strong communication skills with the ability to provide clear updates and ask thoughtful questions



DESIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

- Experience with retention marketing in eCommerce or DTC brands

- Familiarity with SMS and/or Wallet (ePass) marketing campaigns

- Basic design awareness and experience working with templates or tools like Figma or Canva

- Experience in regulated industries (e.g., cannabis is a plus, but not required)



COMPENSATION

$500-$900 starting depending on experience.



SCHEDULE

- 8 hour shift, Monday to Friday, 7:00am to 4:00pm Philippine Time.

- Minimal overtime during weekdays and weekends will be expected as part of salary



Dispenza is proud to be an equal opportunity employer committed to a diverse and inclusive work environment. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, wordpressage, marital status, disability, veteran status or any other basis protected by law.



HOW TO APPLY

Please fill out the following form in order for your application to be considered: 



Good luck!

We will provide SOPs and structure, but you must be able to figure out the “how” — whether that’s resolving issues independently or building simple systems (people + process) to prevent them from happening again.

This role is best suited for someone who takes ownership, thinks critically, and improves operations—not just follows instructions. 

-Top performers in this role are compensated above market and given increasing ownership as we scale.

Key Responsibilities:

Manage guest communication across Airbnb, VRBO, Booking, and direct bookings

Requirements:

Weekend coverage required (especially Sun/Mon mornings)

title: Sales & Operations Manager
description:
Company: The Everyday Cleaners, Seattle, WA. YOUR JOB HUNT STOPS HERE! This will be like no other place you have ever worked before. 



This is not your typical virtual assistant role...



This is an opportunity to become a key operator inside a fast-growing cleaning company.

We’re not just looking for someone to “help out.”

We’re looking for someone who wants to own results, make money, and grow with the business.



If you perform, you will be rewarded. Simple as that.



Who are we?



We are The Everyday Cleaners, a House Cleaning Company based out of Seattle, WA, USA. We coordinate cleaning jobs between our customers and our team of cleaners.

Seeking our next A+ Tea
mber.



Who are we looking for?



We are seeking an experienced Sales & Operations Manager to join our team. We want someone who is goal-oriented, and hungry for success. This role offers an opportunity to level up your career and skillset, with a focus on continuous learning and improvement. Ideally you speak strong English, and have previous Sales & Operations Manager experience.



Why should you work here?



This is a massive opportunity to start working for a company right before it gets HUGE.

This is an exciting place to work where not only do you get a fully remote position, but there is ample opportunity for growth and Career Advancement.



Starting Pay:



$125 USD per week

20 Hours per week (Wednesday - Sunday PST)

5 hours per day



Responsibilities:

-Closing inbound calls and convert leads into booked jobs

-Cold call businesses, property managers, and real estate agents 

-Assigning cleans with cleaners 

-Handling clean operations (dispatching cleaners, confirmations, bookings, etc.)

-Track leads, conversations, and deals in our system



Requirements:

- Prior experience as a Sales & Operations Manager for a Cleaning Company. 

- Good personality and ability to work independently.

- Strong communication and organizational skills.

- Strong english 

- Stable internet connection and reliable laptop/PC.



How to Apply:

Please message your resume via OnlinejobsPh

title: Virtual Assistant — Creator Outreach & Social Media
description:
We’re a growing e-commerce company that partners with online content creators to develop and sell custom branded products. We’re looking for a social media-savvy VA who knows how to find the right creators and start real conversations with them.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Finding and connecting with content creators on X 
) and other platforms to introduce our partnership model. This includes researching and identifying high-potential creators, understanding what makes them tick, crafting personalized DMs that actually get responses, managing leads in our CRM, and continuously refining your approach based on what’s working.



Who You Are:

 • You live on X 
) and understand creator culture — you know who’s growing, who’s engaged, and how to get noticed in a crowded inbox

 • You’re a strong researcher who can quickly evaluate whether a creator is a good fit and tailor your outreach accordingly

 • Your written English is excellent and your DMs feel natural, not scripted or salesy

 • You work independently. When something isn’t working, you try a different approach before asking what to do

 • You’re comfortable working with adult content



Details:

 • Competitive base pay plus generous monthly bonuses based on conversions

 • Long-term role with room to grow



Interested?

Send us a message telling us why you’d be great at this — not a copy-paste resume. We want to hear how you think about finding creators and getting their attention.

title: VSL Video Editor - Ecom Direct Response - Full Time
description:
Hi there,



We are a large eCommerce company looking to hire video editors. If you'd like to apply for this position, we kindly ask you to complete a test. NOTE: If your English is not at least an 8/10 fluency, this position is not for you. Strong English comprehension (both written and spoken is a requirement for this role).



This test is designed to evaluate your editing skills, attention to detail, and creative decision-making in a real-world scenario.



Compensation for this role is anywhere between $800 - $1,500 USD/mo, depending on experience and level of editing. We are looking for top tier talent. If that’s you, keep reading.



Test Overview

Use the following raw assets (footage, voiceover, and/or script) to make your ad HERE: 



Your task is to create a 60-second UGC/VSL video ad.



What We’re Looking For

• Strong hook and engaging first 3–5 seconds.

• Clean, natural pacing (especially voiceover timing & natural sound)

• Effective use of B-roll (sourced or generated if needed)

• Clear, well-timed captions/subtitles (no errors)

• Smooth flow and overall viewer retention



Creative Freedom

• Animations, callouts, transitions, sound effects, etc. are highly encouraged 

• Feel free to source relevant B-roll through the internet (YouTube, TikTok, Pinterest, etc.)

• Use AI tools to generate supporting visuals



We encourage resourcefulness, as this reflects real working conditions.



Deadline

Please submit your completed video on or before MONDAY, APRIL 13, 11:30am EST



Submission Instructions

Please submit final video file (MP4 format) + any hook iterations to by doing the following:

Upload your completed video to a google drive link and share the link with 

 
 the link + send your PayPal or Wise handle for payment

Make sure anyone with the link can view the folder/ads so we can critique them



Important Notes

• Attached are the assets (script, UGC actress, sample winning ad for your reference) needed here: 



• Ensure there are no spelling, timing, or audio issues

• Pay close attention to details; this is a key factor in our evaluation

• Late submissions may not be considered.

title: Video Editor — Part-time, Remote
description:
We're looking for a video editor to join our team full-time, working 100% remotely. You don't need years of experience — what matters most is that you have a good eye, a feel for pacing, and that you take deadlines seriously.



What you'll be doing

You'll be editing content primarily for YouTube, including sit-down videos, as well as short-form content for social media and other formats. You'll work from briefings, collaborate with the creative team, and manage your own schedule to consistently deliver on time.



What we're looking for

Basic knowledge of editing tools like Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, or similar. A good sense of rhythm, visual storytelling, and attention to detail. Self-motivated and organised enough to work independently in a remote setup. Meeting deadlines is non-negotiable. A portfolio or work samples are required — personal or school projects are welcome. Professional experience is a plus, but not a must. Attitude matters more.



What we offer

100% remote work, a stable full-time contract, flexible schedule, and a team where you can grow and develop your skills.

title: GoHighLevel CRM Builder — Real Estate and Mortgage Advisor System
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

I am a real estate broker and mortgage advisor in Chicago. I need a skilled GoHighLevel (GHL) VA to build a complete CRM system from scratch. Everything is fully documented — you are building from written instructions, not creating strategy.



This is a project-based engagement estimated at 130–180 hours over 4 weeks. If the build is clean and you work well independently, there is ongoing maintenance work available after the project.



WHAT YOU WILL BUILD

— 18 sales pipelines with exact stage names (all documented)

— 60+ tag library entered exactly as specified

— 50+
 and SMS sequences (all copy written word for word — you enter it)

— Full workflow automation map — tags trigger sequences automatically

— ManyChat integration: 5 lead qualification flows with complete scripts

— GHL AI bot: 3 workflows (after-hours, missed call, 45-minute gap)

— BombBomb video tool connected to GHL

— All action-based automation rules (reply, book, close, bounce, DNC)



EVERYTHING IS PROVIDED

You will receive complete PDF documentation for every component of this system. Every
 is written. Every sequence is mapped. Every tag is named. Your job is accurate entry and configuration — not creative work.



HOW THE BUILD WORKS

Phase 1 (Days 1–5): Foundation — pipelines, tags, calendar, phone, signature

Phase 2 (Days 6–18): All sequences and automation triggers

Phase 3 (Days 19–26): ManyChat, GHL bot, BombBomb, integrations



I verify the work at the end of each phase before you proceed. Nothing moves forward until the current phase is confirmed correct.



REQUIREMENTS

— Proven GoHighLevel experience — you must be able to show me a GHL sub-account you have built

— Ability to follow written documentation exactly without improvising

— Strong attention to detail — one wrong tag name breaks an automation

— Available for a daily 10-minute check-in during the build (US Central Time morning preferred)

— Fluent written English for communication



NICE TO HAVE

— ManyChat experience

— Real estate or mortgage VA background



RATE

$8–$15/hour depending on experience. Estimated 130–180 hours total.



TO APPLY

Please send: (1) A screenshot or short video of a GHL sub-account you have built, (2) Your answer to this question: What is the difference between a GHL workflow trigger and a pipeline stage action? Applications without both will not be reviewed.

title: SEO Content Specialist (Blog Writer & On-Page SEO Manager)
description:
Role Overview



We’re looking for a detail-oriented SEO Content Specialist to support our growing client portfolio at Warren Digital. This role focuses on publishing and optimising blog content for SEO — not creating strategy.



You’ll be responsible for executing clearly defined SEO tasks to improve rankings, internal linking, and overall on-page performance across client sites.



Note: This is an execution-focused role. No strategy creation is required.



Key Responsibilities

Content Publishing & Optimisation

Upload and publish blog content across client websites (primarily WordPress or similar CMS)

Format content for readability (headings, spacing, lists, etc.)

Add and optimise images (including generating AI images when required)

Ensure all blogs meet SEO best practices before publishing

On-Page SEO Execution

Write and optimise:

Meta titles & descriptions

H1–H3 structure

Image alt text

URL slugs

Implement schema markup (Article, FAQ, etc.)

Apply E-E-A-T principles (Experience, Expertise, Authority, Trust)

Ensure proper keyword placement and density

Internal Linking

Add relevant internal links across blogs and service pages

Identify linking opportunities to improve site structure and SEO authority

Content Enhancement

Improve existing blog posts with:

Updated formatting

Better keyword targeting

Additional internal links

Image enhancements

EEAT improvements (author signals, credibility, trust elements)

Requirements

Proven experience in SEO content publishing

Strong understanding of:

On-page SEO

Meta tags & schema markup

Internal linking strategies

E-E-A-T principles

Experience with CMS platforms (WordPress preferred)

Ability to generate or source relevant images (AI tools like Midjourney, DALL·E, etc. are a plus)

High attention to detail and consistency

Nice to Have

Experience with SurferSEO, Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar tools

Basic understanding of technical SEO

Copywriting skills for conversion-focused content

Experience developing AI prompts for content and meta tag generation

Compensation

$5 USD per hour

Ongoing work for the right candidate

Application Requirements



To be considered, please submit:



1. 3-Minute Loom Video



Explain:



Your experience with SEO content publishing

Your process for optimising a blog post

Tools you use

2. Practical Test Task



Visit: 



Provide a short audit outlining:



5 specific things you would do to improve the site’s SEO, for example:



Content improvements

Internal linking opportunities

On-page SEO fixes

Technical or UX suggestions

Blog/content strategy ideas



(Be specific — we’re looking for actionable insights, not generic advice.)

title: SDR / Recruiter
description:
Sales Development Representative (SDR) — Remote | TALENTD Recruitment

Location: Remote Aus and US hours 

Employment Type: Full-time



About TALENTD

TALENTD is a Sydney-based specialist recruitment agency focused exclusively on digital marketing, eCommerce, and performance marketing talent across Australia. We work with some of the country's most exciting consumer brands — from fast-growing DTC startups to established retail names — and we're known for doing recruitment properly: no spray and pray, just genuine expertise and long-term relationships.



As we grow, we're looking for a driven SDR to join the team remotely and help us open doors with new clients across Australia and USA .



The Role

This is a business development-focused role sitting at the front end of our sales process. You'll be responsible for identifying and engaging prospective clients — primarily eCommerce, fashion, FMCG, and retail brands — and generating qualified conversations for our senior consultants to close.



You won't be cold calling blindly. You'll have a strong brand behind you, a clear ICP, and a team that will invest in your development.



Day to day, you'll be:



Prospecting and engaging potential clients via LinkedIn,
, and phone - USING SOURCEWHALE

Researching target brands and identifying the right hiring decision-makers

Use Claud to write and send outreach sequences that are thoughtful, not templated

Qualifying inbound leads and booking discovery calls

Maintaining accurate pipeline records and reporting on activity

Collaborating closely with the consulting team to refine messaging and targeting





About You

Recruitment experience preferred not essential, but you do need to be someone who gets a buzz from starting conversations and building pipeline. You're organised, self-motivated, and comfortable working independently in a remote environment.



1–3 years' experience in a Sales focused recruitment job, BDR, SDR, or sales/outreach-focused role

Strong written communication — you can craft a message that actually gets a reply

Confident using LinkedIn as a prospecting tool

Comfortable with outbound outreach 
 and phone) MUST BE HAPPY PITCHING IN ENGLISH 

Curious about brands, marketing, and eCommerce — you'll be talking to people who live and breathe it

Experience with
 automation platforms such as SourceWhale 





Why Join TALENTD?



Fully remote — work from wherever you do your best work

A niche agency with a genuine reputation in a market you can learn quickly

Clear progression path as the business grows

Supportive team culture with real investment in your development

Commission structure on top of your base

title: Paid Media Analyst
description:
WHO WE ARE



Kimura Worldwide is a digital advertising agency specializing in paid media for e-commerce, home services, and coaching businesses. Our mission is to run paid media that wins, using tested strategies built from years of experience and measured by results, not activity.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We're looking for a full-time Paid Media Analyst to support campaign execution and reporting across Google and Meta. Your job is to keep accounts healthy, data clean, and clients informed.



We currently manage paid media across a growing roster of clients. We are a lean team handling campaign builds, optimizations, and reporting while balancing client communication and strategy work. We need you to come in and own the execution layer so the senior team can stay focused on strategy.



You'll report directly to Jeff (that's me), and escalate anything outside your scope as needed. We work async-first with a weekly Google Meets sync. Philippine business hours are fine, though we will align on a standing meeting time that works for both sides.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Your job will be to use your past experience to:



- Monitor and manage campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager on a daily basis

- Pull performance reports and flag anomalies, pacing issues, or anything that needs attention

- Execute campaign optimizations ( bid adjustments, budget pacing, audience updates, and ad copy rotations)

- Support campaign builds according to established SOPs

- Maintain accurate campaign data and naming structure across all active accounts

- Update and maintain client reporting dashboards in Looker Studio

- Communicate campaign status and updates clearly in writing, without needing to be prompted

- Log tasks and update project status in Asana

- Refine or document processes in Notion as needed

- Escalate anything outside your scope to the senior strategist promptly and with context

- Support the team with other campaign-related tasks as needed



EXPERIENCE



We care more about skill level than years on a resume, but we expect at least 2 years of hands-on experience running paid media campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager.



You're comfortable communicating directly with senior leadership, flagging performance issues before they're asked about, and pushing back if something doesn't look right. We want someone who has opinions and isn't afraid to share them.



You know your way around campaign builds, bid management, and performance reporting without needing your hand held. You're diligent, organized, and default to over-communicating rather than going quiet.

You're also comfortable working inside tools like Asana, Notion, Google Drive, Google Meets and Slack as part of your daily workflow.



HOW WE WILL HELP YOU SUCCEED



We want you to succeed here. We will get you fully up to speed on our systems, clients, and processes so you can hit the ground running. 



We're not here to teach you paid media, your experience covers that. What we will do is give you the context you need to apply your skills in the right direction.



We will also invest in your growth. That means access to training resources, honest feedback, and a team that actually listens. We're humans first, colleagues second.



EMPLOYMENT TYPE



This is a full-time role. We're not looking for an agency.



Please begin your cover letter with the name of one of the case studies featured in our online portfolio at 
/our-work .



APPLY HERE: 
/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc6oOAKQ44xxMvdvXKxijIqA-LPRwypVAgq_GOimP0Vb7Xr2Q/viewform

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (CRM + Follow-Up Specialist)
description:
I am a Real Estate Broker looking for a reliable and detail-oriented assistant to help manage my leads and follow-up system.



This is a structured role, not a creative one.

You will be responsible for keeping my pipeline organized and making sure no lead is missed.





Your Responsibilities

 • Enter new leads into CRM

 • Send follow-up messages (templates provided)

 • Track conversations and update statuses

 • Ensure every lead has a next follow-up

 • Provide a short daily report





Who This Role Is For



You are a good fit if you:

 • Follow instructions exactly

 • Are organized and consistent

 • Prefer clear systems over guessing

 • Communicate clearly in writing





Who This Role Is NOT For



This is NOT for you if you:

 • Prefer creative or marketing work

 • Need constant supervision

 • Do not like repetitive tasks

 • Miss small details





Important Instructions (Read Carefully)



To apply, you must do ALL of the following:

 1. Start your message with the word READY

 2. Answer this question clearly:



“If I give you 5 new leads today, what steps would you take to follow up and track them?”



 3. Keep your answer simple and structured (bullet points preferred)





Hours & Pay

 • Part-time (10–20 hours/week)

 • Long-term opportunity

 • Pay based on experience





Final Note



I am looking for someone reliable who can follow a system and execute daily tasks consistently.



If you are organized and dependable, this will be a long-term position.

nts (hooks) in longer clips

nts

title: Creative Strategist (Meta Ads / UGC)
description:
Creative Strategist (Meta Ads & UGC)



We’re hiring a Creative Strategist (Meta Ads & UGC)  to help us scale our paid creative output for one of our ecommerce brands.



This role sits between creative strategy and execution. You will research winning ad concepts, identify ideas worth testing for our brand, adapt and write scripts, prepare voiceover and soundtrack drafts, create clear briefs for editors, and coordinate creator content production.



We’re looking for someone with strong creative taste, Meta ad understanding, good written English, and solid execution skills.



What You’ll Own



1. Creative Research & Strategy Support



You will research competitor and adjacent-brand ads, identify concepts and scripts that could work for our brand, and help build a clear pipeline of ideas worth testing. You should be able to recognize strong hooks, understand what makes an ad compelling, and think in terms of “same but different” rather than just copying what already exists.



2. Script Development



You will adapt winning concepts to our brand, write new scripts when needed, and create multiple hook variations for each concept. You should understand how to write for paid social, especially Meta, and know the difference between writing something that sounds good and writing something that is designed to convert.



3. Creative Assembly & Briefing



You will generate voiceovers, pair them with music, and assemble rough audio drafts that can be used for production. You will also turn concepts into clear, structured Notion briefs for editors, including line-by-line shot guidance, references, and relevant asset links. You should have enough editing sense to understand rhythm, pacing, and how a creative should come together.



4. Creator Coordination



You will help source creators for content batches following our SOPs, support outreach and follow-up, keep communication organized, and make sure deliverables are collected and stored properly. You should be comfortable coordinating moving parts, tracking progress, and helping maintain a reliable flow of fresh creator content.



Expected Deliverables :



The role is designed to support a consistent paid creative testing pipeline by following SOPs. The expected output includes:



- Consistent production of new video briefs (8 per month to start)

- Script development, voiceover generation, ongoing research

- 1 creator batch every 1–2 months, typically around 5 creators

- Creative Strategy research



What We’re Looking For



You are likely a strong fit if you have experience working on Meta creatives for ecommerce brands and understand how paid social ads are structured to perform.



You should have:



- Experience with Meta /
 ad creatives

- strong understanding of hooks, angles, and direct-response creative

- good written English

- the ability to identify winning concepts and adapt them to a brand

- basic to strong editing skills

- Experience in following SOPs

- a good sense of rhythm, pacing, and creative flow

- strong organization and attention to detail

- the ability to turn ideas into clean, actionable briefs

- experience in DTC / ecommerce



Nice to Have



experience using DaVinci Resolve

experience with 11Labs or other voiceover tools

experience working with UGC creators / influencer coordination

experience building briefs in Notion



Payment



This role will start part-time (4 days a week, Monday to Thursday) moving toward full-time.

Compensation will depend on experience and proof of past results, but our initial target range is to start around $8/hour - $1024/month to start, with room to grow for the right person as results and responsibilities expand.



How to Apply



Please include:

a short note on your experience with Meta ad creatives

examples of ecommerce creative work you’ve been involved in

any relevant scriptwriting, creative strategy, editing, or briefing experience

tools you’ve used (for example: DaVinci, 11Labs, Notion, etc.)

title: Executive Operations Manager for Founder-Led Beauty, Fashion & Lifestyle Brand
description:
Job Type



Part-Time, Remote



Hours



Approximately 2.5 to 4 hours per day, Monday through Friday



Compensation



Based on experience



About the Brand



Tiff Benson is a founder-led beauty, fragrance, fashion, and lifestyle brand with a strong editorial point of view and a growing digital presence across content, publishing, partnerships, and brand-building platforms. The business is entering a stage where stronger operational support is needed to maintain excellence, improve workflow, and support continued growth.



We are seeking an experienced Executive Operations Manager to help build and maintain the systems, processes, and operational structure that support a high-level founder and brand ecosystem.



About the Role



This role is for someone with proven experience supporting founder-level, executive-level, or C-suite talent, and who understands how to create structure behind a fast-moving brand and business.



The Executive Operations Manager will serve as a key operational partner, helping translate vision into process, building clear SOPs and workflows, managing priorities, and overseeing task flow across multiple areas of the business. This person should be highly organized, exceptionally detail-oriented, and comfortable supporting a founder-facing environment where polish, discretion, and follow-through matter.



The ideal candidate has real experience not only assisting at a high level, but also managing others, quality-checking work, creating systems, and ensuring work moves through the business efficiently and correctly.



Key Responsibilities

 • Build, document, and maintain SOPs for recurring tasks, workflows, and internal processes

 • Create structure around day-to-day business operations so work is organized, clear, and easy to execute

 • Translate verbal direction, voice notes, Loom recordings, and founder guidance into actionable workflows and next steps

 • Oversee task flow across tea
mbers and ensure assignments are completed accurately and on time

 • Review, quality-check, and organize work before it is escalated for founder review

 • Help manage internal operations across content support, publishing support, partnerships support, and administrative workflow

 • Maintain project boards, trackers, task lists, and weekly priority overviews

 • Improve handoff systems so work is delivered cleanly from one stage to the next

 • Identify inefficiencies and proactively recommend stronger operational solutions

 • Ensure timelines, deadlines, and follow-ups are properly managed

 • Support a high standard of professionalism, organization, and consistency across the business

 • Help create an operational environment that allows the founder to stay focused on high-level creative, strategic, and brand-facing work



What We’re Looking For



The right person for this role is not simply task-oriented. They are operationally minded.



They know how to:

 • create structure

 • think ahead

 • manage moving parts

 • improve process

 • organize people and priorities

 • uphold standards

 • reduce friction

 • support executive-level workflow with maturity and discretion



This person should be comfortable acting as a strong second-in-command on the operational side of the business.



Required Experience

 • Proven experience supporting a founder, entrepreneur, executive, or C-suite professional

 • Proven experience creating SOPs, workflow systems, documentation, and internal process structure

 • Proven experience managing tasks across multiple functions or tea
mbers

 • Experience reviewing work for quality, accuracy, and completeness before final review

 • Strong background in operations, executive assistance, project coordination, team coordination, or workflow management

 • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

 • Strong judgment, professionalism, and discretion

 • Ability to work independently and maintain a high level of follow-through



Preferred Experience

 • Experience supporting a creator, personal brand, media brand, beauty brand, fashion brand, or founder-led business

 • Experience working with remote teams or distributed contractors

 • Familiarity with publishing workflows, content operations, or brand partnerships support

 • Experience helping build internal structure during a growth phase



Tools and Platforms



Helpful experience includes:

 • Google Drive

 • Gmail

 • Notion

 • Trello

 • ClickUp

 • Asana

 • Loom

 • Canva



Experience with Instagram, Substack, and founder-led digital business workflows is a plus.



What Success Looks Like in This Role

 • Internal systems are clearly documented and easy to follow

 • Tasks move through the business with less friction and stronger accountability

 • Tea
mbers have greater clarity around responsibilities and handoffs

 • Work is reviewed and cleaned up before it reaches the founder

 • Operational standards remain high as the business grows

 • The founder is able to stay focused on creative direction, strategy, and high-value decision-making



Ideal Candidate Profile



You are:

 • highly detail-oriented

 • process-driven

 • calm under pressure

 • proactive

 • organized

 • dependable

 • professional

 • experienced in executive-level support

 • confident managing workflow behind the scenes



You understand how to support a high-performing founder without creating unnecessary noise. You are thoughtful, resourceful, and know how to keep operations moving at a high standard.



To Apply



Please send:

 1. A short introduction about your background

 2. Details on your experience supporting founder-level, executive-level, or C-suite talent

 3. Examples of SOPs, workflows, or systems you have created

 4. Any experience managing others, reviewing work, or overseeing team task flow

 5. A list of tools and platforms you are comfortable using

 6. Why you believe you would be a strong fit for this role

title: AI Automation & CRM Specialist (Zapier + HubSpot + GPT) – Build a Sales System

title: Cold Calling Closer for B2B Solar Lead Generation (Commission-Based, Remote))
description:
SolarBridge is a fast-growing B2B lead generation company helping solar installation companies across the United States get exclusive, qualified homeowner leads. We're looking for a hungry, confident cold caller who can CLOSE DEALS on the phone — not just book appointments.



?????????????????????????????????????????



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Make 100+ outbound calls per day to solar installation company owners, VPs of Sales, and decision-makers across the US

- Qualify prospects using our proven script (Are they buying leads? What's their volume? Who's the decision-maker?)

- PITCH and CLOSE them on the phone (we provide the script, you execute)

- Book qualified prospects for a 5-minute "contract review call" with our founder (for hot leads you've already closed)

- Track all calls and outcomes in our CRM (simple Google Sheets — we'll train you)

- Provide daily activity reports: calls made, conversations had, deals closed



This is NOT just an appointment-setting role. You will be expected to handle objections, pitch the value, and ask for the sale on every call.



????????????????????????????????????????



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



REQUIRED:

? Excellent English (US accent strongly preferred) — you'll be calling American business owners, so clear, confident, professional communication is ESSENTIAL

? B2B phone sales experience (cold calling, inside sales, or closing experience required — we need a closer, not a beginner)

? Comfortable making 100+ calls per day and hearing "no" without getting discouraged

? Self-motivated and results-driven — you'll work independently with daily check-ins

? Reliable internet (minimum 10 Mbps), quiet workspace, quality headset/microphone

? Available 20 hours/week (4 hours/day, Monday-Friday) during US business hours (9am-5pm EST)



PREFERRED (but not required):

? Experience selling to contractors, home services businesses, or B2B SaaS

? Familiarity with CRM tools (Google Sheets, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

? Track record of hitting sales quotas in previous roles



????????????????????????????????????????



COMPENSATION (PERFORMANCE-BASED)



TRIAL PERIOD (First 14 Days):

- $200 USD paid at end of trial (ONLY if you close 8+ demos/deals)

- $25 USD bonus per additional deal closed beyond 8

- Example: Close 10 deals in trial = $200 base + $50 bonus = $250 total

- If you close fewer than 8 deals, trial ends with no payment (this is a results-only role)



ONGOING EMPLOYMENT (After Passing Trial):

- $350 USD/month base salary

- $25 USD per deal closed (no cap — top performers earn $600-$800/month)

- Minimum 15 deals/month required to maintain employment

- Part-time: 20 hours/week to start

- Potential to move to full-time (40 hrs/week) for top performers



EXAMPLE MONTHLY EARNINGS:

- Close 15 deals/month (minimum) = $350 base + $375 bonuses = $725/month

- Close 20 deals/month = $350 base + $500 bonuses = $850/month

- Close 25 deals/month = $350 base + $625 bonuses = $975/month

- Top performers (30+ deals/month) earn $1,100+/month



Payment via PayPal or Wise or Stripe at the end of each month.



????????????????????????????????????????



TRIAL PERIOD REQUIREMENTS



Your first 14 days are a PERFORMANCE TRIAL. To pass and receive payment:

? Book 8+ qualified deals (installer agrees to move forward, books contract review call)

? Maintain 100 dials/day minimum (we track this)

? Professional communication, positive attitude, coachable mindset



If you hit these benchmarks, you'll transition to ongoing employment with potential for full-time hours.



?? IMPORTANT: This is a commission-based, results-only role. If you do not close at least 8 deals during the 14-day trial, the trial will end and no payment will be made. Only apply if you're confident in your closing ability.



????????????????????????????????????????



TO APPLY (APPLICATIONS WITHOUT THESE WILL BE REJECTED)



1. SHORT INTRODUCTION (5 sentences max):

   • Your name and background

   • Your B2B cold calling/closing experience (specific results if possible — e.g., "closed 20 deals/month at previous role")

   • Why you're the right fit for this role



2. AVAILABILITY:

   • How many hours per week can you work?

   • What hours are you available (include your timezone)?

   • Confirm you can work US business hours (9am-5pm EST)



3. VOICE SAMPLE + OBJECTION HANDLING (REQUIRED):

   Record yourself doing this 60-second role-play:



   Part 1: Read this opening script naturally (like you're on a real call):

   "Hi [Name], this is [Your Name] calling from SolarBridge. We help solar installers across the US get exclusive, qualified homeowner leads at $75 per lead with no long-term contracts. Is lead generation something you're currently focused on at your company?"



   Part 2: Handle this objection (improvise your response):

   The installer says: "We're already working with another lead provider and we're happy with them."



   • Use Vocaroo.com (free, no signup) or Loom to record

   • Paste the link in your application

   • ?? Applications without a voice sample will be automatically rejected



????????????????????????????????????????



WHY JOIN SOLARBRIDGE?



? Work from home with flexible hours

? Unlimited earning potential (no cap on commissions)

? Fast-growing company — top performers will have opportunities to move into leadership roles as we scale

? We provide everything: script, call list, training, CRM access

? You just need to show up, dial, and close



We're hiring IMMEDIATELY and beginning interviews THIS WEEK. Only 1-2 positions available.



Looking forward to working with you!

title: Part-Time Property Specialist
description:
We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented, and proactive Part Time Airbnb Property Specialist based in the Philippines to oversee the daily operations of a short-term rental property. The ideal candidate will ensure exceptional guest experiences, optimize occupancy and revenue, and maintain seamless property operations.

description:
To apply, you must use at least 5 Apply Points (or more if you’re a strong fit). Applications using fewer than 5 points will be ignored

         

Paid weekly or Bi-weekly with the expectation of accomplishing the week’s total workload/quota



Starting at 8 hours per day. 3.5 days per week.



I am creating a small content creation team of 2 video editors/social media managers/virtual assistants. 



1 person will be hired first & the second will be hired 1-2 months later after best practices are established. Eventually, the team can work together d
 their own scheduling for each week.



I have 2 content based brands which need a lot of video editing & short form clipping for marketing.



Brand #1: 
/livejn 

- the current kind of content on that page isn’t a good representation of what you will be asked to edit, but that’s the brand you will be editing for.

- you will be asked to cut daily 3hour-7hour livestreams into short 10-20minute vlogs. These vlog edits will be fairly simple. Only including 
nts featuring high intensity action, emotion, connection or discussion. 

- from these “highlights”, you will be asked to create engaging clips of each 
nt and post these clips on across all social media platforms

- there is also a miscellaneous quota for posting other kinds of related content to foster the most engagement. example: trial reels of previous popular content



Brand #2: 
 

- I am a head coach of this dating company teaching men social & seduction skills.

- I will be recording my coaching sessions to be similarly cut into engaging shortform captions.

- I will also shoot shortform & longform lesson based videos which will need to be cut, edited & posted onto all social media platforms



Primary Skill Required: Vlog-style video editing & high volume posting across all social media platforms (up to 50+ posts per day)

- editing & project sharing on adobe premiere pro. (I can pay for your monthly subscription)

- the most important skill is understanding emotionally impactful & engaging content. I will have 10 years of experience as a content producer. If I can create edits better than what the candidates can produce, they will be released or not considered for employment.



Secondary Skill: Miscellaneous work as a social media manager/virtual assistant to help with each brand’s needs as they arise.



This is what the hiring process will look like:

1. I will review applications. 

2. I will select desired candidates and send them an example vlog of what I’m seeking to create.

3. Selected candidates then should edit an example vlog from a new 3hour-7hour livestream. As well as three 8 second to 30 second shortform trailer edits; ideally deeply moving/engaging. An example will be provided. (You will be paid $20 for this trial)

4. From the work reviewed, I will select whomever seems like the best fit and work is scheduled to begin by April 15th.



Candidate must:

- be fluent in English

- provide examples of their body of  work related to what this job requires 



Please briefly  in your application tell me: 

- whether the $5/hour offered rate is low, normal or high for what you are seeking. 

- what your main passion/hobby in life is

- where do you see yourself professionally in 5 years



If/as the content monetizes well, hourly rates can raise to double or triple over time. 



Warning: My content, topics & sense of humor can often be often extremely crude, offensive & politically incorrect. Whoever applies must be able to either understand or enjoy those instances.

title: Project Assistant
description:
Are you great at communicating with others? Are you meticulous and organized? Let’s team up.



We believe in people. This is why we only work with clients who serve people. From firefighters, to law firms, to suppliers sending life-saving food to kids dying of malnutrition, the work you do will help make the world a better place.



Our team is made up of people who want to do the best work of their life. People who love to learn, challenge themselves, grow and have some fun along the journey. We also care about each other – we support each other in our own personal goals and vision. We are human beings before employees and we love to bring out the best in each other.



Now, ready to learn more about this opening? Buckle up.



If you work here, you’ll be:

- Challenged to do the best work of your life in a supportive environment.

- Become the best communicator you can become (this is the most important thing we do).

- Have the space to ask questions, voice your feedback and make a difference (and be yourself).

- Help drive our projects and tools, participate in stimulating conversations, and grow with like-minded people.



What you could be working on:

- Oversight of our fast growth projects and understanding the nuances

- Communicate status, progress, ensuring "nothing slips through the cracks"

- Build and voice your opinion on key project features

- Communicate and help developers understand various tasks

- Testing new features to ensure it meets project needs

- Research, engaging customers via
/chat, proof reading, copywriting, organizing events, etc



You’ll do well in this job if you:

- Are a master at the English language and care about writing well

- Enjoy using and learning about technology and being helpful

- Enjoy working with people who actually care about what they do and will not let you be lazy or do sloppy work.

- Have an opinion and care about best practices and love learning and creating and building.

- Have grit and determination and are someone who will exceed no matter what gets in your way.

- Are attentive to details.



You probably shouldn’t apply if:

- You’re “just looking for extra money.”

- You like working 5 full-time jobs because all you care about is work.

- You get offended easily and take things personally.

- You are not someone with grit and determination who can persevere while being challenged to do great work.

- You get overwhelmed easily, new habits, new learnings and chat messages.



The interview process:

- Since 99% of our work is done via Slack (we don’t do scheduled calls), the entire interview process will be via
. (With lots of questions, sprinkled with a few voice notes)



If you work here:

- You’ll get 13th month salary, Filipino holidays, unlimited time off (we don’t count sick days), a normal working day schedule (no night shifts, although an early start is preferred for time overlap) with some flexibility, a week off during the holidays in December, and the opportunity to grow and become your best self.



A little more about us:

- We’ve been in business for a decade+. Our teams are remote (mostly in the Philippines). Our longest standing tea
mber has been with us for over 14+ years. We've had people quit smoking on our teams with our help, lose weight, learn a new instrument, speak a new language, and more. We all love what we do.



How to begin

- Your mission, should you choose to accept, is to send us an
 with 3 questions you have about this role. If you’re currently in a full-time role and are looking for something new, we’re open to a transition window. We actually care about your happiness.



NOTE: While we like AI, and we use it in certain circumstances, we ask that no AI be used during communication. Communication is the most important thing we do. If I don't see your natural voice from our first interaction, then you're setting an inaccurate representation of who you are and how you communicate. And when I see that change, it's going to come across as a lack of harmony in how you communicate.

title: Cold Email Marketing Specialist

We are looking for an experienced Cold

What You’ll Be Building

Produces highly personalized
s that feel human-written (not robotic)

Automates fast response handling (within minutes of replies)

Generates consistent B2B leads and booked appointments

Key Responsibilities

Set up and manage cold

Build and maintain strong

(domains, inboxes, warmup, DNS, etc.)

Write and test high-performing cold

Required Skills (Must Have)

Please Include With Your Application

Volume of
s sent

If you know how to get
s delivered, opened, and replied to, we want to work with you.

title: AI Automation & Operations Specialist
description:
We are looking for someone who builds systems using AI — not someone who just uses it.



At Residentas, you will:



+ automate real business processes

+ build AI workflows

+ improve operations across the company



This is not a typical VA role.



If you have already built automations using tools like ChatGPT, Zapier, Make or similar — keep reading.

 

Residentas is an international hospitality company with premium properties in Lisbon and the USA. We are building one of the most AI-integrated operations in the short-term rental space, and we need someone who lives at that frontier with us.

This is not a traditional role. We are not looking for a VA or a marketer or an analyst. We are looking for an AI Generalist -- someone who sees a problem and immediately asks: how do I use AI to solve this better, faster, and at a higher standard than a human team could alone.

 

If you think AI is a tool you use occasionally, this role is not for you. If AI is how you think -- read on.

 

WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:

+ Identifying repetitive or manual processes across our operations and automating them using AI tools and workflows. +Building internal tools, templates and systems using Claude, ChatGPT, Replit or similar platforms. 

+ Supporting our guest experience, listings,
 funnels and market research with AI-generated output that actually meets a luxury brand standard. 

+ Translating business problems into AI prompts, workflows and solutions -- without waiting to be told how. 

+Documenting what you build so the team can use it without you holding their hand. 

 

QUALITIES WE VALUE:

 

--Systems Thinking: You do not just complete tasks. You redesign them.

 

--AI Fluency: Claude, ChatGPT, Replit, Zapier, Make -- you move between tools and you know when to use which.

 

--Judgment: You know when AI output is good enough and when it is not. You do not ship garbage.

 

--Ownership: You treat problems like they are yours to solve.

 

--Integrity: You say what you think, especially when something is not working.

 

REQUIREMENTS:

 

-- You have used AI tools to build or automate something real -- not just write
s. 

-- Strong written English. Your output will represent a premium brand. 

-- Comfortable learning new platforms fast. We move quickly. 

-- Self-directed. You do not need daily instructions to make progress.

 -- Bonus: experience in hospitality, property management or e-commerce operations.

 

WHAT WILL DISQUALIFY YOU IMMEDIATELY:

 

+Applying without examples of real AI-assisted work you have produced.

+Generic applications that do not follow the instructions below.

+Treating AI as a shortcut rather than a standard-raiser.

 

THE BENEFITS:

 

+Starting pay: 30,000 PHP per month.

 

+100% Remote work.

 

+Direct line to the founder from day one.

 

+You will be building systems that define how this company operates for years.

 

+You will work with tools and methods most companies will not adopt for years.

 

HOW TO APPLY:

Send me a direct message here on OnlineJobs. In the subject line, include the code AG1. I will then send you a link to our official application form. On that form, in the extra comments field, write AG1.

We especially welcome fresh graduates from top Philippine universities such as UP, Ateneo, De La Salle, and UST. Applicants with backgrounds in biology, medicine, pharmacy, nursing, nutrition, public health, or other life science fields are highly preferred.



What You’ll Do

Graduates from top Philippine universities are strongly preferred

Preferred Qualifications

Experience using
,
, Instagram, TikTok, Reddit,
, or online communities for customer development
