title: Senior Operations Manager
description:
About the Company



We are a done-for-you Airbnb arbitrage company. We help clients build profitable short-term rental

portfolios without owning property — we handle everything from sourcing and leasing units to

furnishing, listing, and managing them on their behalf. We are a fast-growing team with a high-volume

sales operation and a fulfillment team responsible for delivering results to clients.



About the Role



We are looking for a sharp, proactive Senior Operations Manager to own our day-to-day operations.

You will be the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks — so that the owner doesn't

have to.

You will manage a data entry VA, coordinate between our sales team and fulfillment team, QA reports

and agreements, build systems and automations, and ensure that every operational task gets done

without being asked twice. If you need to be told to follow up on something,  this is not the right role for

you. If you solve problems before they become fires, this is exactly the right role.



What You'll Own Day-to-Day



• Review daily sales and marketing reports for accuracy before they reach the owner. Flag and fix

discrepancies before they're reported.

• Monitor end-of-day closer reports. If a closer hasn't submitted or something looks off, investigate

independently (check Zoom recordings, CRM, etc.) before escalating.

• Audit every new client agreement to confirm the correct version was signed. If an agreement is

missing or incorrect, chase it to completion with the closer — without involving the owner.

• Coordinate AR and payment collection: track upcoming client payments, confirm billing details

with the sales team, ensure payments are run on schedule, and resolve any blockers

independently.

• Coordinate between the sales team and the fulfillment team on new client onboarding — making

sure every new Airbnb arbitrage client is handed off cleanly with all documents, payments, and

next steps in order.

• Manage and direct the data entry VA: assign tasks clearly, check her work, and correct errors

before they reach leadership.

• Build and document SOPs for recurring processes. Proactively identify gaps and create

solutions.

• Set up and maintain automations using tools like Zapier, Make, or GoHighLevel to reduce

manual work.



You Are the Right Fit If...



• You have 3+ years of experience as a VA, operations coordinator, online business manager, or

similar role for a US/AU/UK-based online business.

• You have managed or supervised at least one other tea
mber.

• You are extremely comfortable with Google Sheets (formulas, data validation, conditional

formatting).

• You have experience with CRM tools, project management platforms, and/or automation tools.

• You are a native or near-native English writer — clear, professional, and direct.

• You don't wait to be told. When you see a problem, you figure out the next step and take it.

• You are available to work EST hours full time 



Nice to Have



• Experience with GoHighLevel, ClickUp, Notion, Slack, or similar tools.

• Background in high-ticket sales, coaching, or consulting businesses.

• Experience building Zapier or Make automations from scratch.



What This Is NOT



• This is not a data entry role. You will manage someone who does data entry.

• This is not a role for someone who needs hand-holding or constant direction.

• This is not part time



Compensation



$1,200 – $1,800 USD/month depending on experience. Performance-based raises available after 90

days. 



How to Apply

fill out this link here->

title: Lead Generation Specialist (High Ownership Role)
description:
We are hiring a Lead Generation Specialist to support a growing plant-based chef business.

This is a high-ownership, strategic role focused entirely on lead generation.

You will be responsible for managing the full lead flow from start to finish, while thinking critically, identifying opportunities, and taking initiative.



Responsibilities

Research and identify qualified, aligned leads

Initiate and manage conversations across platforms

Qualify leads and move them toward booking

Follow up consistently and intentionally

Manage and track all leads inside GoHighLevel CRM

Keep pipelines organized, updated, and moving

Identify gaps, missed opportunities, and areas for improvement



Requirements

Strong, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (non-negotiable)

Proven experience managing the full lead generation cycle

Strong communication, judgment, and decision-making skills

Ability to take ownership without being managed step by step

Experience with outreach, follow-ups, and lead nurturing



How You’ll Work

This role requires someone who can think and operate independently.

You are expected to:

Bring ideas, not just execution

Think through problems and suggest solutions

Take responsibility for results, not just tasks

Communicate clearly and consistently

This role requires an executive-level mindset applied to lead generation, meaning structure, clarity, and proactive thinking in everything you do.



Work Setup

Part-time or full time

Fixed hours with MST overlap

Daily check-ins and end-of-day updates required

Compensation

$8–$12/hour depending on experience

Opportunity to grow into a larger role over time based on performance



To Be Considered

This role requires initiative, attention to detail, and the ability to think independently.

If instructions are not followed exactly, your application will not be reviewed.

Record a short video and answer the following:

1. Introduction

Who you are and what kind of work you’ve done related to lead generation, outreach, or similar roles.

2. Strategy

Based on what you see about Iwacu Flavors, how would you approach lead generation for this business?

Be specific.

3. Communication

What is your favorite food, and how would you describe it in a way that makes someone want it?



Avoid general answers. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Lead Manager for REI Seller Leads | Follow-Up, CRM, Appointment Setting

We are hiring a Lead Manager for our real estate acquisitions business.

respond quickly to new seller leads

follow up consistently

identify seller motivation

You are the buffer between junk and gold.

strong CRM discipline

clean notes

quality appointments without overqualifying everything



You will be speaking with seller leads and identifying the 4 pillars of the deal:



why

timeline

repairs

price

kept appointments

contracts sourced from your pipeline

note quality

speed to lead

follow-up consistency



Requirements:

reliable internet

CRM experience (GoHighLevel, ReSimpli, or similar)

appointment setting experience

familiarity with wholesaling or off-market acquisitions



To apply, send all of the following:



Your resume

A 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself and explaining your lead management experience

Your timezone and availability during U.S. Eastern hours

A short sample CRM note from this situation:

Seller inherited property, wants to sell in 2 months, roof is old, house needs paint and flooring, wants $180k, brother is involved

Answer these questions:

What is the difference between a lead manager and an acquisitions closer?

A seller says, “I’m not ready for an offer yet, but I might sell in the next 30–60 days.” What would you do next?

Applications missing any of the above will be rejected.

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Full Stack AI Developer

About Cynergists: Cynergists builds production-grade AI Agents that automate real business operations. We design systems that replace manual workflows, eliminate bottlenecks, and scale execution without adding headcount. We do not sell ideas, prompts, or experiments. We deploy working infrastructure. Our focus is simple: intelligent automation that ships, runs, and delivers measurable outcomes.

The Role

We are looking for a highly capable Full Stack AI Developer who excels at building and deploying scalable, front-to-back web applications and autonomous AI agents.

In this role, you will be the architectural bridge between our user-facing interfaces and our backend AI operations. You will build lightning-fast frontends using React and Vite, manage robust databases with Supabase, and orchestrate complex, autonomous AI workflows using n8n. If you are a builder who thrives on shipping real-world AI infrastructure and taking total ownership of your stack, we want you on our team.

Must Haves & Key Responsibilities

Front-End Engineering: Proven experience building highly responsive, production-ready interfaces using React and Vite. You build clean, fast, and maintainable user experiences.

Backend & Database Ownership: Hands-on experience architecting and managing databases using Supabase. You understand schema design, authentication, and secure data handling.

Workflow Orchestration: Deep tactical knowledge of n8n. You will design, build, and deploy complex AI workflows that connect our internal tools, external APIs, and LLMs.

AI Agent Construction: You don't just use AI; you build it. You have demonstrable experience constructing, prompting, and deploying autonomous AI Agents to solve specific operational bottlenecks.

Rapid Prototyping: Experience using Lovable to accelerate front-end development and iterate quickly on user interfaces.

Shipping Mentality: You push code through GitHub with proper reviews. You ship working systems weekly, take ownership of outcomes, and are comfortable being accountable for what runs in production.

Requirements

Demonstrable proficiency in React, Vite, Supabase, and n8n.

Experience building and deploying functional AI Agents.

Comfort working in GitHub using branching, pull requests, and code reviews.

Ability to manage work with clear tickets, acceptance criteria, and milestones.

Clear written and verbal communication.

Availability to work with consistent overlap during US business hours.

A Day in the Life

Turn loosely defined operational problems into working AI-driven workflows and sleek user interfaces.

Design and build AI agents that handle intake, processing, storage, notifications, and reporting.

Write clean, production-grade frontend code using React and Vite.

Manage backend data structures and user authentication flows via Supabase.

Map out and deploy complex automation sequences within n8n.

Push code through GitHub and deliver predictable, demoable outcomes.

About the Team Cynergists is a small, senior, execution-first team. There are no passengers here. Everyone builds, ships, and owns what they deploy. We value:

Direct communication

Reliability over cleverness

Working systems over theoretical ones

Accountability without micromanagement

If you are tired of half-built ideas and want to ship AI systems that actually work, you will fit in.

To Apply Send the following to 

Your availability during US hours and whether you want part-time or full-time work.

One to three examples of systems or AI Agents you have shipped (GitHub links, demos, walkthroughs, or screenshots).

A brief explanation of how you would architect a solution utilizing React, Supabase, and n8n.

title: Short Form Video Editor (CapCut) – Daily Simple Editing Work
description:
I am looking for a video editor to edit short form videos for me every day using CapCut.



The editing style is very simple and repeatable. The work is just taking the raw video, cutting out mistakes, removing dead space, and making the video flow smoothly.



You will be editing talking head style videos for social media. A lot of the time I will say the same line multiple times, so your job is to choose the last time I used each line, cut out the dead space in between, and slightly overlap the audio so they seem together smoothly.



You will:



Download raw videos from Google Drive

Import them into CapCut

Cut out repeated takes, mistakes, pauses, and dead space

Make the cuts smooth and natural

Sometimes add simple captions in CapCut

Occasionally do small zoom ins or zoom outs if asked

Export the finished video

Upload the final version back to Google Drive with the correct file name



I will give you:



A Loom training video

Clear instructions

Example videos



Pay:

$300/month to start

Pay can increase if you do well and are consistent



Work:

4 to 8 hours per day depending on speed and workload

8 to 16 videos per day



Requirements:



Must know how to use CapCut

Must be detail oriented and able to follow instructions closely

Must not skip lines, leave in repeated lines, or leave awkward pauses in videos

Must be available for communication during US Eastern Time hours

Must be able to work daily and be consistent



To apply:



Start your message with the word EDITOR

Send 2 short form videos you have edited before using CapCut

Tell me what experience you have with video editing

Tell me if you can work daily



I am looking for someone reliable who can keep the editing clean, smooth, and consistent every day.

— Solid experience with API integrations and working with third-party services

— Able to read, refine, and improve existing codebases — not just build from scratch

— Open to working with AI coding tools (training provided)

— Self-starter who can take a brief and deliver without hand-holding

— Fast. We ship in hours, not weeks.



This is a part-time role — 3 hours per day, Monday to Friday. Work is task-based. You will receive clear daily deliverables. If you finish early, you get the next task.



You will be working directly with the founder. No middle management, no meetings, no bureaucracy. Just build and ship.



To apply: Send a short message explaining your web development experience and a link to anything you have shipped. No cover letter essays — keep it brief.

title: Bilingual Spanish-English Virtual Assistant for Calls, Sales, and Customer Support
description:
**Bilingual Spanish-English Virtual Assistant for Sales and Customer Calls**



We are looking for a **high-quality bilingual virtual assistant** with strong **English and Spanish communication skills** to join our team. This is a phone and customer support role for a flower business, and we are looking for someone who is professional, friendly, persuasive, and good at helping customers place orders.



This is not just a basic support role. We want someone who can **answer calls, guide customers, recommend products, help close sales, and create a great customer experience**.



We are hiring for both **part-time and full-time positions**.



**What You’ll Do:**



* Answer inbound customer calls in English and Spanish

* Help customers with product questions, pricing, pickup, and delivery

* Collect order details such as flower count, colors, date, time, and delivery address

* Recommend larger and better arrangements when appropriate

* Send photos or website links to help customers choose

* Provide delivery quotes

* Confirm totals and ask for payment method

* Follow a call script and sales process

* Help recover unhappy customers professionally



**We’re Looking For Someone Who:**



* Speaks excellent English and Spanish

* Sounds natural, clear, and professional on the phone

* Has experience in sales, customer support, or call center work

* Can follow systems and scripts while still sounding human

* Is confident handling calls, texts, and customer objections

* Has strong attention to detail and good energy



**Bonus If You Have:**



* Floral, gifting, retail, or e-commerce experience

* Experience with Dialpad, CRM systems, or order management

* Experience with upselling and closing sales



**Position Details:**



* Remote

* Part-time and full-time available

* Must have reliable internet and a quiet workspace

* Long-term preferred



**Application Instructions:**

To be considered, please send:



* Your resume

* A short voice recording in English

* A short voice recording in Spanish

* A summary of your call center or sales experience

* Your expected pay

title: Appointment Setter (Business Funding) – High Performance Role
description:
About Us

Hungry Wolf Blueprint is a fast-growing business funding company helping entrepreneurs secure capital to start or scale their businesses. Our clients secure anywhere from $50K to $500K+ in funding.



We specialize in:

- 0% Business Credit (bank-issued)

- Business Lines of Credit

- Personal Funding Strategies



We’ve helped hundreds of clients secure funding and are now scaling aggressively.



To achieve this, we need a high-performing Appointment Setter who can consistently generate qualified calls.



The Role

You are the first point of contact with potential clients.



Your job:

- Engage inbound + outbound leads

- Qualify them quickly and effectively

- Book high-quality calls for Funding Advisors



This is not a basic call center role.



You are responsible for:

- Booking qualified appointments that show up

- Filtering out low-quality prospects

- Setting the tone for a high-level client experience



Responsibilities

- Call, text, and follow up with leads

- Qualify leads (credit, income, business status)

- Book and confirm appointments

- Ensure high show rates

- Update CRM (GoHighLevel or similar)

- Hit daily/weekly KPIs



KPIs

- Calls made daily

- Conversations per day

- Appointments booked

- Show rate (%)

- Qualified lead rate



This is a performance-driven role.



Who This Is For

- Experienced appointment setters

- Strong communicators

- Fast responders

- Competitive and results-driven



Who This Is NOT For

- Beginners with no experience

- Script-dependent callers

- Those uncomfortable with objections



Requirements

- Proven appointment setting experience (REQUIRED)

- Experience in business funding or financial services (PREFERRED)

- Strong English communication

- Full-time availability

- Reliable internet and setup



Compensation

- Base: $3/hour

- Bonuses:

  - Per qualified show

  - Per closed deal (optional)



High performers can scale income significantly.



How to Apply

- Subject: APPOINTMENT SETTER

- Attach resume

- Include a short video (1–2 minutes)



Answer:

- Full-time availability?

- Years of experience?

- Experience in funding/financial services?

- Previous companies?

- Greatest strength?

title: Recruiter/Talent Sourcer (2026)
description:
Schedule: Ability to work EST or PST hours.



About Us:

We are a pioneering startup dedicated to transforming the landscape of autism diagnosis through remote evaluations. Our mission is to provide accessible, comprehensive, and accurate autism diagnostic services to individuals and families, regardless of their location. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our innovative team.



Position Overview:

We’re seeking a mission-aligned Recruiter/Talent Sourcer to drive our hiring efforts and attract top-tier clinical and administrative talent. You’ll be the bridge between our team leads and high-potential candidates, helping ensure that every new hire reflects our values of empathy, innovation, and quality care. You will manage the full recruitment lifecycle—from sourcing and screening to interviews and offer negotiation—with a strong emphasis on behavioral health, telehealth, and operational roles.



The Process:

As part of our interview process, you will be asked to give a short presentation, so please apply only if you are comfortable doing this. Since we receive a large number of applications, we’d also like you to include three things in your message:



1. Why this role seems like a good fit for you.

2. A brief overview of your background.

3. The result of subtracting 5 from 17.



Key Responsibilities:

-Lead the recruiting process for non clinical roles

-Assist the recruiting process for clinical roles (e.g., psychologists, speech therapists, care coordinators)

-Collaborate with hiring managers to refine job descriptions and define ideal candidate profiles.

-Source talent via job boards, social platforms, college networks, community outreach and phone communications

-Screen resumes, conduct interviews, and assess cultural fit and qualifications.

-Present qualified candidates to hiring managers in a timely, organized manner.

-Ensure consistent communication with candidates to create a thoughtful, professional experience.

-Maintain accurate applicant tracking data.

-Assist with onboarding and new hire transitions.

-Participate in the development of recruiting strategies and best practices in a startup environment.



Qualifications

-Prior experience in healthcare or clinical recruitment (preferred)

-Strong sourcing skills and familiarity with healthcare licensure types (e.g., psychologists, BCBAs, SLPs, LCSWs)

-Excellent communication and organizational skills

-Resourceful and able to manage multiple openings independently

-Comfortable using ATS systems and recruitment platforms

-Private, professional home office setup

-Experience in a startup or fast-paced environment is a plus



What We Offer

-Competitive compensation

-Flexible remote working opportunities

-A supportive and innovative work environment and the opportunity to make an impact in the field of autism diagnosis

description:
About Us:

We are a pioneering startup dedicated to transforming the landscape of autism diagnosis through remote evaluations. Our mission is to provide accessible, comprehensive, and accurate autism diagnostic services to individuals and families, regardless of their location. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our innovative team.

What We Offer:

+ Competitive compensation

+ Flexible remote work

+ A supportive team and mission-driven environment

+ Growth opportunities – we are growing quickly and always looking to promote top-notch talent to leadership positions



+As part of the interview process, we will expect you to do a small presentation so please only apply if you are able to do a presentation. Also, as we get a lot of interview requests, in your request, please indicate why this would be a good opportunity for you, a little about your background and, most importantly, what is the answer to 3+9. title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Monday through Saturday. Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 9:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500 per month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory and must be completed within 7 days. This deadline is non-negotiable. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one. If onboarding is not completed within 7 days we will not be moving forward.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




  



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Operations Manager - (Pathway to Director of Operations)
description:
About the Company 

Nelson Finance Life LLC (NFL) is a U.S.-based financial consulting and government compliance firm focused on helping businesses navigate complex regulations while building long-term financial stability. We operate in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment and are building systems to scale across compliance consulting, financial services, and government contracting.



About the Role

The CEO will be transitioning into law school in August 2026. This role is critical in helping the company scale by taking ownership of day-to-day operations and building systems that allow the business to run efficiently without constant oversight. This is not a support role. This is a leadership role for someone who wants to grow into a Director of Operations. and take ownership of execution. You will act as the operational bridge between the CEO and the team, ensuring all work is executed efficiently without requiring constant CEO involvement.



Responsibilities

- Manage daily operations and workflows across compliance, proposals, and internal operations.

- Build and document SOPs across all core business functions.

- Implement systems using tools like 
, Google Workspace, and automation platforms.

- Track deadlines, deliverables, and ensure all work is completed on time.

- Run weekly team check-ins and manage remote staff performance.

- Support proposal and revenue pipeline tracking (RFP/RFQ coordination) 

- Hire and manage interns or support staff 

- Create weekly reports and KPI dashboards for the CEO

- Ownership Expectations (Non-Negotiable)

- You are expected to take ownership of tasks and outcomes, not wait for instructions. 

- You proactively identify problems and present solutions. 

- You communicate clearly and early—no silence or delays. 

- You are comfortable making decisions with limited direction



Who You Are 

- Degree preferred but not required. A business or operations background is a plus.

- Experience in operations, startups, or remote team management 

- 5–7+ years in operations, business management, or startup scaling.

- Experience building systems, processes, and team infrastructure with limited oversight

- Strong organizational, communication, and leadership skills.

- Entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to work autonomously.

- Experience with government contracting, compliance, or consulting (preferred).



Work Environment:

- Must be available and responsive during EST working hours (8:00 AM – 1:00 PM EST)

- Fully remote (Philippines-based) 

- Must have reliable internet and dual-monitor setup 

- 6-month probationary period 

- Collaborative, fast-paced, and growth-focused environment



Tech Stack 


, Google Workspace, Slack, QuickBooks, Zapier, Hubstaff, Zoom, ChatGPT, Microsoft Office



Compensation & Growth

- Base: $750/month (25 hours/week) 

- Performance-based bonuses (accuracy, timeliness, execution) 

- Additional bonuses tied to contracts and proposals won 

- Opportunity for a salary increase after 90 days based on performance 

- Clear pathway to Director of Operations with increased compensation and responsibility



Application Instructions

This Role Is NOT For You If:

- You wait for instructions instead of taking initiative.

- You struggle with deadlines or follow-through 

- You prefer constant supervision.

- You avoid problem-solving.



To apply, include the word “NFL OPERATOR” in your application subject line and answer the following questions. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.



- What would you do if you were given a task you did not fully understand? 

- How do you prioritize tasks when everything feels urgent?

- Describe a system or process you built from scratch.

title: Senior Direct Response Video Editor - $2,000-$2,500/mo + Performance Bonuses (Multi 8-Figure DTC Brand)
description:
We're not looking for a video editor.



We're looking for someone who makes people FEEL something in the first 3 seconds of a video. Someone who understands that pacing IS the ad. That silence IS a tool. That the difference between a $20CPA and a $100 CPA is the editor, not the script.



We just proved that with our own data. Same script. Same voiceover. Same everything. Two different editors. One produced a 50% hook rate and $21 cost per acquisition. The other produced $100 CPA on the same words. The editor is the variable. That's why this hire matters more than any other hire we're making right now.



ABOUT US:

We're a multi 8-figure DTC supplement brand based in the US, scaling aggressively on Meta. Our creative team writes scripts that score in the top 1% of direct response copy. We have the words. We need someone who can turn those words into ads that print money.



We're not a startup hoping to figure it out. We have winning ads. We have proven data. We have a creative team with a strategist, copywriters, and a graphic designer. What we need is an editor who can match the energy of what's already winning and help us produce more of it, faster.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

- Editing 2-3 direct response video ads per day (60-120 seconds each)

- Working with AI voiceovers, AI avatars, UGC footage, and B-roll

- Following detailed editor briefs with timestamps, pacing direction, and emotional peak markers

- Studying our winning ads and replicating the exact pacing, energy, and editing style

- Finding and sourcing realistic B-roll from TikTok and AI tools (no generic stock footage)

- Working directly with our creative strategist and copywriter

- QA-ing every frame — if there's a spelling mistake, a bad clip, or the pacing feels off, YOU catch it before it goes live



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU:

- You understand PACING. Not just cuts. You know when to slow down, when to speed up, when to hold a shot, when to let silence do the work.

- You understand STORYTELLING. Every visual supports the voiceover. Every clip change has a reason. Nothing is random.

- You understand EMOTION. You can watch a reference video and feel what makes it work, not just see the techniques.

- You can clone AI voiceovers and avatars using tools like HeyGen, Higgsfield, ElevenLabs.

- You're proficient in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or CapCut Pro.

- You've edited direct response or performance ads before (Meta, TikTok, YouTube). This is NOT a YouTube vlog or wedding video role.



WHAT WE DON'T WANT:

- Someone who waits to be told every move. We give you a brief and reference videos. You bring the creative vision.

- Someone who just assembles clips. That's a VA, not an editor.

- Someone who over-edits. Our best ads are raw, real, and minimal. Not flashy.

- Someone who can't take feedback. We push hard because the standard is high. If you take feedback personally instead of using it to get better, this isn't the role for you.



COMPENSATION:

- Base: $2,000 - $2,500 USD/month (based on experience)

- Performance bonuses up to $5,000/month based on ad performance (ad spend thresholds + ROAS targets)

- Your income has no ceiling here. If your videos produce winners, you make more money. Period.

- Compensation review every 4 months with potential 15-25% increases



WHY THIS IS DIFFERENT FROM EVERY OTHER VIDEO EDITOR JOB:

- You're not editing content for a small brand hoping to grow. You're editing for a brand that's already spending serious money on ads and needs MORE winning creative.

- You work directly with a creative strategist who provides detailed briefs with emotional direction, not just "make it look nice."

- Your videos go live within days and you can see the RESULTS of your work in real time. Hook rates. Hold rates. CPA. You get direct feedback from the ad account on whether your edit worked.

- This is a career, not a gig. We're building a team for the long term and the right editor becomes one of the most important people in this company.



HOW TO APPLY:

Do NOT send a resume. We don't care about your resume.



Send us:

1. A 3-5 minute Loom video walking us through your 2-3 best video ad edits. Show us the video. Tell us WHY you made the editing choices you made. What was the pacing strategy? Where did you slow down and why? What was the hardest part? We want to hear you THINK about editing, not just show us pretty videos.

2. Links to 2-3 of your best performing video ads (with metrics if possible).

3. One sentence answering this question: What's the difference between a good video editor and a great one?



If your Loom is strong, we'll send you a paid test - one of our scripts, our reference videos, and 48 hours to produce it. That's the real audition.



We review every application. If you're the right person, you'll hear from us within 24 hours of submitting.



This role starts immediately.

title: Podcast Video Editor
description:
Full-Time Podcast Video Editor (Long-Form + Shorts) - Premium Quality, Hiring This Week



I'm launching a personal podcast on AI, entrepreneurship and life in Bali, and I'm hiring a full-time video editor to own the entire podcast edit pipeline, long-form episodes plus short-form cutdowns for Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube and TikTok. Looking to hire in the next few days so move fast.



The work:

Editing raw multi-cam podcast footage into polished long-form episodes (multi-speaker face cuts, clean audio mixing, beautiful colour grading). The visual benchmark is Chris Williamson's Modern Wisdom, premium, cinematic, warm. The intro style I want is Diary of a CEO, captivating hook, fast-paced cold open, cinematic title card. From each episode you'll also cut 5-10 short-form clips for Reels, Shorts and LinkedIn with quality captions, hook-first structure, and zero filler.

Most important: turnaround speed.



I already have 10 episodes filmed and need at least 1 long-form episode edited and delivered per day for the first week, then 10 more episodes by the end of the month. This is non-negotiable. To hit that pace you need to know how to use AI tools and Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve plugins to speed up the workflow (auto-transcription, auto-captions, silence removal, multi-cam sync, AI colour matching, etc). If you're still editing the old manual way, this role isn't for you.

If the long-form plus short-form workload is too much for one person, I'm open to hiring two editors, one for long-form and one for short-form. Long-form is the priority right now.



Technical requirements:

I work with large raw files, sometimes up to 100GB per episode, so you need fast, reliable internet for downloads and uploads. You also need a machine that can handle 4K multi-cam edits without crashing.

To apply,
 me at 
 with the word PODCAST in the subject line. Any application without PODCAST in the subject will be ignored, this is the first filter.



In your
 please include:



Your portfolio link, specifically any podcast long-form and short-form edits you've done before

The AI tools and plugins you currently use to speed up your edits

Your internet speed (download and upload)

Your computer specs

Whether you're applying for long-form, short-form, or both

Your availability to start this week



If you're ready to go,
 me asap. Shortlisted editors will go straight into a paid test edit on a real episode clip, then a paid trial week, then a full-time role with potential to grow long-term as I scale across multiple shows and brands.

Looking forward to seeing your work.



If you don't
 me, your application will not be taken into account. Just in case, if you do it via the online jobs platform, make sure you include your
 

Alex

title: Remote Interior Designer Assistant
description:
REMOTE INTERIOR DESIGNER ASSISTANT

7 Leaves Cafe | Remote | Full-Time

Working Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (Monday–Friday)



ABOUT 7 LEAVES CAFE

7 Leaves Cafe is a fast-growing California-based cafe brand with 40+ store locations. Our Store Development team designs and builds spaces that embody our brand — warm, welcoming, and intentional. As we expand our footprint, we are looking for a talented Interior Designer Assistant to support our team with day-to-day design work and help bring new locations to life.



ABOUT THE ROLE

The Remote Interior Designer Assistant works alongside our Store Development team to support the planning, design, and execution of interior spaces across all 7 Leaves Cafe locations. You will assist with design concepts, documentation, vendor coordination, and ensuring that every store reflects our brand standards and operational needs.



This is a fully remote, full-time role. You will be expected to work 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST) and communicate closely with our U.S.-based team.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

• Develop interior design concepts, sketches, 3D renderings, mood boards, and visual aids for leadership review

• Assist in planning store layouts, furniture placement, finish selections, and decorative elements

• Prepare CAD floor plans, elevations, and design documentation

• Support material selection, procurement coordination, and budget tracking

• Collaborate with vendors, contractors, and internal teams to ensure design intent is executed correctly

• Review completed projects and recommend solutions for design-related concerns

• Stay current with hospitality and retail design trends

• Support multiple projects simultaneously with organized documentation and on-time delivery

• Ensure all designs comply with ADA requirements and applicable building codes



QUALIFICATIONS

• Bachelor's degree or diploma in Interior Design, Architecture, or a related field

• Minimum 3+ years of relevant interior design experience (hospitality, retail, or commercial preferred)

• Proficiency in CAD software (AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, or equivalent)

• Experience with 3D rendering tools and mood board creation

• Familiarity with Adobe Creative Suite or similar design tools

• Knowledge of ADA requirements and building codes related to interior design

• Strong visual communication skills — able to present design concepts clearly

• Detail-oriented with excellent organizational and time management skills

• Comfortable working independently in a remote setting

• Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Suite

• Able to work 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST reliably (required)

• Experience with AI design tools (Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, or similar) is a plus



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We are looking for someone who is proactive, visually minded, and able to manage multiple projects without losing attention to detail. You should be comfortable communicating asynchronously, asking clarifying questions, and flagging concerns early. You will work closely with our Senior Interior Designer Coordinator and Store Development team — responsiveness and collaboration are key.



HOW TO APPLY

Submit your application with the following:

1. Updated resume / CV

2. Portfolio (PDF or link) — include at least 2–3 commercial or hospitality design samples

3. Brief cover note (3–5 sentences) on your relevant experience and why you're a fit for this role



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



7 Leaves Cafe is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all tea
mbers.

title: Remote Email Outreach Specialist — Fintech
description:
Email Setter



ClearHaven Advisory | Remote | Commission + $100/month retainer



ABOUT THE ROLE

ClearHaven is a US-based fintech advisory firm. We help international and domestic fintech companies get fully compliant and operational in the United States. We work with founders and executives at payments companies, neobanks, remittance platforms, and crypto-to-fiat businesses.



We are building our outbound
 team and looking for a sharp, disciplined
 outreach specialist. This is not a copy-paste
 blasting job. We send 100 highly researched, highly personalized
s per week to pre-qualified leads. Every
 is written to a specific person about a specific problem we found in our research. The people who do well in this role take pride in quality over volume.



REQUIREMENTS — PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING

You must have prior experience in cold
 outreach or B2B sales outreach. Applications without relevant experience will not be reviewed. You must also have a neutral or near-perfect English accent as this role includes cold calling warm leads by phone.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

-Every Friday: research 100 qualified leads using our lead database and qualification checklist. Find one specific buying trigger per person before you import them.

-Every Monday: send 100 personalized
s using our proven templates. Research is already done so this takes 3 to 4 minutes per
.

-Tuesday through Thursday: send follow-up sequences to prior weeks leads. Call warm leads who opened
s but did not reply.

-Respond to every positive reply within 1 hour and work the conversation until the call is on the calendar.

-Log all activity and notes in our CRM (GoHighLevel).



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

-Proven experience in cold
 outreach or B2B sales. You must be able to show examples or describe past campaigns.

-Near-perfect spoken and written English. Your
s and calls represent our company to senior fintech executives in the US market.

-Highly disciplined and organized. You manage your own week. Friday research has to be done before end of day without being chased.

-Comfortable doing online research. You will be looking up companies in public databases and finding specific information about each lead.

-Able to work independently. This is a remote role with no micromanagement. You are trusted to hit your numbers.



COMPENSATION

$100 per month retainer plus 5% commission on every closed deal your leads generate. Our deals range from $4,000 to $50,000 in value. A setter generating 1 to 2 closed deals per month can realistically earn $2,000 or more in monthly commission. There is no cap. Your income grows directly with your output.



TOOLS WE USE

Apollo, Yesware, Mailscale, Lusha, Dialdilar, GoHighLevel. Full training provided on all tools.



TO APPLY

Send a short message telling us about your cold
 or outreach experience. Include any results you can share — reply rates, calls booked, deals generated. Do not send a generic application. We read every message and we can tell immediately if you took 30 seconds or 3 minutes to write it. The people who get hired here pay attention to detail. Show us that in how you apply.

title: Remote LinkedIn Outreach Specialist — Fintech
description:

ClearHaven Advisory | Remote | Commission + $100/month retainer



ABOUT THE ROLE



ClearHaven is a US-based fintech advisory firm. We help international and domestic fintech companies get fully compliant and operational in the United States. We work with founders and executives at payments companies, neobanks, remittance platforms, and crypto-to-fiat businesses.

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Near-perfect spoken and written English. Your messages and calls represent our company to senior fintech executives in the US market.



Active LinkedIn user comfortable navigating the platform for research and outreach.



Patient and organized. LinkedIn outreach moves through a sequence over several days. You need to track every conversation without letting anything fall through the cracks.

COMPENSATION



$100 per month retainer plus 5% commission on every closed deal your leads generate. Our deals range from $4,000 to $50,000 in value. A setter generating 1 to 2 closed deals per month can realistically earn $2,000 or more in monthly commission. There is no cap. Your income grows directly with your output.



TOOLS WE USE



LinkedIn, Lusha, Dialdilar, GoHighLevel. Full training provided on all tools.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO (High;-Level Operations
description:
Position: Executive Assistant to CEO (High-Level Operations | Philippines-Based | Full-Time)



Overview  

We are seeking a high-level Executive Assistant to work directly with the CEO of a fast-growing U.S.-based company. This is not a basic administrative role. This position requires a strategic thinker, problem solver, and execution-focused operator who can take ownership of tasks and drive them to completion without constant oversight.



You will be expected to think ahead, anticipate needs, manage moving parts, and ensure that nothing falls through the cracks.



---



Core Responsibilities



- Act as the CEO’s right hand in both business and operational matters  

- Manage and track multiple projects simultaneously from start to completion  

- Conduct detailed research and present clear, actionable findings  

- Coordinate with internal teams and ensure tasks are executed on time  

- Follow up relentlessly to ensure accountability across tea
mbers  

- Organize information, reports, and workflows for clarity and efficiency  

- Communicate professionally with leadership, staff, and external contacts  

- Maintain fast response times and high availability, including weekends when needed  

- Anticipate problems before they happen and present solutions  



---



Who You Are



- A critical thinker — you don’t wait for instructions, you figure things out  

- Highly detail-oriented — you catch what others miss  

- Execution-driven — you finish what you start, on time  

- Organized and structured in how you manage tasks and information  

- Comfortable managing people and holding them accountable  

- Strong communicator — clear, concise, and professional  

- Fast responder — you understand urgency in business operations  

- Adaptable — able to shift priorities quickly without losing control  



---



Non-Negotiable Requirements



- Proven experience as an Executive Assistant or Operations Support role  

- Strong research and analytical skills  

- Ability to manage multiple priorities without supervision  

- Reliable internet and work setup  

- Willingness to be available on weekends when business demands it  

- High level of integrity and confidentiality  



---



What Success Looks Like in This Role



- Tasks are completed without repeated follow-ups  

- Problems are identified and solved proactively  

- The CEO’s workload is reduced, not increased  

- Communication is clear, fast, and effective  

- Projects move forward consistently without delays  



---



Compensation & Growth



- Competitive starting pay based on experience  

- Performance-based growth opportunities  

- Long-term role for the right candidate  



---



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, follow ALL steps:



1. Submit your application on the platform  



2.
 the following to: 

   - Subject line: EXECUTION – Executive Assistant Application – [Your Name]

     - Your experience supporting executives or managing projects  

     - A time you solved a problem without being told what to do  



3. Include written answers in your
:

---



Important:  

Applications that do not follow these instructions will NOT be considered.



---



Final Note



We are not looking for someone to just “assist.”  

We are looking for someone who thinks, executes, and takes ownership.

title: Senior UK Accountant / Bookkeeper | Full Set Accounts | Xero Expert | Up to Php 120,000
description:
Hi, I’m Fiona.



I run a small UK accountancy practice, and I’m looking for one exceptional person to work closely with me long term.



This is not an entry-level role.

This is not a bookkeeping-only role.

This is not a role for someone who needs constant hand-holding.



I need someone who can take work from bookkeeping right through to completed year-end accounts for:



- sole traders

- partnerships

- limited companies



You must already have real UK accounting experience.

That part is non-negotiable.



Please do not apply unless you already have genuine UK accounting experience.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



You will likely be a strong fit if:



- you already understand UK accounting work in practice, not just in theory

- you can prepare a full set of accounts

- you are strong in Xero

- you are comfortable in Excel

- you are organised, accurate, and proactive

- you are happy being back-end, with minimal client contact

- you take pride in clean, tidy, correct work

- you can hit the ground running



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



- full Xero bookkeeping

- bank and balance sheet reconciliations

- preparing sole trader accounts

- preparing partnership accounts

- preparing limited company year-end accounts

- supporting tax return preparation

- preparing and supporting VAT returns

- preparing and supporting payroll

- keeping ledgers, working papers, and files clean and accurate

- catching errors early and fixing them properly

- taking ownership of work and seeing it through



MUST-HAVES



- strong senior-level accounting experience

- real UK accounting experience

- proven ability to prepare year-end accounts for sole traders, partnerships, and limited companies

- strong Xero proficiency — you will be tested on this

- comfortable in Excel

- good written English

- able to work independently without micromanagement

- reliable laptop or PC, strong internet, and quiet work setup

- a second screen is strongly preferred

- professionalism, maturity, and pride in your work



HOW WE WILL ASSESS YOU



This role is for a serious candidate, so we will assess properly.



You will be tested on:



- your UK accounting knowledge

- your ability to handle full sets of accounts

- your Xero proficiency

- how you think and solve problems



Please only apply if you are confident in these areas.



WHO YOU’LL BE WORKING WITH



This is a small, heart-led team — just me, Fiona, and my husband Rudi, who helps with systems and tech behind the scenes.



We both work from home.

It’s personal.

It’s hands-on.

It’s real.



You won’t be just a number here.

We’re not a big agency.

We care deeply about the people who work with us.



WORKING STYLE



We do not use invasive screen-tracking software.



We manage by trust, communication, and output.



HOURS



This is a full-time remote role.



We need reliable overlap with UK time, usually during:



8:00am–12:00 noon UK time



That means a late afternoon / evening shift in the Philippines, depending on the time of year.



PAY



Php 80,000 to Php 120,000 per month for the right candidate.



This is a long-term independent contractor role, not employment.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



In the Philippines, family matters.

It matters to me too.



I built this business so I could be there for my daughters. I want the right person in this role to have that same dignity:



- work from home

- be trusted

- do meaningful work

- be part of something real



We are prepared to wait for the right person.

We care more about finding an A+ long-term fit than hiring fast.



HOW TO APPLY



Apply here:







Use access code:



FJ2026



The application includes a few short questions and a voice recording.



Please complete the application properly, as that is part of how we assess fit for the role.

title: American Sales Person Window Tint
description:
We are a US-based marketing company that books appointments for home service and automotive businesses. We handle the leads. You handle the calls. Your job is to follow up with people who are already interested and book them in for a confirmed appointment.

This is a phone sales role. You will be calling warm leads, not cold prospects. These are people who already showed interest in getting their windows tinted or other services done. Your job is to answer questions, handle basic objections, and collect a deposit to lock in their appointment.

What you will do:

Call warm inbound and follow-up leads provided by us daily. Collect a deposit over the phone to confirm the booking. Follow a proven call script we provide. Track your calls and bookings in our CRM.

What we need from you:

Neutral English accent with very clear, easy-to-understand pronunciation. No heavy regional accent. Confident and friendly phone presence. Basic computer and CRM skills. Available during US business hours. Consistent and reliable, this is not a gig, it is a real position.

Pay: Fixed monthly base plus performance bonus per confirmed booking.

Experience: Sales or customer service by phone preferred. Home service or automotive industry experience is a plus but not required.

If you are a strong communicator who can stay on script, handle a few objections, and close a simple low-ticket sale, we want to hear from you.

title: Data Entry Ecommerce Operations Assistant
description:
About Us:



We are a growing U.S.-based e-commerce company. We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable assistant to help with data entry and daily operations. This is a part-time role with flexible hours, with potential to grow into full-time.



Responsibilities:



- Perform accurate data entry and updates in Google Sheets and internal systems

- Track and update product pricing based on supplier cost changes

- Ensure pricing consistency across different sheets/systems and fix mismatches

- Assist with price matching and basic repricing updates when needed

- Maintain product data, including costs (COGS), miscellaneous costs, pricing, and expiry dates

- Perform basic data cleanup and accuracy checks

- Work with product listings and pricing in Amazon Seller Central (required); Walmart/eBay is a plus

- Apply basic understanding of product costs and sourcing logic when updating data (e.g., cost changes, supplier pricing)

- Flag any errors or inconsistencies in data



Working Hours:

- Part-time role (typically 10–20 hours per week) but can get more hours or even be considered for full time down the line.

- Flexible schedule: work can be completed at any time, as long as tasks are finished on time

- More hours may be available at the beginning for training and initial workload, then stabilize over time

- In the beginning, you may be required to align with our existing Philippines-based team for training and coordination

- Regular calls/meetings with the team and CEO are part of the role

- Hours can increase over time based on performance and reliability



TO APPLY – ANSWER ALL QUESTIONS BELOW



1. How many years of experience do you have working with the Amazon wholesale model (or Walmart wholesale)?

2. What were your main responsibilities in your previous role(s)? (Focus on data entry, pricing, or product-related work)

3. How comfortable are you working with Google Sheets / Excel with large datasets and numbers? Please describe the type of work you have done.

4. Have you worked with pricing updates or cost changes before? Briefly explain what you handled.

5. Are you comfortable working with detailed numerical data (costs, pricing, calculations, etc.) on a daily basis?



IMPORTANT: 

1. Applications with unclear or vague answers will not be considered.

2. Please share a link to your resume when applying. 

3. Please read the job description & answer the questions without any AI help to be considered. We're well aware when it's an AI response.



***PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DON"T HAVE AMAZON WHOLESALE EXPERIENCE. IF YOU DO, WE WILL MARK IT AS SPAM AND IT WILL EFFECT YOUR PROFILE WHEN YOU APPLY FOR FUTURE JOBS***

title: LinkedIn Writer
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a sharp, creative LinkedIn Content Writer who can build a powerful personal or brand presence on LinkedIn, one that stops the scroll, earns trust, and drives real engagement. This isn't a copy-paste content mill role. You'll be crafting 5 high-quality posts per week that combine authoritative writing with visually compelling, data-driven infographics and model-style graphic design.



What You'll Do

You'll write and publish 5 LinkedIn posts daily, each crafted to educate, provoke thought, or inspire action within a specific niche. Every post must feel like it came from a credible expert, not a content scheduler. Alongside your writing, you'll design or direct infographics, carousel frameworks, and model-style visual breakdowns. Think clean hierarchy, bold typography, and data visualization that makes complex ideas instantly digestible.



You'll research trending topics and industry conversations to stay ahead of the curve, develop a consistent voice and editorial calendar, A/B test hooks and formats, and analyze post performance to continuously refine the content strategy.



What We're Looking For

You have at least 2 years of experience writing professional content for LinkedIn, with a portfolio that proves you can drive engagement, not just impressions. You understand what makes a LinkedIn hook work in the first three lines, and you know how to structure a post for maximum dwell time and comments.



On the design side, you're comfortable in Canva, Figma, or Adobe Express and can produce infographics that look like they belong on a top-tier thought leader's feed. You have a strong eye for layout, color, and information hierarchy. Bonus points if you've grown a LinkedIn account from scratch or ghostwritten for executives or founders.



Non-Negotiables

Consistency is everything here: 5 posts per week, every week, on schedule. Each piece of content must be original, well-researched, and free of generic filler. You take ownership of results and aren't waiting to be managed.



Compensation

Competitive, based on experience. Performance bonuses tied to engagement growth and follower milestones.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM Specialist
description:
We are a real estate agency looking for a hands-on GHL CRM Specialist to own our lead conversion system end-to-end. You will build, manage, and optimise our GoHighLevel setup to ensure every lead, from
, and Google, is captured, nurtured, and converted efficiently. You will work closely with our agents to make sure they spend time closing deals, not chasing leads manually.



Key Responsibilities

CRM & Pipeline Management

Build and maintain GHL pipelines that reflect the property transaction lifecycle (inquiry ? viewing ? OTP ? close)

Segment and tag leads by intent, timeline, citizenship status, and property type

Ensure clean, accurate contact data across all lead sources



Workflow & Automation

Design and deploy automated nurture sequences via WhatsApp, SMS, and

Configure behaviour-based triggers (link clicks, page visits, form submissions) to personalise follow-up timing

Build lead scoring logic to prioritise hot leads for agents

Set up appointment reminder workflows and post-viewing follow-up sequences



Lead Source Integration

Connect and maintain integrations with PropertyGuru, 99.co,
 Lead Ads, Google Ads, and other portals via Zapier or webhooks

Ensure zero lead leakage across all channels



Agent Enablement

Train agents on how to use GHL's mobile app, conversations inbox, and task management

Create WhatsApp and SMS message templates that are value-driven and PDPA-compliant

Build dashboards so agents can track their pipeline at a glance



Reporting & Optimisation

Monitor key metrics: speed-to-first-contact, lead-to-viewing rate, viewing-to-OTP rate, and campaign ROI

Run A/B tests on message templates, timing, and sequences

Provide weekly performance reports to management





Requirements

Minimum 2 years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience (mandatory)

Strong understanding of marketing automation, CRM best practices, and funnel design

Familiarity with real estate market 

Experience integrating lead sources via Zapier, Make, or direct webhooks

Working knowledge of WhatsApp Business API setup and compliance

Understanding of Singapore's PDPA requirements for marketing communications

Proficient in crafting messaging that is consultative, not pushy



Nice to Have

Experience with
/Google Ads campaign management

Basic HTML/CSS for
 template customisation

Prior work with property agencies in Singapore



What Success Looks Like in 90 Days

All lead sources connected and flowing into GHL with zero manual data entry

Automated nurture sequences live for Hot, Warm, and Cold lead segments

Agents respond to every new lead within 5 minutes via automated WhatsApp

A live dashboard tracking pipeline velocity and conversion rates by agent

title: Acquisition Specialist – Cold Caller & Closer
description:
Acquisition Specialist – Cold Caller & Closer



(Single Point of Accountability | Performance-Only | Zero Handoffs)



WARNING:

Apply only if you have verified experience in both outbound cold calling and direct-to-seller closing. If you require handoffs, coaching, or flexible standards, this is not for you.



Role Overview



You are solely responsible for generating, qualifying, and closing distressed property deals (unpaid taxes, inheritance, title issues, problem properties).

You will be measured and retained based exclusively on daily call output, pipeline quality, and contracts closed—no exceptions.



Your Responsibilities



100+ live cold call conversations per day (not dials—actual conversations logged and recorded)



Immediate qualification/disqualification using a fixed criteria set—no “relationship building” without outcome



Full-cycle deal management: Personally negotiate, contract, and close each deal—no handoffs at any stage



Accurate, real-time CRM entry for every contact, note, and pipeline movement



Follow strict process: All activity and results tracked and audited. Miss metrics for any reason = immediate removal



Who You Must Be



Proven in both cold calling (high daily volume) and full-cycle closing (real estate or equivalent asset class)



Able to provide daily metrics and references—not negotiable



Rigid about pipeline management, documentation, and transparent reporting



Comfortable with direct feedback and negative coaching—no sensitivity to high-rejection or blunt performance management



Compensation-driven, with a clear history of thriving under performance-only pay plans



Immediate Disqualifiers



No resume or lack of specific metrics for calls/deals



No voice memo, or memo not following exact instructions below



History of team-selling, “split” process roles, or reluctance to own the full sales cycle



Evidence of missed quotas, resistance to feedback, or incomplete reporting



Application Process



1. Submit your resume clearly listing outbound + closing experience, including your highest daily call volume and annual closed deals.

2. Submit a 2–3 minute, unscripted voice memo (no script, no edits) covering, in order:



Your name, country, and highest daily cold call volume in a sales role



An example of a distressed or complicated deal you personally closed (describe steps and outcome)



Your personal system for tracking activity, pipeline, and follow-ups



The most direct/negative feedback you’ve received about your sales process and what changed after



Why you want a single-point, output-only sales role (not team selling or account management)



Any deviation from these steps = immediate rejection.



Do Not Apply If:



You lack both cold calling and direct closing experience with provable metrics



You need daily encouragement, “culture,” or ongoing training



You resist process, documentation, or daily scorecard reporting



You want a collaborative/”team” sales role

title: Web & IT Support Specialist
description:

 •Google Workspace administration for a 6-person team,

and light weekly IT troubleshooting.

s sent between tea
mbers (6 users) are landing in spam

mbers

• Google Workspace admin support — user management, aliases, groups, permissions, and configuration changes for the 6-person team

• General IT troubleshooting — resolve week-to-week issues as they arise 
 delivery, access problems, cloud storage questions, etc.)

Tech Stack (Familiarity Is a Plus)

, Notion, Calendly, Dropbox, Slack

Work Hours & Logistics

• You guide; I click — Super Admin access stays with me

Growth Potential

Exceptional performance may lead to a broader role supporting IT needs for Chasm Opportunities' small network of startup clients (WordPress, Google Workspace, Outlook, domain management, and similar work).



How to Apply

Please send a message that includes:

how many users.

 spam issues in Google Workspace or

similar platforms.

5. Any experience with tools in our stack: 
, Notion, Calendly, Dropbox, or

Slack.

Central Time.  Clearly state that you understand this is an average of 2-4 hours per week.

title: FULL-STACK DEVELOPER — SAAS PRODUCT BUILD
description:
About the Product

Quartermaster is a SaaS platform built specifically for chiropractic practices. It connects to clients'

QuickBooks accounts, pulls weekly financial data, runs it through an AI engine (Claude API), and

generates personalized CFO advisory scripts — giving financial advisors everything they need to run

high-value weekly client calls.

The core app is already built: dashboard, P&L analysis, forecasting, CFO script viewer, action item

tracker, and admin panel. You are joining to own the codebase long-term — adding features,

connecting live APIs, and making it production-grade.

React +

TypeScript

Node.js /

Express

SQLite + Drizzle

ORM

Tailwind +

shadcn/ui Claude AI API QuickBooks API

What You Will Build

Connect QuickBooks Online API

Implement OAuth2 flow so each client connects their QB account. Pull weekly P&L; reports, AR aging,

and balance sheet data automatically.

Wire Up Google Ads &
 Ads 

Pull campaign spend, ROAS, and conversion data from both platforms and display them on the

marketing attribution dashboard.

Make AI Script Generation Production-Ready

The Claude API integration is scaffolded. You will test it with real data, handle edge cases, tune the

prompts, and add a regenerate/edit workflow.

Build User Authentication

JWT login so each chiropractic practice logs in and sees only their data. Admin view shows all

clients.

Weekly Automated Reports

Schedule a Monday morning cron job that pulls QB data, generates the CFO script, and sends a

summary
 to the practice owner.

Quartermaster CFO Platform — Job Posting Page 1

Ongoing Features & Improvements

Once live with first clients, you will add features based on user feedback, fix bugs, improve

performance, and help scale to more clients.

Requirements

MUST HAVE NICE TO HAVE

• 3+ years of full-stack JavaScript experience

• React (hooks, context, TypeScript)

• Node.js + Express API development

• REST API integration (OAuth2 flows)

• Git — can commit, branch, and PR cleanly

• Communicates clearly in English (written)

• Can work independently with minimal hand-holding

• Reliable internet + backup connection

• QuickBooks API or Intuit OAuth experience

• Drizzle ORM or any SQLite experience

• Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui component library

• Experience with AI/LLM API calls (Claude, OpenAI)

• Google Ads API or
 Marketing API

• Previous SaaS product experience

• Experience with Railway, Render, or Vercel

Why This Role Is Worth Your Time

Long-term stability

This is not a short project. We are building a product business. Once you prove yourself, you are the

developer for years, not months.

Real ownership

You will have full access to the codebase. No micro-management. You get a task, you ship it.

Grow with the business

As we add clients, revenue grows. Compensation reviews happen every 6 months. Performance is

rewarded.

Interesting work

You are connecting AI, accounting software, and ad platforms into one dashboard. Not a boring

CRUD app.

Flexible schedule

Core overlap hours: 9am–12pm EST. Outside that, work when you work best. Results matter, not

hours logged.

How to Apply

Quartermaster CFO Platform — Job Posting Page 2

Read this carefully. We will filter out anyone who does not follow these instructions.

Send your application message with ALL of the following:

1. Your resume or a link to your LinkedIn/portfolio.

2. Links to 2–3 projects you built (GitHub repos preferred, live sites also great). Briefly explain

what each one is.

3. Answer this question in 3–5 sentences: "Tell me about a time you integrated a third-party

API that had confusing documentation. What was the API, what was the challenge, and how

did you solve it?"

4. Include the word CHIROPRACTOR somewhere in your message. This tells us you read the

full posting. Applications without it will not be reviewed.

5. Your expected monthly rate in USD.

Applications that are generic copy-paste messages will be ignored. We read every application that follows

these steps.

What Happens After You Apply

A small, realistic task from the actual codebase. Paid at your hourly rate

Review (2–3 days) We review all applications that followed the instructions above.

Short Video Call (30

min)

Quick intro call. We will discuss the project, your experience, and

answer your questions.

Paid Test Task (3–5 hrs) regardless of outcome.

Offer If it is a great fit on both sides, we move to an offer and start date.

Questions? Include them in your application message. We look forward to meeting our next tea
mber.

title: Part-time Capcut / AI Video Editor with potential for more

title: Real Estate Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (Must Provide Own Dialer)
description:
We are a high-producing real estate team based in South Florida looking for a high-energy, experienced Real Estate Cold Caller to join our operation. Your primary focus will be Calling  Leads 



We will provide you with high-quality data , but you must have and maintain your own dialer .  Your objective is to have conversations with homeowners to gauge their motivation to sell, and then set a follow-up appointment for our lead agent.

Your Responsibilities:



Make 150–200 outbound dials per shift using your own dialer, using  proven scripts.



Identify homeowners who are considering selling in the next 6 months or wanting refinance mortgage



Set a minimum of 2 qualified listing appointment or warm follow-up call per shift.



Requirements:



Mandatory Software: You MUST have your own active subscription to a dialer. 

We will provide the lists, but we will not be providing or paying for your dialer platform.



Experience: You must have prior experience calling real estate leads for US-based agents/investors. 



Communication: Fluent English with a clear, neutral accent and excellent conversational skills. You must be comfortable handling objections without sounding like you are reading a script.



Equipment: A reliable, hard-wired high-speed internet connection, a quiet workspace, and a noise-canceling USB headset.

Hours & Compensation:



Pay: $4.00 to $5.00 USD plus bonus (depending on experience).



Schedule: Part-time, 20  hours per week.



Working Hours: You must be available to work from 4:00 PM to 7:40 PM Eastern Standard Time (EST), Monday through Friday.

Saturday - 11 am - 2pm 



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):

We are looking for someone with high attention to detail. If you do not follow these exact steps, your application will be instantly deleted.



Reply to this job posting with the exact subject line: "South Florida Caller  (I Have My Own Dialer)"



In your message, provide a brief summary of your real estate cold calling experience and explicitly state which dialer platform you currently use.



Audio Requirement: You must include a link to a voice recording . In the recording, introduce yourself and read the following script in your normal speaking voice:



"Hi, I’m calling for Keisha's real estate team. We recently helped a neighbor sell their home just down the street for a great price, and we still have buyers looking in the area. Have you considered taking an offer on your home while the market is this active?"

title: General Ecom VA  - Video Editor + Meta Ad launch
description:
About This Role



You'll be the person responsible for daily video content production at scale. We handle the strategy and tools — you handle the execution. Your job is simple: download videos, use our AI tools to edit them quickly, and upload them to our ad platform.

This is not creative work. This is execution work. We provide everything you need (tools, guidelines, competitor sources). You follow the process, hit daily targets, and the volume speaks for itself.

If you're reliable, fast, and comfortable with repetitive high-volume work, this is a good fit.



Your Workflow (Repeating Cycle - Daily)



Research & Download



We provide you with specific keywords and competitor sources

You find and download trending videos from TikTok matching those criteria

Daily target: 50-150 high-quality video files  (we have AI tools to help with this)







Edit & Brand



We provide AI tools to speed up the editing process

Apply our editing guidelines (branding, framing, formatting)

Keep edits minimal and consistent

Maintain consistent quality standards across batches

Daily target: 50-100 edited videos ready for upload (we have AI tools to help with this)





Upload & Launch



Add videos to
 Ads Manager in our accounts

Set up basic ad campaigns with provided budgets

Daily target: Videos live and tracking within 24 hours of download

(You will not manage the ads just launching them)



Track & Report



Monitor performance metrics (CPA, CTR, conversion rate)

Log results in shared spreadsheet/dashboard

Flag top performers and underperformers

Weekly: Performance reports and trend analysis









Core Skills Required

Must Have:



TikTok video downloading (yt-dlp, 4K Video Downloader, or equivalent) ( we have our own tool that we developed)

Video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, Shotcut, or similar)

 Ads Manager experience

Google Sheets or Airtable proficiency

Attention to detail & organization (file naming, folder structure)

Comfortable learning new tools quickly



Nice to Have:



Ad copy/headline writing experience

A/B testing knowledge

Analytics/reporting experience

Graphic design basics

Motion graphics or effects editing





What Success Looks Like



Week 1-2: Understand our editing standards and workflow

Week 2-3: Producing 40-50 edited videos per day (we will provide AI tools to help you)

Ongoing: Consistently delivering 50+ videos/day with <2% quality issues

Month 2+: Identifying trends in what performs best, suggesting optimizations





Workflow Specifics



Turnaround: Download ? Edit ? Upload & Launch the ads within one business day

Daily volume: 40-50 videos minimum

Video length: Varies by test (we'll specify)

Editing complexity: Minimal (branding, formatting, framing) — AI tools provided

Ad manager setup: Simple (we provide templates/guidelines)

Reporting: Daily summary, weekly deep-dive (1-2 hrs)

Time commitment: ~3-4 hours/day once ramped up





Tools You'll Use



Download: yt-dlp, 4K Video Downloader, or similar ( we have our own AI tools we built for that)

Edit: Your choice of Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, or equivalent

Upload:
 Ads Manager

Track: Google Sheets, Airtable, or Supermetrics

Communicate: Slack (daily standups)





What We Provide



Detailed editing guidelines & templates

Competitor/keyword briefs (you don't have to source)

 Ads Manager access (you don't manage budget)

Clear feedback & iteration process

Flexible schedule (as long as turnaround is 48hrs)

Our own AI tools that we developed





Red Flags (What Doesn't Work)



You need detailed creative direction on every task

You can't commit to 7-9 hours daily (Monday-Friday)

You're uncomfortable with repetitive, high-volume work

You need to understand the "why" before executing tasks

You expect complex, varied creative work. start your application with a word blue.





How to Apply

Share:
