title: Technical Virtual Assistant / Automation Support (STEM Grad)
description:
I am looking for a reliable, highly analytical Technical Virtual Assistant to work closely with me on a daily basis. You will help me streamline my workflow by taking over routine administrative tasks, while also collaborating on specific technical automation projects.



Work Schedule & Flexibility:



Standard Hours: 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM CET/CEST (approx. 3:00 PM/4:00 PM to 12:00 AM/1:00 AM PHT).



Onboarding Phase: During the first few weeks, as we get to know each other and align our workflows, the daily hours might be lower.



Peak Days: Occasionally, depending on project deadlines, you may be required to work an additional 1-2 hours.



Long-term Outlook: As we build a solid working relationship and mutual trust, you will be granted more autonomy with the goal of collaborating on the full automation of routine tasks.



Key Responsibilities:



Handle routine administrative and data-entry tasks efficiently.



Assist in structuring, developing, and deploying specific automation projects.



Manage, clean, and organize sensitive company data (absolute discretion is required).



Use AI tools to accelerate daily operations and research.



Required Qualifications:



Education: A degree in a STEM field (Science, Technology, Engineering, or Mathematics) is strictly required.



Software Proficiency: Excellent command of Microsoft Office, with advanced skills in Excel (formulas, pivot tables, data manipulation).



Tech-Savvy: Basic knowledge and comfortable daily use of AI tools (like ChatGPT, Claude, etc.).



Trust & Reliability: You will handle sensitive business data. You must be willing to sign an NDA (Non-Disclosure Agreement).



Tools: You must use time-tracking software to log your hours.



Bonus Points:



Any programming, scripting, or coding experience is a massive advantage and will put your application at the top of the list!



Compensation:



$4 to $5 per hour (paid for hours tracked).



Weekly payments.



How to Apply:

To ensure you have read this entire description, please start your application message with the exact phrase: "STEM AUTOMATION". Applications without this phrase will be automatically ignored.

title: Virtual Assistant, Real Estate Photography & Digital Media
description:
GENERAL PURPOSE OF JOB

Wheeler Home Concepts is a premium real estate photography and marketing company serving Delaware and the surrounding areas (Eastern Standard Time, United States). We specialize in high-quality photography, video, digital media, and design services for realtors and businesses. Our reputation is built on excellence, creativity, and top-tier service.



We’re looking for a Virtual Assistant to support our growing team with photo editing quality control, virtual staging, reels editing, social media design, and design-related projects. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, highly organized, and skilled in creative software tools.



Please submit a portfolio of your professional work.



ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES include the following. Other duties may be assigned.



Photography & Media Support

• Quality Control (QC) for Photo Editing: Review edited photos to ensure consistency, quality, and adherence to brand standards. Make additional edits to photos, as needed.

• Virtual Staging: Assist in staging vacant rooms digitally using Photoshop or similar tools.

• Photobooth Templates: Design and update photobooth overlays and templates, as needed.

• Reels Editing: Create short-form video content (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) using Premier Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve.

• Flyers & Social Post Design: Design promotional materials and social media graphics.

• Assist with Writing and Maintaining Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs): Document processes and workflows to improve efficiency.

• Organization: Maintain organized records and files of images, projects, and updates in our system.



Design & Creative Assistance

• 3D Modeling/Renders for Design Projects: Use Planner 5D (or similar software) to create visual models for design projects, as needed.

• Assistance with Design Presentations: Help with presentations for clients and internal design projects.



Required Skills & Experience

• 2+ years of demonstrated experience with:

     o Adobe Lightroom (Photo Editing & QC)

     o Adobe Photoshop (Virtual Staging, Graphic Design)

     o Premier Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro (Reels/Video Editing)

     o Adobe After Effects or similar motion graphics software

     o Microsoft Office (Word, Excel)

• Must have a reliable computer capable of running the required applications.

• Must have fast, reliable internet for remote collaboration.

• Good to excellent English skills (spoken & written) for communication, documentation, and team collaboration.

• Must be able to work 8am-5pm Tuesday-Friday, Eastern Standard Time (8 hrs with one hour break), and 8am-Noon Monday and Saturday EST (4 hours).

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Required: Advanced English communication skills (written and verbal)

About the Role

We're seeking a highly organized, proactive Executive Virtual Assistant to support daily operations across multiple mission-driven projects, government contract oversight, marketing outreach for foster parent recruitment, HR streamline for new candidates.

The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, AI tech-savvy, able to anticipate needs, and thrives in a fast-paced environment while managing multiple priorities efficiently.

Primary Responsibilities

• Manage executive calendar: schedule meetings, appointments, 

• Monitor and organize
 inbox; draft and send professional responses

• Attend virtual meetings and provide summarized notes with action items

• Research potential sponsors, partners, and business development opportunities

• Track project progress and follow up with teams to ensure deadlines are met

• Create professional documents, proposals, and presentations using Microsoft Office

• Leverage AI tools (ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Claude) to improve efficiency

• Proactively remind executive of deadlines, meetings, and key deliverables

• Handle confidential information with complete discretion

Required Qualifications

• Minimum 4 years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or Operations Coordinator

• Excellent written and spoken English with professional communication skills

• Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)

• Comfortable using AI productivity tools to streamline work

• Exceptional organizational skills and attention to detail

• Proven ability to manage competing priorities and meet tight deadlines

• Professional demeanor when representing the executive in communications

Required Qualifications

• Experience with project management tools (Asana, ClickUp)

• Background in digital marketing or content coordination

• Familiarity with CRM systems and document management platforms

• Experience supporting C-level executives or business owners

What We Offer

• Competitive hourly rate of $6–$8 based on experience

• Performance bonuses for efficiency, reliability, and AI proficiency

• Long-term growth opportunities across multiple business ventures

• Mission-driven, supportive work culture

• Consistent full-time hours with stable income

Application Instructions (PLEASE READ CAREFULLY)

To demonstrate your attention to detail, you MUST include the phrase "Executive OS" as the first line of your cover letter.

Additionally, submit a 1–2 minute video introduction (maximum 120 seconds) answering:

1. What tools and systems do you use to stay organized?

Applications that do not follow these instructions will be automatically disqualified.

title: Referral Partner Opportunity for Tagalog Tutors and UGC Creators
description:
Please apply at 

PLEASE READ: THIS IS NOT A TEACHING POSITION

If you are applying because you think you are a good fit for a VA role or social media management - you will be banned from further consideration at Tahanan. This listing is not for that role. 



Hi, I’m Luke, the founder of Tahanan.



Tahanan is a Tagalog learning app built for real progress in speaking, confidence, and cultural connection. Our strongest audience is heritage learners, especially people who grew up hearing Tagalog but never learned to speak it comfortably.



I’m looking for a small group of established tutors and creators who feel genuinely aligned with that mission.



This is a referral partner opportunity, not a tutoring job at Tahanan.



We are not hiring tutors to teach students inside the app. We are looking for people who already teach Tagalog or already have an engaged audience, and want to recommend Tahanan to students or followers who are a strong fit.



This is not a salaried role.

This is not for new tutors looking for their first teaching opportunity.



Who this is for:

- Tagalog tutors with active students or public teaching profiles

- Filipino creators who make content relevant to Filipino culture, language, identity, or family life

- People who understand the emotional side of reconnecting with Tagalog

- People who care about helping others build confidence speaking



Who this is not for:

- Generic affiliate marketers

- Broad influencers with no real connection to the product

- People looking for a fixed monthly salary from this role

- New tutors

- People looking for a VA role at Tahanan



What partners get:

- A personal referral link

- A personal referral code

- 15% off for new subscribers through your link or code

- Recurring commission on attributed website subscriptions

- Monthly payouts through PayPal or Wise

- No minimum payout threshold



Important:

Referrals only work when the customer subscribes through the Tahanan website.

If someone subscribes through Apple or Google in-app purchase, the sale cannot be attributed.



For tutors:

Tahanan can help your students stay more consistent between lessons and get more speaking practice outside lesson time.



For creators:

The strongest content for Tahanan is personal, heritage-focused, and real. Content about growing up hearing Tagalog, wanting to speak with family, reconnecting with culture, or building speaking confidence tends to fit best.



If this sounds like a fit, please apply here:





When you apply, make sure to include:

- your name

- your

- links to your teaching profile, social accounts, or public content

- a short note on why Tahanan feels relevant to you



Thanks,

Luke

Founder, Tahanan

title: AI Creative Operator (Performance + Production)
description:
High-Volume AI Content, Ads, and Creative Systems



About the Role: We are building an AI-first creative team focused on high-output, performance-driven content across ads, social media, and web.



This is not a traditional design role. This is not a slow, perfection-driven creative environment.



This role is for someone who:



Moves fast

Thinks in variations, not single assets

Uses AI to scale output

Understands what makes content perform



You will be responsible for producing large volumes of high-quality creative daily, using AI tools to generate, test, and refine content across multiple clients.



What Success Looks Like



In your first 30 days, you will:



Produce 300–600+ creative assets (images, videos, UGC-style content)

Build repeatable prompt frameworks

Contribute to high-performing ad variations

Demonstrate ability to create both:

Candid, natural-looking content

Polished, luxury-level visuals



This is a production and performance role, not a concept-only role.



Core Responsibilities



1. AI Creative Production (Daily Output)

Produce 15–30+ creative assets per day

Create:

Image ads

Short-form video ads

UGC-style videos

AI avatar content

Generate multiple variations of the same concept quickly



You will use tools including:



Runway (AI video + motion)

HeyGen (UGC / avatar content)

ChatGPT (prompting, scripts, ideation)

MidJourney



2. Performance-Based Creative Development

Analyze top-performing ads and social content

Identify:

Hook patterns

Visual styles

Emotional triggers

Turn insights into new creative variations at scale



3. Prompt Engineering + Systems

Develop and refine:

AI prompts for images, video, and scripts

Repeatable creative frameworks

Build systems that allow:

Faster output

Consistent quality

Scalable production



4. Content Formatting + Packaging

Finalize assets in:

Figma

Canva



Ensure assets are optimized for:

Ads (Meta, YouTube, TikTok)

Social media (Reels, Shorts)



5. Weekly Optimization Loop

Review performance data

Identify what is working

Produce improved variations each week



Who This Role Is For



You are a strong fit if you:



Prefer producing 10–20 variations over perfecting one design

Enjoy working with AI tools daily

Think in terms of:

Hooks

Conversion

Audience psychology

Are comfortable moving fast and iterating



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is not a fit if you:



Prefer manual design over AI-assisted workflows

Spend hours perfecting a single asset

Focus primarily on aesthetics over performance

Are uncomfortable with high-volume output expectations



Required Skills

Experience using AI tools for creative production:

Runway

HeyGen

ChatGPT



Understanding of:

Social media content formats

Ad creative structure

Short-form video trends

Ability to:

Generate multiple creative variations quickly

Work within brand guidelines

Maintain quality at scale



Bonus (Highly Preferred)

Experience creating:

Luxury brand content

Founder-led content

UGC-style ads that feel natural



Background in:

Performance marketing

Content creation (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts)

Experience analyzing ad performance and iterating creative



Compensation + Structure



We are hiring two candidates for a paid trial:



Phase 1: Paid Trial (1 Week)

Daily output expectations

Real client creative tasks

Performance-based evaluation



Phase 2: Ongoing Role

Monthly base compensation



Performance-based bonuses tied to:

Output volume

Creative performance

System contributions



How to Apply (Required)



To be considered, you must submit:



1. Portfolio

At least 10 AI-generated creatives

Include:

Images

Videos

UGC or avatar-style content



2. Process Breakdown

Tools used

Approximate time per asset

Example prompts (if available)



3. Short Answer (Required)



Answer this:



“If you were asked to create 20 ad variations in one day, how would you approach it using AI?”



Important



This role is designed for individuals who:



Embrace AI

Move quickly

Focus on output and performance



We are building a high-performance AI creative team, not a traditional design department.



Hiring Plan



We will:



Select 2 candidates for a paid test

Evaluate based on:

Speed

Output

AI usage

Creative thinking

Hire:

1 primary

1 backup / secondary contributor
salary: $1000 per month: 15 assets per work day

/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScy_iOjPN3mbYc6GpOdWD4xMzdKmxZMzRUNNerqecZ2fQ8WUQ/viewform?usp=dialog



If you're a talented designer with an eye for clean, modern, conversion-friendly design — and want to be part of a fast-growing, no-nonsense team — we’d love to hear from you.

title: AI Automation & Social Media Marketing Specialist (GoHighLevel + Funnels + Lead Systems)
description:
We are looking for someone who thinks like a marketer and systems builder, not just a virtual assistant.

This role is focused on building systems that generate leads, nurture them, and convert them into clients through automation, AI, social media, and funnel design.



We are not looking for someone who just completes tasks.

We are looking for someone who understands strategy, design, engagement, and conversion.



Important: Read Before Applying

We ARE looking for someone who:

Understands what makes content perform

Knows how to create engagement and conversations

Can design landing pages that convert leads—not just look good

Thinks about results, not just tasks



???? Responsibilities

???? AI Automation & Systems

Build and manage automations inside Go High Level (GHL)

Create lead follow-up systems (SMS,
, pipelines)

Build AI agents / chatbots for lead intake and qualification

Connect tools using Zapier, Make, or native integrations

???? Funnels & Lead Generation

Build landing pages and funnels inside GHL

Optimize pages for conversion (not just design)

Improve lead capture and booking flows

Support campaign launches and offers

???? Social Media Marketing & Content

Create and schedule content (Instagram, TikTok,
)

Develop content ideas based on trends and performance

Design clean, high-converting graphics (Canva or similar)

Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

 Note: We will provide raw video content when needed. Your role will include editing, repurposing, and optimizing that content for engagement and conversions.



???? What Success Looks Like in This Role

Content that:

Gets engagement (likes, comments, shares)

Drives DMs and conversations

Converts viewers into leads

Landing pages that:

Capture attention quickly

Communicate the offer clearly

Convert traffic into leads or booked calls

Automations that:

Follow up with leads instantly

Increase response rates

Move leads through the pipeline



???? Requirements (Must Have)

Strong experience with Go High Level (GHL)

Experience building automations and workflows

Experience with AI tools / chatbot systems

Social media marketing experience (content + strategy)

Landing page / funnel building experience

Basic graphic design skills (Canva preferred)

Strong communication and ability to execute



???? Bonus Skills (Highly Preferred)

Experience building AI agents or chatbots

Experience editing short-form video content

Familiarity with AI video tools or AI avatars (or willingness to learn)

Ability to repurpose content into multiple formats (clips, captions, graphics)

Copywriting for ads, captions, or funnels

title: Lead Generation Specialist-Execura
description:
We’re looking for a Lead Generation Specialist to help us grow our client base at Execura Support Solutions.



About VA Agency Execura:



Execura Support Solutions works with business owners and founders to help them get more clients and streamline their operations so they can focus on scaling instead of getting stuck in day-to-day tasks. 



We’re building a team focused on execution, growth, and real results.



About the Role



This is not just a “send messages” role.



We’re looking for someone who can:



Find and engage the right people (CEOs, founders, business owners)

Start real, natural conversations

Turn those conversations into booked calls



You’ll be working directly with the founder and COO and will play a key role in growing the business.



What You’ll Do

Generate and reach out to qualified leads

Send 50–100 targeted outreach messages daily

Google doc of leads

Follow up with leads consistently

Maintain ongoing conversations with prospects

Move leads toward booking calls via Calendly

Keep lead tracking organized and updated

Requirements

1–3 years experience in lead generation, outreach, or sales

Strong communication skills (clear, natural, not robotic)

Proactive and able to work independently

Comfortable speaking with business owners

Bonus If You Have

Appointment setting or sales experience

Experience with LinkedIn, WhatsApp, or multi-platform outreach

Important



This is a results-driven role. We value:



Conversations started

Leads engaged

Calls booked



Not just activity.



To Apply



Please send your updated resume and tell me more about you and how much are you're looking for. 



We need results!!

title: Credit Repair Disputer
description:
Part-Time Credit Repair Virtual Assistant (Remote)

Company: Prime Recovery

Position: Credit Repair Virtual Assistant

Schedule: Part-Time — 4-Hour Shifts

Pay: $250/month (USD) — Non-Negotiable

Start: Immediate (Interviews being scheduled now)

Job Overview

Rennard Solutions is seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to assist with daily credit repair operations. You will handle approximately 5 client files per day, working inside dispute systems and communicating with the team to ensure smooth processing.

Responsibilities

Process 5 client files per day

Review and analyze 3-bureau credit reports

Prepare and submit disputes using DisputeFox

File complaints through the CFPB portal when required

Prepare and submit FTC Identity Theft Reports when applicable

Follow company dispute procedures and templates

Maintain accurate client records

Provide daily progress updates to the team

Communicate consistently via WhatsApp & Zoom

Meet deadlines and productivity expectations

Requirements (MUST HAVE)

Ability to read and understand credit reports

Knowledge of credit repair / credit reporting

Experience using DisputeFox

Experience using the CFPB complaint system

Experience doing direct uploads to the actual credit bureaus 

Experience preparing FTC Identity Theft Reports (
)

Strong attention to detail

Reliable internet & computer

Able to work full 8-hour shifts remotely

Consistent attendance (minimum 1-month commitment)

Positive attitude and team mindset

Professional communication skills

Ideal Candidate

Organized and dependable

Fast learner

Able to follow instructions exactly

Comfortable handling sensitive information

Self-motivated with minimal supervision

Compensation

$250/month (USD)

Part-time remote role

Non-negotiable starting salary

Opportunity for long-term position based on performance



How to Apply

Qualified applicants will be contacted for an immediate interview via Zoom.

title: Video editor
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive video edtor to support our content and marketing team. 



This role will largely consist of editing short form videos for reels and ads, with opportunities to advance to editing long-form YouTube videos and podcasts. 



The ideal candidate will have excellent skills in video editing software fast response time, attention to detail, proficiency in English, a strong work ethic, and proficiency with various tools and platforms.



Bonus Skills (Preferred, but not required):



Familiarity with frequent flyer programs and loyalty programs for airlines and USA-based credit card companies such as Chase, Amex, Capital One, Citi, BILT, American Airlines, Alaska Airlines, British Airways, Air Canada, Singapore Airlines, Cathay Pacific, Qantas, Virgin Atlantic, Air France, United, Delta, and Southwest Airlines.



Skills and Qualifications:



Fluent in English with strong communication skills (both verbal and written)

Strong organization skills and proficiency with video editing software

Excellent attention to detail and ability to work independently

Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively in a fast-paced environment

A positive, solution-oriented attitude and a willingness to learn new tools and processes



Working Hours/ capacity:



Flexible hours, but requires ability to turnaround video edits in less than 24 hours

Video capacity: approximately 15-30 short form reels per month, with potential to take on more workload based on your performance and capacity

title: Assistant Sales Manager - For U.S. Cleaning Company
description:
Assistant Sales Manager (Remote)– Two Maids of Milwaukee 



Remote | Part-Time (25–30 hrs/week) | Growth Opportunity  



About Us:



Two Maids of Milwaukee is a family-owned residential cleaning company based in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. We offer a full range of home cleaning services — from routine weekly maintenance to thorough top-to-bottom deep cleans. Recently recognized by Inc. Magazine as the nation's fastest growing cleaning company, we're proud of the 
ntum we've built and the culture we've maintained along the way. 



At Two Maids, we believe in putting family first — both for the customers we serve and the team we're building. Our growth creates real opportunities for people who want to be part of something meaningful and take pride in their work. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you. 



The Role:



We're looking for a motivated and personable Assistant Sales Manager to join our team. In this role, you'll be remote and the first point of contact for potential customers — helping them find the right cleaning service and guiding them through the process of becoming a Two Maids client. 



This is a great fit for someone who genuinely enjoys talking with people, stays organized under pressure, and takes ownership of their work without needing to be micromanaged. 



This is not your average sales role. You’ll have a hand in nearly every part of our business — including managing customer support and helping with additional administrative duties in the office. We’re looking for someone who’s excited about taking ownership of day-to-day sales, operations and growing into a leadership role as we scale. 





 

What You'll Be Doing:



Managing inbound leads through our CRM system and ensuring they are placed in the correct action plans 



Calling, texting, and
ing leads to discuss cleaning options and convert them into customers 



Scheduling in-home consultations for prospective clients based on management and ownership schedules 



Keeping the CRM database organized, accurate, and up to date 



Potential creative outlet to create action plans that you feel are better suited for our leads 



Providing excellent customer service to current and prospective clients 



Supporting general office tasks as needed, with room to grow into additional responsibilities over time 



 



What We're Looking For: 



Fluent in American English with strong spoken and written communication skills 



Prior experience in sales and/or customer support 



Comfortable managing CRM systems and lead pipelines 



Confident and personable on the phone — you enjoy talking to people 



Self-motivated and proactive; you thrive working independently in a remote setting 



Detail-oriented, empathetic, patient, and a clear communicator 



Equipped with a reliable computer, strong internet connection, and a quiet home workspace 



 

Compensation & Benefits:



Pay: $8/hour, paid bi-weekly 



Hours: 25–30 hours per week; room to grow into full-time if wanted 



Performance: Potential for pay increases based on performance and growth 



Health Stipend: $25/week toward health insurance and government contributions 



13th Month Pay: Included (prorated in your first year) 



Paid Time Off: 20 paid days off per year (available after 6 months) + 8 U.S. holidays 





How to Apply:



To be considered for this position, please send a one-minute voice recording introducing yourself using Vocaroo and include the link in your application. 



Address your recording directly to Steve — I'm pretty laid back, so feel free to be conversational and let your personality shine through. Strong spoken English is one of the most important parts of this role, and we appreciate your understanding of this requirement. 



Application Deadline: Friday, May 1st 



Two Maids of Milwaukee is a family-owned business that values people, growth, and doing great work. We look forward to meeting you

title: Sales Representative Real Estate /Cold Caller
description:
Part-Time Cold Calling Sales Rep / Real Estate (Land)



3-Month Contract | 20 hrs/week | Opportunity to Extend



We’re not looking for average — we’re looking for someone who thrives on outperforming targets and turning discipline into results.



At our company, we operate by three core values: Relentless Excellence, Disciplined Results, and Continuous Innovation. These aren’t just words — they guide how we work every day.



This role is focused primarily on cold calling landowners, identifying selling opportunities, and qualifying motivated sellers to keep our acquisition pipeline strong. If you’re competitive, organized, and enjoy conversations that lead to deals, this role could be a strong fit.



This is a part-time contract role for 3 months with the opportunity to extend based on performance.



Please follow the application process



Do NOT call,
, or DM about this role



JOB DESCRIPTION Video: 
/share/9d
beb2407d1ef59b12



APPLICATION LINK: b.link/ColdCalling



Company: 



Position Details:



- Pay: $10/hour + weekly performance bonuses

- Schedule: Monday – Thursday

- Hours: 2:00 PM – 7:00 PM (20 hours per week) EASTERN TIME ZONE

- Contract: 3-month contract with opportunity to extend

- Payment: Weekly (Mondays via 
)

- Start Date: ASAP



Role Responsibilities:



Cold Calling (Primary Focus)

- Call landowners to identify selling interest

- Build rapport and gather property details

- Qualify motivated sellers and identify potential deals



Lead Qualification

- Identify motivated sellers

- Segment prospects and move qualified opportunities forward



CRM & Reporting

- Log conversations and update records in the CRM

- Share notes and insights with the acquisitions team



Process Adherence

- Follow call workflows and company processes

- Provide feedback on messaging and lead quality



Collaboration

- Communicate with the team through internal chat

- Stay aligned with acquisition goals and pipeline targets



Attendance & Performance

- Hubstaff Monitoring: Tracks time, activity, and screenshots

- Punctuality is crucial: 3-strike rule. No-call/no-show = termination

- Communication: Active communication in GChat is expected



Role Requirements:



Experience

- Required: Real estate experience

- Required: At least 6 months of outbound sales or cold calling experience



Reliable Work Setup

- Hard-wired internet connection (Ethernet) required for call quality and system performance

- High-speed internet

- Working camera

- Noise-canceling headset

title: Community Development Representative  Coron, Palawan
description:
We are hiring Community Development Representatives in five destinations across the

Philippines — Siargao, El Nido, Coron, Bohol and Panglao, and Boracay. This posting is for

Coron, Palawan.



This is not a typical sales role — and not a tech role either. The ideal person for this position is

part presenter, part community builder, part trusted local presence. You will be the face of this

effort — embedded in the hospitality and tourism community, genuinely invested in the success

of the people you work with, and comfortable introducing her to a community of business

owners who’ve never seen anything like her before.



Lani sells herself. Your job will be to get in front of people — and we will support you in that —

tell the story well, demonstrate something remarkable in real time, and build the kind of

relationships that make people want to say yes — and want to bring their friends along too.

This role comes with two possible growth paths. Some people are natural community builders

who thrive by going deeper in one territory — expanding their client base, strengthening their

community roots, and growing their income steadily over time. Others have leadership

ambitions and want to mentor new ambassadors, oversee multiple territories, and grow into a

regional role. Both paths are equally valued here. You choose the one that fits who you are

today — and that path can evolve as your life and experience develop.



What You Will Do

• Identify and attend local hospitality gatherings, tourism council meetings, DOT events,

restaurant association events, surf operator meetups, and industry get-togethers where

independent business owners congregate

• Deliver a compelling group presentation to rooms of boutique hotel owners, restaurant

operators, surf schools, and activity operators — live, interactive, and anchored in their

specific numbers — including a live demonstration of Lani being activated in real time in

front of the room

• Walk individual prospects through a one-on-one demonstration that shows the specific

revenue their business is currently leaving on the table — Lani does the heavy lifting,

your job is to start the conversation

• Build genuine relationships with independent business owners across the tourism

economy — before, during, and long after they become clients

• Ensure existing clients feel well served and are getting real value — staying present in

the relationship not just at the point of sale

• Introduce clients to the opportunity of joining a growing community of independent

operators — warmly and without pressure — and nurture that community as it develops

• Attend local hospitality and tourism events as a genuine community presence — not as

a vendor but as someone who belongs there

• Have regular conversations with the founder to share what you are learning and to get

support on whatever arises — whether it is a tough situation, an unexpected opportunity,

or simply something worth thinking through together

• Report weekly on conversations, feedback, and market insights

• Follow whichever growth path fits you — deepen your territory over time or grow into a

leadership role as the team expands across the Philippines



What We Are Looking For

Experience and background

We are looking for someone who already belongs to this community — or could walk into it

tomorrow and feel completely at home. The ideal background, in order of priority:



• First priority — hospitality and tourism: experience with boutique hotels, resorts, or

guesthouses as an owner, manager, or guest relations professional. You understand the

world of the independent hotel owner from the inside.

• Second priority — food and beverage: experience with restaurants, cafes, or bars in a

tourism destination. You know the pressures of running a small F&B operation and the

pain of missed reservations and unanswered messages.

• Third priority — surf schools and activity operators: familiarity with the surf and outdoor

activity community. You know the operators, the culture, and the seasonal rhythms.

• Also valued — dive shops and vacation rental operators. Any experience in these

industries is a genuine plus.

• Based in or willing to be deeply and consistently present in your destination

• Comfortable speaking in front of a group — you don’t need to be a professional

presenter but you need to be someone people enjoy listening to

• Existing relationships within the local business community is a significant advantage

• Comfortable with WhatsApp,
, and basic digital tools — you don’t need to be

technical but technology shouldn’t rattle you

• English proficiency — written and spoken



Personal qualities — these matter more than your resume

We don’t expect any candidate to embody all of these perfectly. But if most of them feel like a

genuine description of who you are, we would love to hear from you.

• Genuine warmth — people feel comfortable around you quickly

• A natural connector — you enjoy introducing people to each other and building

something larger than yourself

• Presence — when you speak people listen. Not because you’re loud but because you’re

real.

• Curiosity — you ask good questions and you actually listen to the answers

• Community pride — you care about the people who have built their lives and businesses

here

• Persistence — you follow up thoughtfully and keep relationships warm

• Integrity — you represent Lani honestly and let her results speak for themselves

• Eager to grow — in whatever direction feels right for you



Compensation

All figures at current exchange rates (~?57 per $1 USD).



Monthly Base salary

Guaranteed

?42,000

~$737



Travel and Starlink

?20,000

~$351



Total Monthly Base

?62,000

~$1088



Setup commissions

10% per client signed



These figures reflect realistic projections based on two group presentations per year across

multiple industries, a growing referral network, and an expanding client base. Your perpetual

residual income grows every year your book grows — and continues for as long as your clients

remain with Lani.



The perpetual residual is tiered to reward loyalty and long-term commitment:

• Clients 1 to 20 — 2% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 21 to 50 — 3% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 51 to 75 — 4% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 76 to 100 — 5% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients above 100 — 6% of monthly retainer per client

Your book belongs to you. The portfolio of clients you build is yours — value you can hold,

transfer, or one day retire on. The legal structure of book ownership is being developed with our

attorneys and will be fully documented before your first client signs.



How to Apply

Send a WhatsApp message or
 introducing yourself. Tell us:

• A little about your background and where you are based

• Why this role connects with you specifically — not just what you’ve done but what draws

you to this particular work in this particular community

• Tell us about a relationship — in your community, your work, or your personal life —

where both trust and genuine connection were part of the story. What made it real? And

how do you see the difference between the two?

We are not looking for a polished cover letter. We are looking for a real person who connects

with what we are building.

Most people can be trusted to some degree. Fewer people generate genuine connection. The

best relationships — and the best work — happen when both are present. Share your story with

us.

• Ensure existing clients feel well served and are getting real value — staying present in

the relationship not just at the point of sale

• Introduce clients to the opportunity of joining a growing community of independent

operators — warmly and without pressure — and nurture that community as it develops

• Attend local hospitality and tourism events as a genuine community presence — not as

a vendor but as someone who belongs there

• Have regular conversations with the founder to share what you are learning and to get

support on whatever arises — whether it is a tough situation, an unexpected opportunity,

or simply something worth thinking through together

• Report weekly on conversations, feedback, and market insights

• Follow whichever growth path fits you — deepen your territory over time or grow into a

leadership role as the team expands across the Philippines



What We Are Looking For

Experience and background

We are looking for someone who already belongs to this community — or could walk into it

tomorrow and feel completely at home. The ideal background, in order of priority:

• First priority — hospitality and tourism: experience with boutique hotels, resorts, or

guesthouses as an owner, manager, or guest relations professional. You understand the

world of the independent hotel owner from the inside.



• Second priority — food and beverage: experience with restaurants, cafes, or bars in a

tourism destination. You know the pressures of running a small F&B operation and the

pain of missed reservations and unanswered messages.

• Third priority — surf schools and activity operators: familiarity with the surf and outdoor

activity community. You know the operators, the culture, and the seasonal rhythms.

• Also valued — dive shops and vacation rental operators. Any experience in these

industries is a genuine plus.

• Based in or willing to be deeply and consistently present in your destination

• Comfortable speaking in front of a group — you don’t need to be a professional

presenter but you need to be someone people enjoy listening to

• Existing relationships within the local business community is a significant advantage

• Comfortable with WhatsApp,
, and basic digital tools — you don’t need to be

technical but technology shouldn’t rattle you

• English proficiency — written and spoken



Personal qualities — these matter more than your resume

We don’t expect any candidate to embody all of these perfectly. But if most of them feel like a

genuine description of who you are, we would love to hear from you.

• Genuine warmth — people feel comfortable around you quickly

• A natural connector — you enjoy introducing people to each other and building

something larger than yourself

• Presence — when you speak people listen. Not because you’re loud but because you’re

real.

• Curiosity — you ask good questions and you actually listen to the answers

• Community pride — you care about the people who have built their lives and businesses

here

• Persistence — you follow up thoughtfully and keep relationships warm

• Integrity — you represent Lani honestly and let her results speak for themselves

• Eager to grow — in whatever direction feels right for you



Compensation

All figures at current exchange rates (~?57 per $1 USD).



Monthly Base salary

Guaranteed

?42,000

~$737



Travel and Starlink

?20,000

~$351



Total Monthly Base

?62,000

~$1088



Setup commissions

10% per client signed



These figures reflect realistic projections based on two group presentations per year across

multiple industries, a growing referral network, and an expanding client base. Your perpetual

residual income grows every year your book grows — and continues for as long as your clients

remain with Lani.



The perpetual residual is tiered to reward loyalty and long-term commitment:

• Clients 1 to 20 — 2% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 21 to 50 — 3% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 51 to 75 — 4% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 76 to 100 — 5% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients above 100 — 6% of monthly retainer per client

Your book belongs to you. The portfolio of clients you build is yours — value you can hold,

transfer, or one day retire on. The legal structure of book ownership is being developed with our

attorneys and will be fully documented before your first client signs.



How to Apply

Send a WhatsApp message or
 introducing yourself. Tell us:

• A little about your background and where you are based

• Why this role connects with you specifically — not just what you’ve done but what draws

you to this particular work in this particular community

• Tell us about a relationship — in your community, your work, or your personal life —

where both trust and genuine connection were part of the story. What made it real? And

how do you see the difference between the two?

We are not looking for a polished cover letter. We are looking for a real person who connects

with what we are building.

Most people can be trusted to some degree. Fewer people generate genuine connection. The

best relationships — and the best work — happen when both are present. Share your story with

us.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Social Media Manager

5 Seasons Homestays - Property Management & Co-hosting

Location: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)

Schedule: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Salary: $600 - $800 USD/month



About Us

We're a growing vacation rental property management company showcasing beautiful short-term rental properties. We need a creative Social Media Manager to build our brand, create engaging content, and drive bookings through social media.



What You'll Do

Create engaging content for Instagram,
, and TikTok

Transform property photos into dynamic videos using AI tools

Design and publish Instagram/Facebook Stories and Reels

Create and manage
 Ads campaigns to drive bookings

Develop and execute social media content calendar

Engage with followers and build online community

Analyze performance metrics and optimize strategy

Write compelling captions and ad copy





Required Skills

? 2+ years social media management experience (hospitality/travel/real estate preferred)

? AI photo-to-video conversion skills (Runway, Pika, D-ID, CapCut, or similar)

?
 Ads experience - proven track record with campaigns and ROI

? Instagram &
 expertise - Stories, Reels, content best practices

? Content creation - graphics, videos, engaging captions

? Excellent written English

? Self-starter - can work independently

? Full-time availability



Nice to Have

? GoHighLevel (GHL) platform experience

? TikTok content creation

? Graphic design (Canva, Adobe)

? Video editing skills

? Vacation rental/Airbnb social media experience



Compensation

$600 - $800/month (based on experience)



Benefits: Paid time off, holiday pay, flexible schedule, performance bonuses



To Apply - Submit ALL of the following:

1. Resume with social media experience and results

2. Portfolio (REQUIRED):

Links to social media accounts you've managed

Examples of AI-generated videos from photos

 Ads examples with performance metrics

Reels/Stories that performed well

Before/After growth metrics



3. Answer These Questions in a Loom video:

Q1: Which AI tools do you use to convert photos into videos? Describe your process.

Q2: Share a
 Ads campaign you ran - objective, creative, and results (CTR, cost per lead, ROAS).

Q3: You're launching a new luxury vacation rental. What's your 30-day social media strategy?

Q4: Have you used Go High Level? If yes, describe experience. If no, how quickly do you learn new platforms?





We need someone who can start ASAP. If you're creative, data-driven, and skilled with AI video tools and
 Ads, apply now!

title: Meta & Google Ads Specialist
description:
About Us:

We are a private acupuncture clinic focused on high-quality, patient-centered care. Our marketing approach is education-driven and designed to attract the right patients—not a high volume of low-quality leads.



We run a small number of focused campaigns and prioritize clarity, strategy, and long-term results over aggressive scaling.



What We’re Looking For:

We are looking for a Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads specialist who understands that success is not about generating the most leads, but the right leads.



This role is ideal for someone who prefers working thoughtfully with a smaller budget, refining strategy over time, and focusing on quality rather than volume.



You should be comfortable targeting a specific audience, avoiding low-intent leads, and contributing to overall messaging and strategy—not just managing campaigns.



Responsibilities:

Ad Strategy & Campaign Management

     Plan, launch, and manage Meta and Google Ads campaigns

     Work within a limited budget and scale only when performance justifies it

     Focus on lead quality and actual conversion outcomes, not vanity metrics



Targeting & Positioning

     Build highly specific audiences when appropriate

     Understand when to use broader targeting and guide the algorithm with strong inputs

     Align messaging with a premium, health-conscious audience

     Avoid attracting price-sensitive or low-intent leads



Creative Direction & Collaboration

     Work closely with our social media manager to develop aligned strategies

     Clearly communicate ad concepts, messaging, and angles

     Guide and collaborate on creative development (images, videos, copy)

     Ensure creatives support an education-first marketing approach



Performance Analysis

     Evaluate campaigns based on lead quality and consultation bookings

     Continuously refine targeting, messaging, and creative direction



Communication

     Provide clear, concise updates

     Be responsive and open to feedback

     Collaborate effectively with tea
mbers 



AI-Era Expectations:

     Understand how AI-driven ad systems (such as Meta Advantage+ and Google Performance Max) work

     Focus on improving inputs (creative, messaging, audience signals) rather than relying only on manual controls

     Be comfortable testing different messaging angles and learning from data

     Adapt to platform changes without relying on outdated tactics



What We Do NOT Want:

     Someone focused on generating cheap leads just to improve numbers

     Someone who only executes tasks without strategic thinking

     Someone who avoids involvement in creatives

     Someone who relies on outdated tactics or ignores feedback



Requirements:

     2–5+ years of hands-on experience with Meta Ads and Google Ads

     Experience working with small budgets

     Strong understanding of audience targeting and lead quality

     Ability to guide or contribute to ad creatives

     Strong communication and collaboration skills



We care more about how you think and make decisions than the number of years you’ve worked.



Job Details:



Part-time (ongoing)

Monthly pay: $400–$600 USD (based on experience)

Approximately 15–20 hours per week (flexible based on workload)

Opportunity for a performance-based bonus and compensation increase over time



This role is designed for long-term collaboration. As results improve, there will be opportunities to grow compensation and responsibility.



How to Apply:

     Please include:

          A short introduction (5–6 sentences max)

         1–2 examples of campaigns you managed (include budget, goal, and result)

         Your answer to this question:

         If your campaign is generating many cheap leads but low conversions, what would you do?

         Briefly explain how AI has changed your approach to running ads

          How you define a high-quality lead



Important:

     To confirm that you read this entire job post, please use the following subject line in your application:

     Quality Over Quantity – Ads Specialist

     Applications without this subject line will not be considered.

title: Marketing & Growth Specialist (Capital Raising / Investment Sales Focus)
description:
Part-Time / Full-Time (Fixed Monthly Retainer)

$500 - $1000



Job Overview:

I am looking for a strategic Marketing Specialist to help scale an investment sales operation. We focus on business owners and entrepreneurs who are looking to raise capital (PPMs, private equity, etc.). You will be responsible for completing our customer profiles, refining our website messaging, and executing outreach to high-level decision-makers.



Key Responsibilities:



Customer Persona Development: Finish our "Ideal Investor" and "Capital-Seeking Founder" profiles. You must understand the pain points of high-net-worth individuals.



Website Content & Conversion: Work with me to finalize website copy that builds authority. You should know how to turn a "visitor" into a "qualified lead."



High-Level Outreach: Manage LinkedIn and
 campaigns targeting business owners. No "spammy" tactics—we use high-authority, executive-style communication.



Zoho Integration: (Bonus) Assist in ensuring marketing leads flow correctly into our Zoho CRM/Books ecosystem.



Required Experience:



Proven track record in B2B Marketing or Investor Relations.



Experience writing for a sophisticated audience (Business owners, CEOs, Investors).



Ability to think strategically about a "funnel"—from first touch to a signed PPM.



Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator and CRM workflows.



How to Apply:



Start your message with "STRATEGIC GROWTH."



Provide a brief summary of any experience you have in the finance, investment, or real estate sectors.



Include a link to a writing sample or a website you have worked on.



Confirm your availability for a fixed monthly retainer.

title: Zoho Books Specialist ($100+/mo Fixed Retainer) – Setup & Expense Tracking
description:
am looking for a detail-oriented Zoho Books specialist to manage my business accounting. We have very low transaction volume, so I am looking for a fixed-price partnership rather than hourly billing. My primary goal is 100?curacy in expense tracking and a clean, automated setup.



Scope of Work (Fixed Monthly Deliverables):



Initial Cleanup (Month 1): Review and optimize the Chart of Accounts for investment sales/PPM structure. Sync all bank feeds.



Monthly Categorization: Ensure every single expense is categorized correctly (no "uncategorized" items).



Receipt Management: Monitor the Zoho Receipt inbox to ensure all digital receipts match the bank transactions.



Monthly Reconciliation: Reconcile all bank and credit card statements by the 5th of each month.



Monthly Report: Send a brief P&L summary and a "Missing Receipts" list once a month.



Requirements:



Expertise in Zoho Books is non-negotiable. (Please do not apply if you only know QuickBooks).



Experience setting up Bank Rules and Automated Workflows in Zoho.



Background in Accounting or Bookkeeping (CPA preferred but not required).



High attention to detail—you must be someone who catches the "small things."



How to Apply:



Start your application with the word "ZOHO EXPERT" so I know you read this.



Briefly describe your experience setting up Zoho Books from scratch.



Confirm that you are comfortable with a $100+/month (negotiate) fixed retainer for this low-volume role.

title: Job Title: Investment Sales Specialist – PPM & Financial Products
description:
ob Description

We are seeking a high-energy, experienced Investment Sales Specialist to join our team. This role is specifically for a professional who understands the nuances of Private Placement Memorandums (PPMs) and has a background in high-level financial sales.



If you have experience as a Stock Broker, Investment Consultant, or have successfully raised capital using PPMs, we want to hear from you. You will be responsible for communicating complex financial structures to potential investors and driving growth for our platform.



Key Responsibilities:



Consult with potential investors regarding our PPM offerings.



Manage the end-to-end sales cycle for sophisticated financial products.



Provide clear, compliant, and professional explanations of investment risks and rewards.



Maintain a high level of confidentiality and professionalism.



Requirements:



Proven track record in Financial Sales (Stock Brokerage, Private Equity, or similar).



Deep understanding of PPMs and private offering structures.



Exceptional English communication skills (written and verbal).



Ability to work independently and meet sales targets.



Suggested Settings for your Post:

Type of Employment: Choose Full Time or Part Time based on your current scale.



Wage/Salary: For this level of expertise, you might consider a base salary plus commission. A common starting range for specialized financial VAs is $800 – $1,200/month base, but you can click Suggest a Salary on the page to see current market rates.



Skills Requirement: 1.  Sales Representative

2.  Financial Analysis

3.  Investment Research



Pro-Tip: In the "Skills" search box on your screen, try searching for "Capital Raising" or "Investor Relations" to find candidates who specifically handle these high-value tasks.

title: Website & Marketing Specialist – Private Placement Memorandum (PPM) Expert (AI Savvy)
description:
Overview:

I am looking for a results-driven collaborator to finalize the Marketing and Selling section of my PPM website. This role is crucial for completing the profiling system and scripts used to secure funding. You will be working directly with me to ensure our "person raising money" has a foolproof script to approach and close prospects.



Key Responsibilities:



Website Finalization: Complete the setup for the marketing/selling funnel on our PPM site.



AI Integration: Utilize AI (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to refine messaging and accelerate content creation.



Scriptwriting: Finalize the "PPM Funding Script" for the fundraiser and the corresponding "Prospect Pitch."



Prospect Profiling: Complete the explanation of the profiling system to help fundraisers identify the best potential investors.



Requirements:



Knowledge of PPM/Finance: Understanding of Private Placement Memorandums and the capital-raising process.



AI Power User: Advanced skills in prompt engineering to generate scripts and marketing copy.



Sales Copywriting: Ability to write persuasive, professional scripts for high-stakes financial conversations.



Technical Setup: Familiarity with website backend marketing sections (landing pages, funnel logic).



Review the website

title: Community Development Representative  El Nido, Palawan

We are hiring Community Development Representatives in five destinations across the

Philippines — Siargao, El Nido, Coron, Bohol and Panglao, and Boracay. This posting is for El

Nido, Palawan.

today — and that path can evolve as your life and experience develop.

• Comfortable with WhatsApp,
, and basic digital tools — you don’t need to be

technical but technology shouldn’t rattle you

• English proficiency — written and spoken



Personal qualities — these matter more than your resume

We don’t expect any candidate to embody all of these perfectly. But if most of them feel like a

• Eager to grow — in whatever direction feels right for you

multiple industries, a growing referral network, and an expanding client base. Your perpetual

residual income grows every year your book grows — and continues for as long as your clients

remain with Lani.



The perpetual residual is tiered to reward loyalty and long-term commitment:

• Clients 1 to 20 — 2% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 21 to 50 — 3% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 51 to 75 — 4% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 76 to 100 — 5% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients above 100 — 6% of monthly retainer per client

Your book belongs to you. The portfolio of clients you build is yours — value you can hold,

transfer, or one day retire on. The legal structure of book ownership is being developed with our

attorneys and will be fully documented before your first client signs.



How to Apply

Send a WhatsApp message or
 introducing yourself. Tell us:

• A little about your background and where you are based

• Why this role connects with you specifically — not just what you’ve done but what draws

you to this particular work in this particular community

• Tell us about a relationship — in your community, your work, or your personal life —

where both trust and genuine connection were part of the story. What made it real? And

how do you see the difference between the two?

We are not looking for a polished cover letter. We are looking for a real person who connects

with what we are building.

Most people can be trusted to some degree. Fewer people generate genuine connection. The

best relationships — and the best work — happen when both are present. Share your story with

us.

title: Community Development Representative Siargao · El Nido · Coron · Bohol and Panglao · Boracay  Lani
description:
Who We Are

Maayong adlaw. Good day.

Lani handles guest and customer inquiries on WhatsApp,
, Instagram, and
. She

responds to reviews. She captures direct bookings. She follows up with guests before and after

their stay. She does all of this instantly, in the business’s own voice, while the owners sleep.

She works for owner-operated businesses — not chains, not large resorts with IT departments.

The people who built something with their own hands and compete with properties and

businesses that have resources they don’t have.

We are in this community together. That’s not a marketing line. It’s why she exists.



The Opportunity

This is not a typical sales role — and not a tech role either. The ideal person for this position is

part presenter, part community builder, part trusted local presence. You will be the face of this

effort — embedded in the hospitality and tourism community of your destination, genuinely

invested in the success of the people you work with, and comfortable introducing Lani to

business owners who’ve never seen anything like her before.

Lani sells herself. Your job will be to get in front of people — and we will support you in that —

tell the story well, demonstrate something remarkable in real time, and build the kind of

relationships that make people want to say yes — and want to bring their friends along too.

This role comes with two possible growth paths. Some people are natural community builders

who thrive by going deeper in one territory — expanding their client base, strengthening their

community roots, and growing their income steadily over time. Others have leadership

ambitions and want to mentor new ambassadors, oversee multiple territories, and grow into a

regional role. Both paths are equally valued here. You choose the one that fits who you are

today — and that path can evolve as your life and experience develop.



What You Will Do

• Identify and attend local hospitality gatherings, tourism council meetings, DOT events,

restaurant association events, surf operator meetups, and industry get-togethers where

independent business owners congregate

• Deliver a compelling group presentation to rooms of boutique hotel owners, restaurant

operators, surf schools, and activity operators — live, interactive, and anchored in their

specific numbers — including a live demonstration of Lani being activated in real time in

front of the room

• Walk individual prospects through a one-on-one demonstration that shows the specific

revenue their business is currently leaving on the table — Lani does the heavy lifting,

your job is to start the conversation



• Build genuine relationships with independent business owners across the tourism

economy — before, during, and long after they become clients

• Ensure existing clients feel well served and are getting real value — staying present in

the relationship not just at the point of sale

• Introduce clients to the opportunity of joining a growing community of independent

operators — warmly and without pressure — and nurture that community as it develops

• Attend local hospitality and tourism events as a genuine community presence — not as

a vendor but as someone who belongs there

• Have regular conversations with the founder to share what you are learning and to get

support on whatever arises — whether it is a tough situation, an unexpected opportunity,

or simply something worth thinking through together

• Report weekly on conversations, feedback, and market insights

• Follow whichever growth path fits you — deepen your territory over time or grow into a

leadership role as the team expands across the Philippines



What We Are Looking For

Experience and background

We are looking for someone who already belongs to one of these communities — or could walk

into it tomorrow and feel completely at home. The ideal background, in order of priority:

• First priority — hospitality and tourism: experience with boutique hotels, resorts, or

guesthouses as an owner, manager, or guest relations professional. You understand the

world of the independent hotel owner from the inside.

• Second priority — food and beverage: experience with restaurants, cafes, or bars in a

tourism destination. You know the pressures of running a small F&B operation and the

pain of missed reservations and unanswered messages.

• Third priority — surf schools and activity operators: familiarity with the surf and outdoor

activity community. You know the operators, the culture, and the seasonal rhythms.

• Also valued — dive shops and vacation rental operators. Any experience in these

industries is a genuine plus.

• Based in or willing to be deeply and consistently present in your destination

• Comfortable speaking in front of a group — you don’t need to be a professional

presenter but you need to be someone people enjoy listening to

• Existing relationships within the local business community is a significant advantage

• Comfortable with WhatsApp,
, and basic digital tools — you don’t need to be

technical but technology shouldn’t rattle you

• English proficiency — written and spoken



Personal qualities — these matter more than your resume



We don’t expect any candidate to embody all of these perfectly. But if most of them feel like a

genuine description of who you are, we would love to hear from you.

• Genuine warmth — people feel comfortable around you quickly

• A natural connector — you enjoy introducing people to each other and building

something larger than yourself

• Presence — when you speak people listen. Not because you’re loud but because you’re

real.

• Curiosity — you ask good questions and you actually listen to the answers

• Community pride — you care about the people who have built their lives and businesses

here

• Persistence — you follow up thoughtfully and keep relationships warm

• Integrity — you represent Lani honestly and let her results speak for themselves

• Eager to grow — in whatever direction feels right for you



Compensation

All figures at current exchange rates (~?57 per $1 USD).



Monthly Base salary

Guaranteed

?42,000

~$737



Travel and Starlink

?20,000

~$351



Total Monthly Base

?62,000

~$1088



Setup commissions

10% per client signed



These figures reflect realistic projections based on two group presentations per year across

multiple industries, a growing referral network, and an expanding client base. Your perpetual

residual income grows every year your book grows — and continues for as long as your clients

remain with Lani.



The perpetual residual is tiered to reward loyalty and long-term commitment:

• Clients 1 to 20 — 2% of monthly retainer per client

• Clients 51 to 75 — 4% of monthly retainer per client

Your book belongs to you. The portfolio of clients you build is yours — value you can hold,

title: Care Concierge (2026)
description:
Join Our Innovative and Impactful Team as a Remote Care Concierge!

We invite you to join us in making a difference in the lives of families and individuals seeking autism diagnosis, with the flexibility and autonomy provided by contracted remote work. At Autism Diagnosis Group, we are at the forefront of transforming autism diagnosis and support.



Company: Autism Diagnosis Group

Location: Remote



About Us:

Autism Diagnosis Group is a pioneering startup dedicated to transforming the landscape of autism diagnosis through remote evaluations. Our mission is to provide accessible, comprehensive, and accurate autism diagnostic services to individuals and families, regardless of their location. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our innovative team.



Position Overview:

We are seeking a dedicated Care Concierge to be the primary point of contact for our clients. The Care Concierge will help families and individuals schedule autism diagnostic evaluations, support them in assembling pre-visit assessments, guide them through the diagnostic process, and provide additional support after a diagnosis, while representing our company with professionalism and empathy.



The Process:

As part of the interview process, we may you to do a small presentation so please only apply if you are able to do a presentation. Also, as we get a lot of interview requests, in your request, please indicate why this would be a good opportunity for you, a little about your background and, most importantly, what is the answer to 3+9. Yes, its a very simple answer, but we want someone who will pay attention to details and be interested in this job.



Key Responsibilities:

• Assist families and individuals in scheduling autism diagnostic evaluations

• Walk clients through the diagnostic process and set expectations

• Collect and verify necessary information (e.g., insurance, pre-visit assessments) ahead of upcoming appointments

• Serve as the face of the company, providing excellent customer service and support

• Communicate effectively with clients, addressing any questions or concerns

• Maintain accurate records and documentation

• Help patients navigate care following a diagnosis (e.g., research clinicians/care centers in their area and provide a referral)

• Perform ad hoc research projects to help improve our team's operations



Qualifications:

• Fluency in English, ability to work largely EST or PST hours

• Private work-from-home set-up to avoid disruptions

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

• A resourceful and resilient attitude, ability to manage your own work

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

• Experience in customer service

• Proficient in Microsoft Office and experience with EHR systems is a plus!



What We Offer:

• Competitive compensation

• Flexible remote working opportunities

• A supportive and innovative work environment and the opportunity to make an impact in the field of autism diagnosis

title: Video Editor & YouTube Strategist (Daily Reaction Content)
description:
About the Brand:

We run 'The Maximus Breakdown,' a highly active daily media brand focused on news, politics, and culture. We have a massive, established footprint on
 and Instagram, and our primary goal right now is to aggressively scale and monetize our YouTube channel. We need a reliable, sharp Video Editor to take over the daily production.



The Role:

This is a consistent, daily position. You will take raw reaction footage and turn it into a high-retention viewing experience.



Daily Long-Form: Edit ONE 8-12 minute 'Reaction Style' video per day.

Daily Short-Form: Extract 4-7 viral-ready 'Shorts' or 'Reels' from that daily long-form video.



The Editing Style: We do not use heavy B-roll. We focus on fast-paced 'Reaction' editing. This includes:

Dynamic Framing: Using punch-ins and zooms to emphasize facial reactions and key talking points.

Audio Mastering: Balancing the host's microphone audio with the original video audio so it sounds flawless.

On-Screen Graphics: Adding bold text call-outs for names or facts, and dynamic captions for the Shorts.



YouTube Growth & Bonus Skills:

We are looking for a partner to help build this channel. If you have proven experience growing a YouTube channel, that is a massive plus. If you can also create high-clickability thumbnails and handle the backend SEO/uploading, you will be moved to the front of the line.



Compensation & Growth:

Starting Salary: $75 USD per week.

Workload: 1 long-form edit + 4-7 shorts daily (Approximately 1.5–2 hours of work per day).

Growth: This is a performance-based partnership. As you help grow the YouTube channel, increase views, and boost monetization, your pay will increase right alongside it. We want you to win as the brand wins.



How to Apply:

Please send a link to your portfolio showing your best fast-paced or reaction-style edits. If you have YouTube management or thumbnail experience, include examples. To prove you pay attention to details, start your application with the word: POWER.

title: AI Engineer
description:
About Cynergists: We provide advanced AI Agents designed to empower businesses to automate workflows, maximize productivity, and unlock limitless growth. We don't just fill seats; we deploy operations. Cynergists is moving beyond traditional staffing to define the future of intelligent automation. 

The Role: We are looking for a hungry, tech-curious individual to join our team. You do not need years of tech sales experience to apply. If you are coachable and ready to learn, our proprietary AI Sales Trainer will get you up to speed quickly.

Your primary goal is simple: Talk to business owners, identify their operational "bottlenecks," and match them with the perfect AI Agent from our catalog. If we don't have an agent ready, you will help scope a Custom AI Build to solve their unique problem.

Key Responsibilities:

Diagnostic Selling: Engage with leads to understand their current workflows and pain points. You aren’t just selling; you are diagnosing inefficiencies.

The "Matchmaker" Process:

Assess the client’s needs.

Direct them to the specific AI Agent on our website that solves that problem.

If a pre-made Agent doesn't exist, coordinate with our tech team to propose a Custom AI Agent Build.

Rapid Skill Development: Work daily with Briggs, our AI Sales Trainer, to refine your pitch, learn objection handling, and master the art of AI consulting.

Pipeline Management: Utilize Go High Level (GHL) to track leads, schedule follow-ups, and manage your deals from initial conversation to close.

Market Feedback: Listen to what business owners are asking for and relay that back to the development team to help us build the next generation of AI Agents.

What We Are Looking For:

Coachability is King: We value the ability to learn over a 10-page resume. You must be willing to train with Briggs and adapt your approach.

Tech-Savvy Mindset: You don't need to be a coder, but you must be excited about AI and comfortable navigating software.

Problem-Solving Skills: You need to be able to listen to a business owner complain about a task and immediately think, "I have an Agent for that."

Communication: Clear, confident verbal and written communication skills are non-negotiable.

GHL Experience: Proficiency in Go High Level is a plus, but not required if you are a fast learner.

Why Join Cynergists?

Cutting-Edge Training: Access to Briggs, our AI Sales Trainer, providing you with real-time feedback and development.

Sell the Future: You aren't selling outdated services; you are selling the most in-demand technology in the world.

Competitive Commission: Uncapped earning potential based on performance.

Remote Freedom: Work from anywhere with a supportive, innovative team.

To Apply: If you are ready to pivot your career into the world of Artificial Intelligence, submit your resume to 
 us why you think AI is the future of business in your cover letter.

title: Ecommerce Operations VA
description:
Work Type: Remote

Schedule: Part-time (4–6 hours/day, with potential to expand)

Time Zone: Must work during US Pacific Time (live availability required)



About the Role:

We are a US based e-commerce company, selling water filtration and plumbing supplies, looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Operations VA to support daily execution across customer service, admin, and ecommerce operations.

This is a real-time, execution-focused role. You will be working live during US business hours, handling tasks as they come in, and ensuring operations run smoothly throughout the day.

This role is ideal for someone who is organized, proactive, and responsive, and can handle multiple responsibilities without constant supervision.

________________________________________

Primary Responsibilities:

• Handle customer service and scripted tech support 
, chat, and basic phone answering/routing) 

• Resolve customer issues related to orders, returns, and shipments 

• Input and update inventory data accurately 

• Perform basic inventory reconciliation tasks

• Communicate and assist across different teams (customer service, warehouse, operations) to ensure tasks are completed efficiently

• Maintain and update Google Sheets (sales tracking, operations logs, etc.) 

• Input weekly sales data into tracking sheets 

• Create and maintain packing sheets/catalogs in Google Sheets 

• Assist with placing purchase orders (POs) 

• Perform general administrative and operational support tasks as assigned 

• Execute tasks in real-time during shift and respond promptly to requests 

________________________________________

What This Job Is NOT:

• No advanced technical development work 

• No marketing strategy or ad management 

• No graphic design or branding work 

• No high-level business decision making 

• This is a hands-on execution and operations support role 

________________________________________

Required Skills:

• Strong English communication (written and verbal; phone capable) 

• Experience in customer service and scripted light tech support (ecommerce preferred) 

• Comfortable handling live tasks and real-time requests 

• Strong attention to detail (especially for orders and inventory) 

• Proficient in Google Sheets / Excel 

• Organized and able to track tasks and progress clearly 

• Ability to follow instructions and SOPs accurately 

• Reliable internet connection and stable work environment 

• Ability to work during US Pacific Time hours

________________________________________

Nice to Have:

• Experience with Shopify, Amazon, or ecommerce platforms 

• Experience with ShipStation or shipping tools 

• Experience handling returns and logistics issues 

• Basic understanding of inventory systems 

• Experience in operations or administrative roles in ecommerce 

________________________________________

Work Expectations:

• Real-time task execution during US business hours 

• Must be online and available throughout the shift 

• Fast response time to messages and task assignments 

• Tasks and progress must be clearly tracked and documented 

• Proactive mindset — do not wait for instructions when work is available 

• Consistent and clear communication is required 

• Stable, long-term working relationship preferred 

________________________________________

To Apply, Answer the following:

1. Customer Service Experience

Describe your experience handling customer support 
/chat/phone). 

2. Ecommerce Experience

Have you worked with Shopify, Amazon, or similar platforms? What did you do?

AI tools



content creation



video editing



short-form content workflows



viral-style content production
