title: Ad Creative Assistant (Content Editing & Social Posting)
description:
Ad Creative Assistant (Content Editing & Social Posting – 2 Brands)

________________________________________

Job Overview

We are hiring a Creative Assistant to help edit existing photos/videos and turn them into usable marketing content.

You will be working across TWO brands:

1. eCommerce brand (established, 10+ years) selling water filtration and plumbing supplies — primary focus 

2. Local plumbing service (new startup) — secondary, lighter workload 

This is a production-focused role, not a design or strategy role.

________________________________________

Important: Multi-Brand Responsibility

This role requires you to:

• Work across two different brands 

• Follow different styles and content patterns for each 

• Stay organized and consistent when switching between brands 

We will provide:

• Clear examples 

• Templates 

• Guidelines 

Your role is to follow and apply each brand correctly, not create from scratch.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Content Editing

• Resize and crop images/videos for: 

o Social media 
, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, X) 

o Ads (Meta, Google, TikTok) 

o Website use (Shopify) 

• Create simple variations (text overlays, formatting) 

• Cut and edit short clips from longer videos 

________________________________________

Video Review & Clip Selection

• Review longer raw videos and identify usable highlights 

• Select key 
nts that can be turned into short-form content 

• Create short clips for social media (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) 

• Focus on clear, useful segments (no over-editing required) 

________________________________________

Social Media Posting

• Post content on a fixed schedule 

• Follow provided templates and examples 

• Maintain consistency for both brands 

________________________________________

Content Organization

• Organize files in Google Drive/Network Drive

• Maintain clear folder structure and naming 

• Keep assets separated and easy to find per brand 

________________________________________

Light Content Direction

• Provide simple feedback on raw content: 

o Angles 

o Lighting 

o Missing shots 

• Suggest what content is needed (before/after, demo, etc.) 

________________________________________

Branding (Execution-Level Only)

• Follow brand examples and templates 

• Match existing style and formatting 

• Maintain consistency across posts 

You are not required to create branding strategy

________________________________________

Work Allocation

• Primary Focus (~70%) – eCommerce brand 

o Product content and marketing assets 

• Secondary Focus (~30%) – Local plumbing service 

o Simple, consistent social posting 

o Lower complexity 

________________________________________

Requirements

• Detail-oriented and highly organized 

• Able to follow instructions exactly 

• Comfortable managing tasks across multiple brands 

• Fast and responsive in communication 

• Able to recognize patterns and apply them consistently 

• Able to review content and identify useful clips from longer videos 

________________________________________

Tools & Setup (Required)

You must have your own tools and active subscriptions to perform this role.

This includes:

• Canva (Pro preferred) 

• CapCut or equivalent editing software 

• Reliable computer capable of handling image/video editing 

We do not provide software subscriptions for this role.

________________________________________

Work Style Requirement (Important)

This role is best for someone who:

• Prefers clear systems and structure 

• Can handle repeatable tasks across multiple brands 

• Focuses on execution and efficiency 

• Communicates clearly and responds quickly 

This role is NOT suitable if you:

• Prefer creative freedom 

• Like to redesign or change styles frequently 

• Want to create new concepts from scratch 

________________________________________

Asset Ownership, Licensing & File Delivery

All content and assets are the property of the company.

You are required to:

• Provide all final edited files in full resolution 

• Provide source/editable files when applicable (e.g., Canva projects) 

• Upload and organize all assets in our Google Drive/Network Drive 

• Maintain clear file naming and folder structure 

All work created under this role is considered work-for-hire.

The company retains full ownership and licensing rights to all content created, including unrestricted rights to use, modify, distribute, and publish the content.

We must have full access and control of all assets at all times.

No files should be kept privately or withheld.

________________________________________

Compensation

• Long-term position 

• Consistent workload 

________________________________________

Application Questions

To be considered, please answer the following:

1. Provide examples of content you’ve edited 

2. What tools do you use? (include your active subscriptions) 

3. How do you organize files/folders for multiple projects or brands? 

4. If given 20 photos + 5 videos, what is your first step? 

5. How do you improve low-quality content? 

6. If given 5 sample posts, how do you match the style? 

7. Do you prefer following systems or creating your own approach? Why? 

8. How do you manage tasks when working on multiple brands? 

9. Have you worked with long videos before? How do you d
 which parts to clip? 

10. Internet speed + backup plan 

11. Availability (hours/week, timezone) 

________________________________________

Final Note

You will be working across two brands, so organization and consistency are critical.

We are looking for someone who can:

• Follow structure 

• Communicate clearly and respond quickly 

• Stay organized 

• Execute reliably 

• Manage multiple workflows without confusion

title: Web Content Writer
description:
A Web Content Writer specializing in SEO is responsible for creating engaging, high-quality content that improves a website’s visibility in search engines and attracts target audiences. This role involves researching relevant keywords, understanding search intent, and producing optimized content such as website pages, service descriptions, and landing pages. The writer ensures all content is clear, informative, and aligned with the brand’s voice while strategically incorporating keywords, meta descriptions, headers, and internal links to boost search rankings.



Key responsibilities include conducting keyword research, analyzing competitors, and identifying content opportunities that drive organic traffic. The writer collaborates with marketing teams to develop content strategies, update existing pages for better performance, and follow SEO best practices such as proper formatting, readability, and mobile optimization.



A successful SEO Web Content Writer has strong writing and editing skills, a solid understanding of on-page SEO, and the ability to adapt content for different audiences and industries. Attention to detail, creativity, and the ability to meet deadlines are essential. This role plays a critical part in increasing brand awareness, driving website traffic, and converting visitors into customers.

title: Meticulous UX Designer
description:
Are you obsessed with how designs look and feel? Do you believe great design can change lives? Let’s team up.



We believe in people. This is why we only work with clients who serve people. From firefighters, to law firms, to suppliers sending life-saving food to kids dying of malnutrition, the work you do will help make the world a better place.



Our team is made up of people who want to do the best work of their life. People who love to learn, challenge themselves, grow and have some fun along the journey. We also care about each other – we support each other in our own personal goals and vision. We are human beings before employees and we love to bring out the best in each other.



Now, ready to learn more about this opening? Buckle up.



If you work here, you’ll:

- Be challenged to do the best work of your life in a supportive environment.

- Become the best communicator you can become (this is the most important thing we do).

- Have the space to ask questions, voice your feedback, and make a difference.

- Help shape the design of our products from the ground up, participating in stimulating conversations with like-minded people.



What you could be working on:

- Designing intuitive, scalable interfaces for that solve real problems.

- Turning rough ideas, feedback notes, or “brain dumps” into clear user flows, wireframes and mockups that tell a story from start to finish.

- Building and maintaining a thoughtful design system that keeps our tools consistent, accessible, and efficient 

- Working closely with developers throughout implementation, reviewing builds, and fine-tuning details to make sure the final output matches the design intent.

- Refining the small details that elevate the experience, including micro-interactions, states (hover, active, error, empty), spacing, iconography, and motion.

- Simplifying complex workflows by breaking them into logical, digestible steps and removing unnecessary friction wherever possible.

- Contributing to product discussions early by challenging assumptions, suggesting alternative approaches, and advocating for the user perspective.

- Supporting clear design handoffs with well-organized files, annotated flows, and defined components so the team can build efficiently.



You’ll do well in this job if you:

- Bring at least 3 years of experience with building designs and UX

- Have a strong sense of visual design, always putting usability first. You obsess about how design looks, and you care even more about how they work.

- Communicate clearly and confidently in English, and can walk others through the reasoning behind your design decisions. You don’t just say what looks better, you explain why it solves the problem.

- Enjoy exploring new tools and improving your workflow, whether that’s Figma or anything else that helps you do better work. - You’re naturally helpful and like making collaboration easier for everyone.

- Have clear opinions on best practices, but stay open to feedback. You’re confident in your thinking, yet flexible enough to test, refine, and evolve your ideas.

- Have the persistence to push for a better user experience, even when it takes extra effort. You don’t settle for “good enough” if you know it can be improved.

- Pay close attention to detail. If something is slightly misaligned or inconsistent, you notice it and fix it.

- Can take a rough collection of ideas and turn it into a clear, structured, and polished layout independently. You’re comfortable shaping ambiguity into something concrete.

- Are okay with healthy debate. If something doesn’t serve the user, you’re willing to say so and back it up with solid reasoning.

- Take ownership of handoffs. Your files are clean, layers are organized, and notes are clear so developers and teammates can move quickly without guesswork.

- Approach problems with curiosity. If a button isn’t being clicked or a form isn’t being completed, you want to dig in and understand what’s really going on.



You probably shouldn’t apply if:

- You’re “just looking for extra money.”

- You like working 5 full-time jobs because all you care about is work.

- You get offended easily and take things personally.

- You are not someone with grit and determination who can persevere while being challenged to do great work.

- You get overwhelmed easily, new habits, new learnings and chat messages.



The interview process:

- Since 99% of our work is done via Slack (we don’t do scheduled calls), the entire interview process will be via
. (With lots of questions, sprinkled with a few voice notes)



If you work here:

- You’ll get 13th month salary, Filipino holidays, unlimited time off (we don’t count sick days), a normal working day schedule (no night shifts, although an early start is preferred for time overlap) with some flexibility, a week off during the holidays in December, and the opportunity to grow and become your best self.



A little more about us:

- We’ve been in business for a decade+. Our teams are remote (mostly in the Philippines). Our longest standing tea
mber has been with us for over 14+ years. We've had people quit smoking on our teams with our help, lose weight, learn a new instrument, speak a new language, and more. We all love what we do.



How to begin:

- Your mission, should you choose to accept, is to send us an
 with 3 questions you have about this role. If you’re currently in a full-time role and are looking for something new, we’re open to a transition window. We actually care about your happiness.



NOTE: While we like AI, and we use it in certain circumstances, we ask that no AI be used during communication. Communication is the most important thing we do. If I don't see your natural voice from our first interaction, then you're setting an inaccurate representation of who you are and how you communicate. And when I see that change, it's going to come across as a lack of harmony in how you communicate.

title: Finance & AI Systems Operator (Build Systems, Not Reports)
description:
Are you someone who does not just manage numbers — but builds systems around them?



Residentas is an international hospitality company operating premium properties in Europe and the United States.



We are building one of the most AI-integrated operations in our industry — including our finance function.



This is not a traditional finance role.



We are not looking for a bookkeeper.



We are looking for a Finance & AI Systems Operator — someone who understands financial operations deeply and immediately asks:



- how do I structure this

- how do I automate this

- how do I turn this into decisions



If you think finance is about reports, this role is not for you.



If you think finance is about building systems that drive the business — read on.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



Financial Operations (Foundation)

- Managing core finance workflows: invoicing, reconciliation, accounts payable/receivable

- Supporting cross-border finance (US & Portugal)

- Working with tools such as Stripe, Guesty, InvoiceXpress

- Liaising with external accountants and tax advisors



Systems & Control (THIS IS THE REAL JOB)

- Connecting and reconciling data across systems

- Identifying inconsistencies and fixing root causes

- Building financial visibility (cash, revenue, costs)

- Flagging risks before they become problems



Automation & AI

- Identifying manual processes and eliminating them

- Building automations (Zapier, Make, etc.)

- Using AI (ChatGPT, Claude) to:

          - analyze financial data

          - improve reporting

          - reduce manual work



Decision Support

- Creating dashboards and scorecards leadership actually uses

- Structuring data so it becomes decision-ready



QUALITIES WE VALUE



-- Financial Rigour: You understand numbers deeply and care about accuracy

-- Systems Thinking: You redesign processes, not just execute them

-- AI Fluency: You actively use AI to improve your work

-- Ownership: You take responsibility and solve problems

-- Judgment: You know when something is wrong — and act



REQUIREMENTS



-- Minimum 2 years experience in finance / accounting / operations

-- Strong Excel / Google Sheets

-- Experience using AI tools in real work

-- Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make or similar)

-- Strong English

-- Ability to work independently

-- Bonus: cross-border finance, Stripe, dashboards, hospitality



WHAT WILL DISQUALIFY YOU



- No real finance experience

- No examples of systems or automation built

- Generic applications

- Treating finance as data entry



THE BENEFITS



- Salary: 60,000 – 90,000 PHP per month

- Performance bonus based on impact

- 100% remote

- Direct exposure to leadership

- You will build the systems that run the company



HOW TO APPLY



1. Send a message on OnlineJobs with subject: FA1

2. You will receive a link to our application form

3. On the form:

- Complete all fields

- In the comments write: FA1

4. Selected candidates will be invited to:

- Submit a short Loom video (preferred), or a written response (exceptional clarity required)

- Complete a practical test



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.

title: LEGAL VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — JACKSON LAW FIRM, P.C.
description:
About Us

Jackson Law Firm, P.C. is a personal injury and workers' compensation law firm based in St. Louis, Missouri. We represent injured clients throughout the St. Louis area in automobile a
 cases, premises liability, workers' compensation, and related matters. We are growing and looking for a sharp, organized, and highly motivated Legal Virtual Assistant to join our team and deliver excellent service alongside our attorney.



What You Will Do

Answer all incoming calls via RingCentral; collect client information and connect calls to the attorney

Manage the attorney's Google Calendar — schedule consultations, client calls, court appearances, and depositions (no same-day scheduling without explicit attorney approval)

Triage and manage the firm's Gmail inbox; draft routine correspondence for attorney review and approval before sending

Order and track medical records using YoCierge, the firm's primary records retrieval platform; obtain attorney approval before submitting any order

Prepare medical authorization bundles for client signature using YoCierge's YoSign electronic authorization system, with paper backup authorizations available when needed

Organize and maintain all client files in CasePeer case management software using the firm's file naming conventions

Assist in migrating existing client files from Google Drive into CasePeer

Open insurance claims and send Letters of Representation (LORs) to adjusters for attorney review

Assist with bill verification and demand letter preparation

Submit a daily End of Day Report covering completed tasks, problems encountered, and incomplete items



Requirements

4-year university degree or international equivalent — required

Exceptional spoken and written English — clear, professional phone presence is non-negotiable

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple matters simultaneously

Proficiency in Google Suite — Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Google Docs

Ability to learn new software quickly — CasePeer and YoCierge training provided

High attention to detail — especially in document naming, file organization, and correspondence

Self-starter who follows through without constant supervision

Reliable high-speed internet connection and quiet, professional home office environment

Prior legal or medical administrative experience is a strong plus but not required

Item

Details

Salary

$1,700/month

Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

Annual Bonus

Eligible for annual performance bonus at attorney's discretion based on firm performance

15 working days per year

Per applicable firm policy

description:
We run a local clinic where every conversion starts with a phone call.

We're not looking for someone to manage campaigns. We're looking for someone who thinks in calls — who understands that in our market, the quality of who calls matters more than how many people call.

If you've only optimized for volume, this probably isn't the right fit.

What you'll be doing



Manage and optimize Google Ads Search campaigns

Identify and eliminate wasted spend from search terms

Improve call quality — not just call volume

Review and improve call tracking and attribution

Align ads and landing pages with real caller intent

Diagnose whether problems come from traffic quality, tracking gaps, landing pages, or call handling



What matters to us



Fewer junk calls, higher percentage of qualified calls

Higher booking rate per call

Clear thinking and fast decisions

Direct communication — no fluff



What we're looking for



Proven experience with Google Ads Search for local lead generation

Experience with call-driven accounts where not every caller is a qualified lead

Strong grasp of search terms, negative keyword strategy, match types, and geo and device performance

Ability to act, not just analyze



A strong plus

Experience in verticals where caller qualification is a core problem — legal, dental, home services, financial services, or similar. You don't need to know our industry. You need to have solved this type of problem before.

To apply

Send us a brief note covering:



What type of accounts you've managed and roughly how long

One call-driven account you've worked on — what the main problem was and what you did about it

Your availability for a short Zoom call



Next step

Qualified applicants will be invited to a live Zoom session where we walk through real account scenarios together. No presentations, no decks. Just a conversation about how you think.

title: Business Development Representative (SDR) - Remote Job
description:
ITDW Group is seeking a talented Sales Development Representative to support our global sales efforts and help revolutionize the industry.

What You’ll Do:

• Generate new business opportunities to drive revenue growth.

• Collaborate with sales leadership to create, prioritize, and qualify strategic target account lists.

• Prospect and cold call into key strategic accounts to initiate new business.

• Qualify inbound leads and convert them into sales pipeline opportunities.

• Call and
 prospective clients, initiate conversations, and communicate ITDW Group’s value proposition.

• Understand customer needs and clearly articulate how ITDW Group can meet them.

• Deliver high-level solution overview presentations online.

• Discover new leads through online research and social media engagement.

• Research and build new and existing account profiles (e.g., add contacts, send follow-ups, schedule strategic meetings).

• Rapidly follow up on a high volume of new leads.

• Schedule introductory meetings between Account Executives and prospective clients.

• Assist in marketing efforts including online campaigns, direct mail, and more.

What It Takes:

Experience & Results

• Proven track record of meeting and exceeding measurable sales goals in a highly automated, metrics-driven environment.

Tech-Savviness

• Familiarity with technology trends in at least one of the following areas: Colocation, Corporate IT, Public Cloud, CDN, or Cybersecurity.

Customer Understanding

• Ability to assess client requirements and identify challenges ITDW Group can solve.

Creativity & Confidence

• You think outside the box, challenge assumptions, and bring fresh ideas.

Time Management

• Highly disciplined with excellent organizational and time management skills.

Communication

• Strong verbal and written communication skills. Passionate, articulate, and persuasive.

Tech Curiosity

• Ability to understand and communicate advanced technologies with enthusiasm.

Agility

• Thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic team environment.

Ownership

• Self-motivated and results-oriented with a "get-it-done" mindset.

Multitasking

• Capable of handling multiple priorities efficiently and effectively.

Tools Experience (a plus)

• Familiarity with platforms like HubSpot, Apollo, or Lusha.

Team Spirit

• A true team player who enjoys collaborating and contributing to group success.

Entrepreneurial Mindset

• Think like a business owner. Take initiative and work independently to reach aggressive goals.

Ethics & Integrity

• High moral standards and a strong sense of professionalism.

Personality

• Friendly, fun, and easy to work with!

Languages

• Fluent in English. Proficiency in Russian, German, or Spanish is a plus. Additional languages are an advantage.

The Ideal Candidate

• Intelligent, self-driven, and quick to learn. Able to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-changing environment. Strong presentation and communication skills.

Why Join Us?

At ITDW Group, you'll be immersed in cutting-edge technologies across data centers, cloud computing, cybersecurity, and performance optimization.

You'll collaborate with a wide range of businesses—from rising startups to established enterprises.

We value independent thinkers, entrepreneurial spirit, and team players. In return, we offer competitive compensation and growth opportunities in a supportive and dynamic environment.

________________________________________

If this sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now and let’s build the future together!



Why ITDW GROUP?

Join a fast-growing company working with leading startups and enterprises worldwide. Flexible, remote-friendly culture, competitive compensation, and career growth opportunities.

title: Video Editor – Full-Time
description:
We're looking for a skilled and reliable video editor to join our team full-time. You'll be responsible for editing both short-form and long-form video content across multiple platforms. This role requires someone who can work fast, meet tight deadlines, and consistently deliver polished, publish-ready content.

Responsibilities



Edit short-form content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) and long-form content (YouTube videos, webinars, tutorials)

Incorporate AI-generated animations and visual effects into both short-form and long-form videos

Ensure all content is edited, finalized, and posted within required turnaround times

Maintain consistent branding, pacing, and quality across all deliverables

Communicate proactively on project status, especially when working against tight deadlines

Stay current with trending editing styles, transitions, and AI animation tools



Requirements



Proven experience editing both short-form and long-form video content

Hands-on experience with AI animation tools and the ability to integrate AI-generated visuals seamlessly into video projects

Proficiency in professional editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut Pro, or similar)

Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work before submission

Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and hit deadlines consistently

Reliable internet connection and availability for full-time hours



Compensation & Details



$3–$8 per hour depending on experience and skill level

Full-time position

Weekly payouts via Wise

Remote / work from anywhere



To Apply

Send your portfolio or reel showcasing both short-form and long-form edits, along with any examples of AI animation work you've done. Include your availability and expected hourly rate within the listed range.

title: Experienced Bookkeeper and Operations Administrator
description:
What We’re Looking For:

* 3+ years of bookkeeping experience with a U.S.-based company

* UK and Netherlands bookkeeping experience

* QuickBooks Online Advanced Certification

* Strong experience with multi-state sales tax and payroll

* Prepare financial statements and reports

* Month-end and year-end close

* Maintain organized and audit-ready records

* Budgeting & Financial Planning - Develop monthly and annual budgets, track 

* performance against budget and highlight variances

* High level of accuracy and attention to detail

* Fluent in English with strong written communication skills 



Nice to Have (But Not Required):

Experience with automation or workflow tools

Familiarity with Double App (formerly Keeper)

Experience in improving processes or building internal tools

• Key Responsibilities:

• Record daily transactions and reconcile bank activity using QuickBooks Online

• Compile and send daily financial summary reports (by 9:00 AM EST) to internal leadership

• Manage and update Excel-based job costing reports

• Send invoices and follow up on collections

• Track and report payments by method (cash, check, financing, etc.)

• Input contract totals from sales closed the previous day

• Prepare sales order, price quotes and work with purchasing and logistics team

• Maintain vendor records and payment schedules

• Organize and enter installer crew activity and purchase orders



How to Apply

Apply by including the phrase: “Experienced Bookkeeper and Operations Administrator” at the top of your application and
 it to 
 with your resume and include brief responses to the screening questions listed BELOW. Strong candidates will be contacted for a screening call and invited to meet the hiring manager and owner during the final stage.



Pre-Screening Questions

1. Do you have at least 3 years of bookkeeping experience, including daily use of QuickBooks Online?

2. Are you available to begin your workday between 8:00 AM –4:00 PM UK Time ( PH Time: 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM) , Monday through Friday?

3. Can you create Excel-based financial reports and job costing documents from scratch?

4. Do you have a professional home office with dependable internet access?



Why ITDW GROUP?

Join a fast-growing company working with leading startups and enterprises worldwide. Flexible, remote-friendly culture, competitive compensation, and career growth opportunities.

title: Video Editor - Social Media
description:
Video Editor (Remote)

USA based eyewear brand | Part-Time ? Full-Time with Strong Performance 



Location: Remote 

Hours: 20 hours/week to start ? Full-time (40 hrs/week) after ~2 months

Compensation: Based on experience + performance bonuses



About The Brand:

We are a sophisticated eyewear brand designing small-batch, handmade sunglasses for smaller face shapes, an overlooked niche in the industry. Each piece is crafted in Italy and released in limited quantities. 

We are building a brand rooted in storytelling, craftsmanship, and high taste. We are looking for a video editor to help us improve quality, output, and consistency of social media content. 



The Role

This is a video editing role with a strong emphasis on storytelling, craftsmanship, brand building, elevated taste, consistency, and founder-led content. 

You will be responsible for turning raw footage into high-performing, visually cohesive content across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. You will work 1:1 with the founder in 2-3 weekly meetings to discuss social media strategy and goals for the week. 



Key Responsibilities

Content Editing (Primary Focus)

- Edit short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Turn raw footage into engaging, high-retention videos 

- Create multiple variations of select videos for A/B testing and trial reels

- Incorporate B-roll, overlays, captions, and sound design



Visual Identity & Consistency

- Apply Memorí’s approved visual elements (fonts, colors, style)

- Maintain consistency across all content without handholding

- Help develop a signature editing style and recurring content series



Carousels & Static Content

- Create carousel posts that are visually cohesive and on-brand

- Ensure consistency in layout, typography, and storytelling

-Create thumbnails for short form video content that is on-brand yet easy to read



Founder-Led Content

- Edit and shape founder-led content into clear, engaging narratives

- Highlight personality, humor, and storytelling to build trust with our audience



Collaboration & Workflow

- Work from organized Google Drive folders of approved content

- Independently select and combine elements into strong final outputs

- Participate in 2x weekly strategy and feedback calls



Performance & Reporting

- Contribute to weekly discussions on what is working vs. not

- Be open to feedback and iteration



What We’re Looking For:

Must-Haves

- Strong portfolio of short-form video content

- High taste level and strong visual instincts

- Ability to maintain consistency across content

- Strong understanding of pacing, hooks, and storytelling

- Ability to execute without constant direction



High Taste Level (Non-Negotiable)

You must understand what feels premium, elevated, and aligned with a contemporary brand.



Compensation Structure

Phase 1: Trial (First ~2 Months)

- Base pay only, hourly rate

- Opportunity to transition to full-time



Phase 2: Full-Time

-Weekly base salary + performance bonuses

- Bonuses based on top 3 performing posts each month

- Evaluated on:

  - Saves and shares, watch time, engagement quality 

*Engagement must come from authentic audience behavior. Any indication of artificial engagement (bots, pods, etc.) will be disqualified from bonuses and may lead to termination. 



How to Apply

**IF YOU DO NOT FOLLOW THE STEPS BELOW, YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS JOB**

1. Complete this survey: (copy/paste this link into your browser) 
 

^note this survey will ask you to attach your resume/CV, Provide a link to your portfolio, and upload a 30 second - 2 minute video introducing yourself. 



2. After the above is reviewed, selected candidates will then be asked to complete a PAID test project



Final Note:

We are looking for someone who cares deeply about quality, consistency, and building a strong visual identity over time. With great work, there is a lot of opportunity to grow and have high earning potential within our company.

title: Hiring a Video Editor for Online Ads (E-commerce)
description:
We’re looking for a video editor who understands short-form ad content for platforms like TikTok, Meta Platforms ads, and YouTube. You’ll be editing short product-focused videos designed to perform well in paid advertising campaigns.



The workload is light and structured for now, but if things go well this can easily turn into a longer-term collaboration.



Compensation:

• $15 per completed video

• Each video includes 3 hook variations

• Bonuses may be offered depending on performance



Expected Workload:

• Around 2–7 videos per week

• Volume may increase depending on quality and consistency



How the Hiring Process Works:

1. Start your application with “I'm Ready to Make a Paid Sample.”

2. Send your best 3 ad-style videos (preferably product or e-commerce related).

3. If your work fits what we’re looking for, we’ll send paid sample instructions.

4. The sample will be a short video edit (up to ~1 minute).

5. You’ll hear back from us within 24 hours after submitting the sample.



Simple and straightforward.



Reference Examples:

We’ll provide a folder with example ads showing the editing style we want.



Before Applying:

Please only apply if you’re confident you can match a strong ad-editing style and deliver quickly. We’ll be producing a lot of videos, so consistency and speed matter.



Additional Notes:

Pricing can be adjusted after the sample, depending on quality and turnaround time.



Thanks!

title: eCommerce / Virtual Assistant/Shopify Expert
description:
Hi — I'm Ricco, founder of ThrivingMoms (
).



ThrivingMoms is a Shopify print-on-demand brand selling apparel, mugs, and lifestyle products for moms. We're a small, focused brand with a clear identity — not a generic POD store. Every product carries a specific phrase and emotional tone that speaks directly to our customer.



I'm looking for a reliable VA to help run the day-to-day operations of the store so I can focus on strategy, product development, and marketing.



This is a long-term part-time role. If you do great work and the brand grows, your hours grow with it.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO EACH WEEK:



- Check Shopify orders daily — flag any issues or fulfillment delays

- Monitor and reply to customer
s within 4 hours (templates provided)

- Upload new product listings to Shopify using our exact naming and SEO format

- Coordinate with Printify/Printful to ensure products are synced correctly

- Manage Etsy listings — add new digital products, update tags and descriptions

- Schedule 3 social media posts per week using our approved content calendar

- Send a brief weekly performance summary every Friday (orders, revenue, issues)



---



WHAT I NEED FROM YOU:



- Direct experience with Shopify Admin (not just "familiar with" — you need to have done it)

- Experience with Printify OR Printful — product syncing, variants, fulfillment monitoring

- Experience managing an Etsy seller account

- Strong written English — you will be writing customer replies in our brand voice

- Organized and self-directed — I don't want to chase you for updates

- Available during US morning or afternoon hours (overlap with CST preferred)

- Reliable internet connection and consistent availability



---



BONUS (not required, but valued):



- Pinterest scheduling experience

- Klaviyo or
 marketing familiarity

- Experience with a lifestyle, apparel, or POD brand specifically



---



WHAT THIS IS NOT:



- This is not a general VA role. If you haven't worked with Shopify and POD before, please don't apply.

- This is not a social media manager role. Content creation is not the primary job.

- This is not a short-term project. I'm looking for someone who wants to grow with the brand.



---



HOW TO APPLY:



To be considered, please send me the following. Applications without all three items will not be reviewed.



1. A short paragraph (3–5 sentences) describing a Shopify or POD store you've managed before — what you did, what platform, and for how long.



2. Answer this question in 2–3 sentences: A customer
s us saying their hoodie arrived with a faded print. What do you do?



3. Your availability: how many hours per week, which days, and what time zone.



---



DETAILS:



Rate: $5–7/hr depending on experience

Hours: 10–15 hrs/week to start

Schedule: Flexible, with some overlap with US Central Time preferred

Trial: Paid 3-day trial task before full commitment



I respond to every application that follows the instructions above. Looking forward to hearing from you.



— Ricco

ThrivingMoms

title: Shopify Store Builder (Ecom VA – Templates, Liquid, Fast Execution)
description:
Shopify Store Builder / E-Commerce VA with basic coding knowledge who can take existing templates and quickly turn them into new product pages for testing. This role pays $300–$500/month part-time.



About the Role:



This company is a direct-to-consumer brand that launches and tests products quickly. They are looking for someone who can take an existing Shopify product page or landing page template and duplicate it for new products, new angles, and new tests without needing constant hand-holding. This is not a full custom design role. This is an execution role for someone fast, detail-oriented, and comfortable working inside Shopify themes.



What You Will Be Doing:



Your main job is to take existing product page templates and replace copy, swap sections, add new sections when needed, upload products, create variants, and make the basic front-end edits required to get new tests live quickly. You should understand how Shopify product pages are structured and know how to work with templates, sections, custom liquid, and basic theme files.



Responsibilities:

Duplicate and adapt existing Shopify product page templates for new products and new angles

Replace copy, images, headlines, offers, and product information accurately

Upload new products and create product variants properly

Add, remove, and reorder sections based on page needs

Add custom liquid sections when needed

Make basic edits to Shopify theme files and JSON templates

Use AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude to help speed up execution, troubleshoot code, and build sections faster

Handle basic e-commerce tasks inside Shopify without constant supervision

Requirements:

Strong working knowledge of Shopify backend

Basic knowledge of coding, especially Liquid, HTML, CSS, and basic Shopify theme structure

Comfortable editing custom liquid and JSON template files

Understands products, variants, landing pages, and basic direct-response e-commerce structure

Knows how to move fast and follow existing page structures instead of reinventing everything

Comfortable using ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI tools to assist with coding and implementation

Tools You Will Be Using:

Shopify

Liquid

HTML / CSS

JSON templates

ChatGPT / Claude

Google Drive



Send me examples of Shopify pages you have built or worked on, along with a short explanation of what you specifically handled.
